name: Steve Roberts
subject: Sen. Roberts Secures $100 million for STL Disaster Relief
body:
| | | |
---
#### **Senator Roberts Secures $100 Million for St. Louis Disaster Relief **
---
| |
---
| | State Senator Steven Roberts, D-St. Louis, successfully helped secure $100 million in disaster relief funds specifically for the City of St. Louis in wake of the devastating May 16th tornado that claimed multiple lives, destroyed homes and left neighborhoods in crisis.
[Senate Bill 1](http://url5914.robertsforstl.com/ls/click?upn=u001.fzG53TkBvmRvO32ahM-2BnoTAzfPYg4QsBmRSXo3mMrIuayvDinXRDWfiNBxREWPuvkLZZTSB39yPW1xXTy737LghGWqENyogvrEeQsyVUo-2Feyev7Hg-2FWPSKSFQk4UPZafOrPz_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUwzpr4yzadxjHzDDb6zfZG0673FuNOB9kfxyQCrbE-2BeR2LLc67BAvI6z5zaAVWsNvv9DQO7dMsPAlRNX7m6aCd5sWx-2Bs9Y-2B-2BwBItd-2F5khLdH-2B3ckJ7Pdry-2FQukpPHokVJ6-2BAZMTwgLnGXSSIb90iabOFiQKWE5-2FIUqLX41pBe-2FbP3EcJ9czQ-2F4-2BDBZXsj4tVFoD0-2FNiFrLonvVjUkmUZqCmdbweembXnnMXJGiIKqs3Al8dwqH7AePMztvZvI-2FSLJwWB14pW6p6FTPcMwUT7ybeEvl7xZQILYkVyagHAfxoupIZXUqUfeZQxudMztSu0p-2B-2BypJIgFL8Igjq0tXY1jidG8MGHrI-2FJCzWYAt7OfCtDrvdP-2Bsv-2Ff1eFOLRF7VyFdr-2F0IIeRqHeICiDpVyDvtRwStMVrzbeHKwTvZFAHzzRSbFF8qBD8ScwEMJYOTfT8tVrhmHildP1kOug8tqfYKcuk5xpCA41-2FGcWo4HmUosdrbH1GB6c-2FlgwgrWGcPy-2BYtvLBAfpPen8XNEBV7T-2B47FHpFeVPakKf-2BT7iS-2FIO1CP4eN6HJW6JvszrksyJZ7rOqyfQrfAwlfHnguduVnIW9vTpss-2BDG2dmZaUkkWMJ8qgU4TLA3Bu95lEQscS9FWiofyBw9sSi4B2MNIKSKoAXcETOmUCoCNwVQ8Djj6kjSj3FR1js6tohqKpcOLINtR2LbjtLblqwkWvOUyF0XsJuFSMPFiisHYNrM65DEkXTHrrbqenISS6BJzVOBEuLpwai53w-3D-3D), which initially included just $25 million to be used statewide for disaster recovery, was amended throughout the legislative process to include substantial additional funding after extended negotiations during the recent extraordinary legislative session called by the governor.
**"We have a moral obligation to respond to the urgent and life-threatening needs of our communities,"** said Sen. Roberts. **"This tornado left a path of devastation across St. Louis, and our residents need immediate support. We cannot sit and wait for federal agencies to respond."**
Senator Roberts pushed to increase the relief package to reflect the scale of damage suffered in St. Louis, advocating directly with leadership and appropriations officials to secure the funding. The final agreement passed in the Senate allocates a full $100 million for relief efforts, including housing assistance, infrastructure repair and long-term recovery programs.
**"Lives were lost. Families were displaced. Businesses were destroyed. This isn't about politics. It's about people,"** Sen. Roberts added. **"I'm proud we were able to deliver real help to those who need it most."**
The $100 million disaster relief package was approved by the Senate on June 5th. The House of Representatives approved the bill on June 11th, sending it to the Governor's desk.
Other disaster relief measures passed by the legislature include $25 million for home repairs and other housing needs through the Missouri Housing Development Commission (MHDC), as well as a [tax credit worth up to $5,000 for insurance deductibles paid](http://url5914.robertsforstl.com/ls/click?upn=u001.fzG53TkBvmRvO32ahM-2BnoTAzfPYg4QsBmRSXo3mMrIuayvDinXRDWfiNBxREWPuvkLZZTSB39yPW1xXTy737LghGWqENyogvrEeQsyVUo-2FduZcCFNmOlKlKTU-2BnjlEAMkaso_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUwzpr4yzadxjHzDDb6zfZG0673FuNOB9kfxyQCrbE-2BeR2LLc67BAvI6z5zaAVWsNvv9DQO7dMsPAlRNX7m6aCd5sWx-2Bs9Y-2B-2BwBItd-2F5khLdH-2B3ckJ7Pdry-2FQukpPHokVJ6-2BAZMTwgLnGXSSIb90iabOFiQKWE5-2FIUqLX41pBe-2FbP3EcJ9czQ-2F4-2BDBZXsj4tVFoD0-2FNiFrLonvVjUkmUZqCmdbweembXnnMXJGiIKqs3Al8dwqH7AePMztvZvI-2FSLJwWB14pW6p6FTPcMwUT7ybeEvl7xZQILYkVyagHAfxoupIZXUqUfeZQxudMztSu0p-2B-2BypJIgFL8Igjq0tXY1jidG8MGHrI-2FJCzWYAt7OfCtDrvdP-2Bsv-2Ff1eFOLRF7VyFdr-2F0IIeRqHeICiDpVyDvtRwStMVrzbeHKwTvZFAHzzRSbFF8qBD8ScwEMJYOTfT8tVrhmHildP1kOug8tqfYKcuk5xpCA41-2FGcWo4HmUosdrbH1GB6c-2FlgwgrWGcPy-2BYtvLBAfpPen8XNEBV7T-2B47FHpFeVPakKf-2BT7iS-2FIO1CP4eN6HJW6JvszrksyJZ7rOqyTqm0kNOimlzS7aPqXYNMbE6GWk3RKpUz5FF57jb8KWeSJPQGsdeQV-2BO44zVtAVu0S7U5XlJtD07Tmg0A0wM9svjpO6-2BnYJ0rbP6Ftwm53KVDmVjXekR0WJt2UCmR710d6XtFMlL97ZyrcG9iVWi1bxbhwEZ-2BrGOZfEJXT1BUWggfcyduhXfDjXFvN61D9Pksg-3D-3D) for residential damage in an area where federal disaster aid was requested. President Trump approved the [Major Disaster Declaration for Missouri](http://url5914.robertsforstl.com/ls/click?upn=u001.fzG53TkBvmRvO32ahM-2BnoT-2FhsRlXu1qBu6S61TZZtMhr2PwGomuC1Win2Nz1ogFbyGyGTCRCO2wyF1LvkYZT9DAO1CPtS0GBh-2B6ecVaHI0IQcDFTf-2BDMROVyYKnaQOrsU3iyqCivr-2FFG77j3H3JF4tTpC60cTPRkxwKRw9n0gfI-3DE4AV_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCKy-2B-2B58EQo9OBZ1DFkEmwuM7vQygzizVvxKmA-2F9J-2FE19DrCJBiChnWEt1YTcce0486aCCtakNmtIV2Bwhjynf9Hi6ChikaWGsW2E-2FoTBQUwzpr4yzadxjHzDDb6zfZG0673FuNOB9kfxyQCrbE-2BeR2LLc67BAvI6z5zaAVWsNvv9DQO7dMsPAlRNX7m6aCd5sWx-2Bs9Y-2B-2BwBItd-2F5khLdH-2B3ckJ7Pdry-2FQukpPHokVJ6-2BAZMTwgLnGXSSIb90iabOFiQKWE5-2FIUqLX41pBe-2FbP3EcJ9czQ-2F4-2BDBZXsj4tVFoD0-2FNiFrLonvVjUkmUZqCmdbweembXnnMXJGiIKqs3Al8dwqH7AePMztvZvI-2FSLJwWB14pW6p6FTPcMwUT7ybeEvl7xZQILYkVyagHAfxoupIZXUqUfeZQxudMztSu0p-2B-2BypJIgFL8Igjq0tXY1jidG8MGHrI-2FJCzWYAt7OfCtDrvdP-2Bsv-2Ff1eFOLRF7VyFdr-2F0IIeRqHeICiDpVyDvtRwStMVrzbeHKwTvZFAHzzRSbFF8qBD8ScwEMJYOTfT8tVrhmHildP1kOug8tqfYKcuk5xpCA41-2FGcWo4HmUosdrbH1GB6c-2FlgwgrWGcPy-2BYtvLBAfpPen8XNEBV7T-2B47FHpFeVPakKf-2BT7iS-2FIO1CP4eN6HJW6JvszrksyJZ7rOqyVFxRT9A5Fv2SV07ntNdRJ7ODEJng5Fkq6-2F5KvjPVCz42RJS2c5JjWsRGnoGQWrUCpjjAmQxcJqyLdJ2x8Ad8RS3MJGAXKqHH5gDsEmpgBvxZ1BraU3CMGtLr19i98w2nCGcC9Za0XnKhMsN5kXvmktDYRzFdl-2BtCHfqJ7eFayyoukfWLIRISFjLAMNFaL864A-3D-3D) on June 10th, roughly three weeks after the deadly May 16th tornado. The approval will allow St. Louis City to receive Federal Emergency Management Agency (FEMA) assistance that is expected to be in the amount of $71 million initially; although, that number could increase.
---
|
---
**About Steve Roberts**
Senator Steven Roberts, a fourth-generation St. Louis native, was sworn into office on January 6, 2021, to represent Missouri’s 5th Senatorial District and currently serves as the Assistant Minority Floor Leader. Previously, he served in the Missouri House of Representatives from 2017 to 2020 and chaired the Missouri Legislative Black Caucus. A graduate of the University of Miami and Pepperdine Law, he has worked in Congress, as a prosecutor in St. Louis, and as a Captain in the Missouri Air National Guard’s JAG Corps. He also manages Roberts Law, LLC, and remains active in Missouri’s legal and civic communities.

| To: Laura Gillen’s Top Supporters
From: Laura Gillen Campaign Team
Subject: Our path to victory and what we need to stay competitive

Peter,

We wanted to take a moment to give you an important update on the state of the race and [_**why your support is more crucial than ever.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109415517/551034837/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-06-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTU5NTQxNy0yMjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ejwbXbKmDcwFIUw8AYvgMu5vrT4X6DEUxOISWNvbW1k=)

As you know, this district is one of the **most competitive** in the country. We flipped it blue in 2024 by a razor-thin margin. Now, Republicans are already targeting us with attack ads and throwing money into this race to take it back.

With **Republicans controlling the House, Senate, and the White House** , this fight is about more than just one seat. It’s about ensuring we can block their MAGA agenda and hold them accountable for their attacks on working families, health care and our democracy.

Here’s the reality:
* **Election experts are calling this race a toss-up** — the only one in New York.
* **National Republicans are pouring in money** to flip this seat red.
* **We’re already facing attack ads** from their super PACs.
* If we **don’t meet our June FEC fundraising goal** we risk looking weak, opening the door for extremists who want to strip away progress and push dangerous policies.

_Our campaign needs**funding** to stay competitive. It’s that simple._

Every dollar you contribute helps us:
* **Counter the GOP attacks** with ads, outreach and digital campaigns.
* **Build the infrastructure** we need to mobilize voters and stay ahead in this race.
* **Ensure we have the resources** to get out the vote and defend this district.

clean_body: Laura asked us to send a memo to our top supporters detailing the state of our race and our path to victory. | Laura asked us to send a memo to our top supporters detailing the state of our race and our path to victory. Please take a moment to read it and then=** = | To: Laura Gillen’s Top Supporters From: Laura Gillen Campaign Team Subject: Our path to victory and what we need to stay competitive Peter, We wanted to take a moment to give you an important update on the state of the race and = As you know, this district is one of the most competitive in the country. We flipped it blue in 2024 by a razor-thin margin. Now, Republicans are already targeting us with attack ads and throwing money into this race to take it back. With Republicans controlling the House, Senate, and the White House , this fight is about more than just one seat. It’s about ensuring we can block their MAGA agenda and hold them accountable for their attacks on working families, health care and our democracy. Here’s the reality: Election experts are calling this race a toss-up — the only one in New York. National Republicans are pouring in money to flip this seat red. We’re already facing attack ads from their super PACs. If we don’t meet our June FEC fundraising goal we risk looking weak, opening the door for extremists who want to strip away progress and push dangerous policies. Our campaign needsfunding to stay competitive. It’s that simple. Every dollar you contribute helps us: Counter the GOP attacks with ads, outreach and digital campaigns. Build the infrastructure we need to mobilize voters and stay ahead in this race. Ensure we have the resources to get out the vote and defend this district. = | | | = | = | = | = | = P.S. We know this is going to be a tight race, but with your support, we can make sure we stay competitive. This district is pivotal and we can’t afford to fall short of our June FEC goal. = | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

Peter, if you've been waiting for the moment to act - this is it.
Because Donald Trump just crossed another line.
🚨 He sent 700 Marines into Los Angeles to help the National Guard suppress peaceful protests against his inhumane ICE raids.
🚨 He’s using the military to intimidate civilians - on American soil.
🚨 And now, he’s calling for the ARREST of California Governor Gavin Newsom... simply for daring to stand up to him.
This is what fascism looks like in real time.
We cannot be passive. We cannot wait. We must respond with overwhelming resistance — right now.
We’re mobilizing emergency resources to support Democrats who are bravely fighting back against Trump’s authoritarian power grabs. But we’re falling short of what we need to scale up fast. Can you rush a donation immediately - $10, $25, whatever you can - to help fund this fight? Every moment we wait is a moment Trump gains more power. body:
please confirm: Do you oppose DOGE accessing your personal information?
#

Last week, the U.S. Supreme Court ruled that Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency — otherwise known as **DOGE — can legally access the Social Security data of MILLIONS of Americans like you.** **This includes _sensitive personal information._** Birth certificates. Addresses. Phone numbers. Health records. Employment records. We think most Americans would agree on this... **DOGE shouldn’t be anywhere near our private information.** But after this ruling, we want to confirm with you, Peter: **Do YOU oppose DOGE accessing your personal data?** **[YES — I'M OPPOSED](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-email-20250611?t=1&akid=9000%2E614464%2EG6AHIg)** **[NO — I SUPPORT IT](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-email-20250611?t=2&akid=9000%2E614464%2EG6AHIg)** **[I'M NOT SURE](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/sdc-email-20250611?t=3&akid=9000%2E614464%2EG6AHIg)**

name: Tim Kaine
subject: re: Abigail Spanberger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
Folks,
I’m a proud Abigail Spanberger supporter. Right now we’re less than a week away from the kickoff of Virginia’s general election, so I’m asking you to join me.
I know Abigail is the right leader for our Commonwealth, and is uniquely qualified to meet this challenging moment with the strength and commitment it requires.
If that’s all you need to hear, then please split a donation right now between Abigail’s campaign and my Common Ground PAC that’s working to flip VA blue in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
Abigail is a public servant through and through — from federal law enforcement to the CIA, she’s worked at home and abroad to keep America safe.
She never thought she would run for elected office, but things changed after moving back to Henrico County to raise her three kids. Witnessing the division and chaos after the 2016 election, she knew Americans and Virginians deserved better — so Abigail ran to represent Virginia’s 7th District in Congress, and won!
In the House of Representatives, she worked every day to protect our democracy and defend our rights — and she was committed to working across the aisle whenever it was possible to get things done and solve problems for the people of her district. I know as the next governor of Virginia, she’ll bring the same common-sense leadership and strong values to serve the people of our Commonwealth.
There’s a lot at stake in this race. Virginia’s statewide Republican leadership has mirrored the worst of the national GOP in recent years, pushing an extreme agenda that abandons the values so many in the Commonwealth hold dear. And it’s bigger than just VA — people in all 50 states are going to be looking at this race as the first major test for Democrats during Trump’s second term.
A victory will set the tone heading into the 2026 midterms — and so will a defeat.
Pundits have declared this race a toss-up, and it’ll be a tough campaign all the way to the finish line in November — so Abigail needs all the support she can get. Before the general election kicks off next week, will you pitch in $20, or any amount you can, to her campaign and my Common Ground PAC? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
As a former Governor of Virginia, I know what it takes to lead our Commonwealth forward and I can tell you this: Abigail has got it! I’ve been all in to support her campaign, and will continue doing everything it takes to flip Virginia blue this year — I really hope you’re with me.
If you’re ready for a major Democratic victory, please donate today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-spanberger]
Thanks so much for being on this team. I always know I can count on you when it matters most.
-Tim Kaine

name: All On The Line
subject: Did you catch our message last week about Louisiana?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|
---

Hey Peter, we’re all anxiously awaiting for the Supreme Court’s decision in _Louisiana v. Callais_ — a ruling could come any day now.
**The short version is this: The Court could either uphold a fair congressional map and safeguard key protections under the Voting Rights Act — or it could undermine essential voting rights in Louisiana and nationwide.**
**You can read more below —[a lot is at stake for those of us who care about the future of democracy. Please chip in today and let’s ensure we’re prepared for whatever comes next.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109416081/551058338/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_LAPreLift_email_20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_campaign=LAPreLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkOGU5MTk4LTI4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yl5kQFv6I5oCicICyTyBNKXzbkvrSWJWtAfG1yh2ERo=)**
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109416082/551058339/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_LAPreLift_email_20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_campaign=LAPreLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkOGU5MTk4LTI4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yl5kQFv6I5oCicICyTyBNKXzbkvrSWJWtAfG1yh2ERo=)
---
We’ll be in touch when we know more,
All On The Line
\-----------Forwarded Message----------
From: Team AOTL
Date: Sunday, June 8th, 2025
Subject: A Supreme Court case that could determine the future of Louisiana’s congressional map
Team,
The United States Supreme Court will issue a decision in _Louisiana v. Callais_ any day now. This case could determine the future of Louisiana’s congressional map and critical protections under the Voting Rights Act (VRA).
[**Sign up here to receive breaking news text messages from All On The Line and be the first to know as soon as this critical ruling comes down.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109416083/551058340/1843700183?refcode=cul_aotl_tier1_email_LAPreLift_email_20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_campaign=LAPreLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkOGU5MTk4LTI4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yl5kQFv6I5oCicICyTyBNKXzbkvrSWJWtAfG1yh2ERo=&emci=c121fba7-0c47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7d8e9198-2847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
Here’s what A.G. Holder had to say about this case:
**"Federal law, the Supreme Court’s own precedent, and basic fairness dictate that Black Louisianians must vote on truly representative and fair maps.** A decision that does not recognize that fact or that weakens the Voting Rights Act of 1965 would signal an alarming retreat into a past that so many have fought so long and so hard to pull the country from.”
_**The facts:**_ Black voters in Louisiana make up roughly one-third of the state’s population, yet for decades had an opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice in **only one** of the state’s **six** congressional districts. Then, after a long legal fight supported by our affiliate, **the National Redistricting Foundation, the state enacted a new, fair map last year.**
But our fight didn’t end there. That’s because map manipulators are still working to undermine Black voting power in Louisiana.
After that, however, a group of radical conservative activists brought a new case in one of the most conservative federal courts in the country, **blatantly ignoring** the Supreme Court’s recent precedent in _Allen v. Milligan_. Unfortunately, that new court struck down Louisiana’s new, fair map.
**Now the Supreme Court is expected to rule in the days ahead on the future of Louisiana’s map and this hard-fought Black-opportunity district.[Sign up for text updates to get real-time breaking news as soon as it happens. >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109416084/551058341/1843700183?refcode=cul_aotl_tier1_email_LAPreLift_email_20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_campaign=LAPreLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkOGU5MTk4LTI4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yl5kQFv6I5oCicICyTyBNKXzbkvrSWJWtAfG1yh2ERo=&emci=c121fba7-0c47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7d8e9198-2847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)**
[SIGN UP!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109416085/551058348/1843700183?refcode=cul_aotl_tier1_email_LAPreLift_email_20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=cul&utm_content=20250611-AOTL-Tier1-LAPreLift_&utm_campaign=LAPreLift&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdkOGU5MTk4LTI4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Yl5kQFv6I5oCicICyTyBNKXzbkvrSWJWtAfG1yh2ERo=&emci=c121fba7-0c47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7d8e9198-2847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---
All On The Line is building a truly representative democracy where all eligible voters can make their voices heard. We’re fighting for:
• A democracy that’s truly representative
• The end of extreme partisan and racial gerrymandering
• To ensure that historically marginalized voters can make their voices heard
No matter how hard these anti-democracy forces try, we will refuse to give in. **All On The Line will be here to fight for fair representation — in Louisiana, and across the country.**

clean_body: | Hey Peter, we’re all anxiously awaiting for the Supreme Court’s decision in Louisiana v. Callais — a ruling could come any day now. The short version is this: The Court could either uphold a fair congressional map and safeguard key protections under the Voting Rights Act — or it could undermine essential voting rights in Louisiana and nationwide. You can read more below —= = We’ll be in touch when we know more, All On The Line \-----------Forwarded Message---------- From: Team AOTL Date: Sunday, June 8th, 2025 Subject: A Supreme Court case that could determine the future of Louisiana’s congressional map Team, The United States Supreme Court will issue a decision in Louisiana v. Callais any day now. This case could determine the future of Louisiana’s congressional map and critical protections under the Voting Rights Act (VRA). Here’s what A.G. Holder had to say about this case: "Federal law, the Supreme Court’s own precedent, and basic fairness dictate that Black Louisianians must vote on truly representative and fair maps. A decision that does not recognize that fact or that weakens the Voting Rights Act of 1965 would signal an alarming retreat into a past that so many have fought so long and so hard to pull the country from.” The facts: Black voters in Louisiana make up roughly one-third of the state’s population, yet for decades had an opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice in only one of the state’s six congressional districts. Then, after a long legal fight supported by our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, the state enacted a new, fair map last year. But our fight didn’t end there. That’s because map manipulators are still working to undermine Black voting power in Louisiana. After that, however, a group of radical conservative activists brought a new case in one of the most conservative federal courts in the country, blatantly ignoring the Supreme Court’s recent precedent in Allen v. Milligan. Unfortunately, that new court struck down Louisiana’s new, fair map. Now the Supreme Court is expected to rule in the days ahead on the future of Louisiana’s map and this hard-fought Black-opportunity district. All On The Line is building a truly representative democracy where all eligible voters can make their voices heard. We’re fighting for: • A democracy that’s truly representative • The end of extreme partisan and racial gerrymandering • To ensure that historically marginalized voters can make their voices heard No matter how hard these anti-democracy forces try, we will refuse to give in. All On The Line will be here to fight for fair representation — in Louisiana, and across the country. This is where you come in, team. None of this is possible without grassroots supporters like you, who understand how critical these issues are for the future of our democracy. = = More as soon as we know it — thank you, The AOTL Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: AOC
subject: ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
It is 100% carrying water for the opposition to participate in this collective delusion that Democrats, for some reason, need to answer for every teen who throws a rock, rather than hold the Trump administration accountable for intentionally creating chaos and breaking the law to stoke violence.
**_They_ are in charge.**
Everything was fine until Trump decided to unleash violent raids without grounds in elementary schools, shopping areas, and peaceful public spaces.
ICE then illegally blocked Members of Congress entry into the facilities they are disappearing people into — escalating the situation.
**Let’s start there.**
Perhaps that’s why ICE agents are hiding their faces.
But we do not have to comply with illegal activity — even if that illegal activity is coming from the President of the United States.
[Help us continue the fight against the Trump administration’s rising extremism with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250611-2._C8ORK&refcode=em20250611-9078-P_FND_RES_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9078%2E2526796%2EqfGiuJ)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250611-2._C8ORK&refcode=em20250611-9078-P_FND_RES_TWT&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9078%2E2526796%2EqfGiuJ)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250611-2?refcode=em20250611-9078-P_FND_RES_TWT&t=21&refcode2=9078_2526796_qfGiuJ&akid=9078%2E2526796%2EqfGiuJ)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250611-9078-P_FND_RES_TWT&t=22&akid=9078%2E2526796%2EqfGiuJ)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=9078%2E2526796%2EqfGiuJ) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=9078%2E2526796%2EqfGiuJ) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=9078%2E2526796%2EqfGiuJ)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=9078%2E2526796%2EqfGiuJ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=9078%2E2526796%2EqfGiuJ)

name: Krystan Curlett
subject: Supercharge Your Quantum Computing with Innovative Fiber Optic Solutions
body:
Dear Dpwillis67,

Hope this letter finds you well.

This is Krystan Curlett from Ziguan Photonics, a leading provider of specialized fiber optic components, including motorized fiber delay lines and digital VOA modules, designed to meet the demanding requirements of quantum computing systems.

Our self-developed solutions offer nanosecond-level precision in optical path control and real-time attenuation adjustment, ensuring optimal performance for your quantum research and development. With our streamlined supply chain, we provide cost-effective pricing without compromising quality.

Optical Switch

EDFA, Raman Amplifier

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109416470/551068466/2105508926?refcode=ea.7fbdeb34-3847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7fbdeb34-3847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmYmRlYjM0LTM4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fYRrdCUVMhACIGCRtusYHD4a0YEV_1M1FIrJIrh-2uY=) **BREAKING from New Jersey: JanePAC-endorsed Katie Brennan just won her primary for one of two Assembly seats for New Jersey’s 32nd District — and Ravi Bhalla is leading and on track to win the second seat!** Katie and Ravi weren’t afraid to take on the political machines and corrupt systems that were failing to meet this moment. They ran scrappy, progressive, and fiercely independent campaigns — and they won because people like YOU stepped up. You knocked doors, called voters, and yes, chipped in a few dollars to help them reach and mobilize voters all across Hoboken and Jersey City. In a competitive primary like this one, the margin comes down to just a handful of votes, which means **you** made a real difference. We are especially proud of wins like these because they prove that what we’re doing works. When we invest in climate champions brave enough to say no to Big Oil, they run campaigns rooted in community, powered by the people, and driven by bold solutions. **That’s how we begin to transform who holds power.** Polluters and power brokers in New Jersey should know that Katie will be one of their strongest opponents in Trenton. We’ll keep you updated as Ravi’s race gets called, but no matter what, the fossil fuel industry is already losing. Under Ravi's leadership, Hoboken became one of the first U.S. cities to sue Big Oil for climate damages. **This victory is just the beginning. We’re announcing more endorsements in the coming weeks, and we need to build on this momentum — stronger and more unstoppable than ever.** **[If you’re as fired up as we are, chip in right now to help elect even more fearless climate champions like Katie and Ravi. Together, we’re building the kind of grassroots momentum that can withstand anything the fossil fuel lobby throws at us>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109416471/551068467/2105508926?refcode=ea.7fbdeb34-3847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7fbdeb34-3847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmYmRlYjM0LTM4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fYRrdCUVMhACIGCRtusYHD4a0YEV_1M1FIrJIrh-2uY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109416472/551068468/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.7fbdeb34-3847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7fbdeb34-3847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmYmRlYjM0LTM4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fYRrdCUVMhACIGCRtusYHD4a0YEV_1M1FIrJIrh-2uY=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109416473/551068469/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.7fbdeb34-3847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.7fbdeb34-3847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmYmRlYjM0LTM4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fYRrdCUVMhACIGCRtusYHD4a0YEV_1M1FIrJIrh-2uY=)

clean_body: Every single action — every call, every dollar, every conversation — helped make this happen. | = BREAKING from New Jersey: JanePAC-endorsed Katie Brennan just won her primary for one of two Assembly seats for New Jersey’s 32nd District — and Ravi Bhalla is leading and on track to win the second seat! Katie and Ravi weren’t afraid to take on the political machines and corrupt systems that were failing to meet this moment. They ran scrappy, progressive, and fiercely independent campaigns — and they won because people like YOU stepped up. You knocked doors, called voters, and yes, chipped in a few dollars to help them reach and mobilize voters all across Hoboken and Jersey City. In a competitive primary like this one, the margin comes down to just a handful of votes, which means you made a real difference. We are especially proud of wins like these because they prove that what we’re doing works. When we invest in climate champions brave enough to say no to Big Oil, they run campaigns rooted in community, powered by the people, and driven by bold solutions. That’s how we begin to transform who holds power. Polluters and power brokers in New Jersey should know that Katie will be one of their strongest opponents in Trenton. We’ll keep you updated as Ravi’s race gets called, but no matter what, the fossil fuel industry is already losing. Under Ravi's leadership, Hoboken became one of the first U.S. cities to sue Big Oil for climate damages. This victory is just the beginning. We’re announcing more endorsements in the coming weeks, and we need to build on this momentum — stronger and more unstoppable than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for everything you do, — JanePAC Elections Team | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: David Hogg
subject: I am no longer a DNC Vice Chair
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Peter, I am no longer a DNC Vice
Chair.

The DNC Vote to have a new election comes after weeks of contention about
our work here at Leaders We Deserve, especially our plan to challenge
ineffective Democrats in the primaries.

I started Leaders We Deserve for a simple purpose: to be the EMILY's List
for progressive young Democrats. We’ve sought to find the best of the best
of our generation and do everything we can to help them run the best
campaigns possible and get the financial support they need to win.

We spent millions last year fighting to elect incredible young people:
Molly Cook, Mo Jenkins, Averie Bishop and Kristian Carranza in Texas;
Bryce Berry and Ashwin Ramaswami in Georgia; Dante Pittman in North
Carolina, Nadarius Clark in Virginia, Christine Cockley in Ohio, Sarah
McBride in Delaware, Nate Douglas in Florida, Oscar De Los Santos in
Arizona and others. We focused on open blue seats and defeating incumbent
Republicans, hoping that these open seats would be space enough to achieve
what we wanted.

After seeing a serious lack of vision from Democratic leaders, too many of
them asleep at the wheel, and Democrats dying in office that have helped
to hand Republicans an expanded majority, it became clear that Leaders We
Deserve had to start primarying incumbents and directly challenging the
culture of seniority politics that brought our party to this place to help
get our party into fighting shape again.

We have a real challenge ahead of us. We lost voting share with almost
every demographic across the board, and despite all that Trump has done,
our approvals remain at 27%.

If we don’t show our country how we are dramatically changing and provide
an alternative vision for the future as a party, we will continue to lose.
Not because we don't have money, but because we don’t have a compelling
vision for the future and we lack the courage we used to have to take on
massive policy fights that have helped millions like the Affordable Care
Act, Medicaid, Medicare, Social Security, the first Assault Weapons ban
and more.

Even if we had gained a three seat Congressional majority, the three
deaths this session would have once again put millions of Americans on the
line.

Let me be clear: this is not solely an issue of age — it's an issue of
effectiveness that at times is compounded by age.

This is not a call for every older person to leave government. There are
lots of great older people who we need, there’s lots of terrible younger
people we don’t.

But it’s clear this culture of staying in power until you die or simply
fail to do a good job but don’t need to worry about a challenge because
you are in a safe seat has become an existential threat to the future of
this party and nation that must be addressed.

This crisis of competence and complacency has already cost us an election
and millions of Americans their rights. Let's not let it cost us the
country.

This culture simply will not change by only focusing on open seats or just
throwing half a billion dollars into 30 competitive House seats. We must
change the culture of our party that has brought us here and if there is
anything activism or history teaches us it's that comfortable people,
especially comfortable people with power, do not change. In this moment of
crisis, comfort is not an option.

The American people are looking for an answer for how to revive the
American Dream that they feel has become more of a fiction than a
possibility. We have a crisis of faith in this country, in our elected
leaders and in our parties. So far Donald Trump has convinced many people
that the answer is to look backward instead of forward. At this moment of
darkness we have a sacred obligation not to this party, but to this
country as a party.

In his 1960 acceptance speech to the DNC to accept the Democratic
nomination to become president, John F. Kennedy said:

“The times are too grave, the challenge too urgent, and the stakes too
high — to permit the customary passions of political debate. We are not
here to curse the darkness; we are here to light the candle that can guide
us through that darkness to a safe and sane future.”

We relight that candle by providing a new vision for the future and
leaders to bring us there. That new vision will come from new leaders.
Building a future where voters vote for us not because of who we aren’t
but because of who we are. That is why it is important we not only defeat
Republicans but we use a healthy competitive primary process to make us a
stronger party.

The alternative is a continuation of the politics that brought our party
to this place. That is unacceptable. We must embrace a healthy culture of
competitive primaries to build the strongest party possible.

Being a Democrat means believing in the politics of the possible like we
did after Parkland. It's about believing in who we could be not only as a
party but as a country. If we put our minds to it and we work hard enough,
we can do anything, no matter what stands in our way. That’s why I’m a
Democrat.

I came into this role to play a positive role in creating the change our
party needs. It is clear that there is a fundamental disagreement about
the role of a Vice Chair — and it's okay to have disagreements. What isn’t
okay is allowing this to remain our focus when there is so much more we
need to be focused on.

Ultimately, I have decided to not run in this upcoming election so the
party can focus on what really matters. I need to do this work with
Leaders We Deserve, and it is going to remain my number one mission to
build the strongest party possible.

I’m thankful to everyone who has supported me in this role. I’m proud to
have travelled to 10 states to do 30+ events, raising money for state
parties, organizing with young Democrats, and getting out the vote for
special elections in Wisconsin and Florida.

I have nothing but admiration and respect for my fellow officers. Even
though we have disagreements, we all are here to build the strongest party
possible.

Let me be extremely clear: Yes, we need to defeat Republicans. Leaders We
Deserve will have many candidates challenging Republican incumbents. But
we also need to build a party not defined by not being the less bad of two
options in voters' eyes. We need to be the best option period at every
level of government.

That change can only come through a full embrace of Democracy not only to
defeat Republicans but to elect new Democrats to show voters how we are
changing and regain their trust by listening to them, doing all we can to
give them the best representation possible. Leaders We Deserve exists to
do just that.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250611_2_vote?refcode=em20250611-2250&amount=3&refcode2=2250_587540_id45t_&akid=2250%2E587540%2Eid45t_ ]We need your support to do this work,
Peter. If you’re with us in the fights ahead,
consider donating $3 or anything that makes sense for you
today.

Thank you,

David Hogg

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1001&akid=2250%2E587540%2Eid45t_
Update Your Information: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=2250%2E587540%2Eid45t_

Washington, DC 20003

subject: ARREST WARRANT for Gavin Newsom?

body:
Newsom is making a mockery of law and order!

| | | Friend, **California Governor Gavin Newsom MOCKS President Trump and border czar Tom Homan in RAGE-FUELED DEFENSE of attempted MURDER of ICE agents!** _**[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5ckgo24c7lhh2382si4dkjvhmlhesf449vsrha8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sth64ob0cjh2bs)[He just DARED Homan to ARREST HIM - We’re DEMANDING that he be held responsible! ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z069cd193hso7mpriqlgoipj8jcvg93h8l7140d0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sth64ob0cjh2bs)[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z16kbh2bnpdsrdtb2r4bv4584h6va1gnomt5hdig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sth64ob0cjh2bs)**_ **_“Come after me._****____**[**__Arrest me__**** __.__**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdt3j8i8tvfi5pgnu0dmlijmp04aqiepickq55ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sth64ob0cjh2bs)**___Let’s just get it over with, tough guy.”_** Governor Newsom is **FUMING WITH RAGE!** He’s not angry about ICE protestors BLOCKING U.S. Marshals and federal border enforcement. He’s not angry about violent leftist rioters attempting to KILL ICE agents by throwing bricks through the windows of federal vehicles. He’s not angry about a CIVIL WAR breaking out in his city of Los Angeles with leftists joining forces with illegal aliens in acts of INSURRECTION. He’s FURIOUS President Trump and Tom Homan are sending in brave federal agents to RESTORE LAW AND ORDER! These law enforcement agents are brave men and women that are putting their lives at risk to stop the unrest and make LA SAFE AGAIN! But Gavin Newsom is feeding rhetoric that ICE is a RACIST, NAZI ORGANIZATION and MOCKING Pres. Trump by calling him a “stone cold liar” who “manufactured a crisis.” Not only did Newsom DEFEND these violent leftist protests as “peaceful protests,” he’s IMPEDING law enforcement from succeeding! He’s willing to GO TO WAR with ICE calling Tom Homan’s bluff and DARING him to take action against him! _**[We’ve launched a petition to hold Newsom accountable and we need you to sign your name immediately!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt9esn9nq2lkt7i75b16lirgqembe63obq346mq0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sth64ob0cjh2bs)**_

subject: Rashida Tlaib strikes again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican Jewish Coalition
body:
If we had a dollar for every time Tlaib cried “genocide,” we’d be able to pay for her one-way ticket to Gaza.

| |
---
| | | Friend, Rashida Tlaib has falsely accused Israel of genocide so many times that we've lost count.

But her latest will astound you:

Despite multiple articles debunking this preposterous claim, Tlaib posted that Israeli forces were shooting Palestinians who were trying to get food at an aid distribution center.

**Tlaib - a sitting member of the US Congress - is blatantly peddling propaganda for Hamas.**

**[Please add your name to condemn terrorist sympathizer Rashida Tlaib.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi1grg9rs228co5octt7eqmqvd1q2eatbgkrojr0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sth64ob2chh2bs "Please add your name to condemn terrorist sympathizer Rashida Tlaib.")**

---
After the slaughter of 6 million Jews in the Holocaust, we said "Never again." We instilled this in our children, and they passed it on to their children.

But on October 7th, 2023, we witnessed the worst attack on Jews since the Holocaust. These were acts of pure, unadulterated evil. And there are still hostages, including Americans, being held in Gaza by Hamas terrorists.

_**Never again is now.**_

In the past year, we have seen the strength and resilience of the Jewish people. We've seen the courage of Israeli soldiers in the face of harrowing barbarism. But they cannot sustain these efforts alone.

The Republican Jewish Coalition is working tirelessly to restore the relationship between the United States and our greatest ally. We're also fighting to elect pro-Israel Republicans to be our voice in Washington for the Jewish people.

**[Please stand with us in this fight between good and evil.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjtao10fbsq37559fipkdh4hgvao3j5iokdhu4mg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sth64ob2chh2bs "Please stand with us in this fight between good and evil.")**

name: CONSERVATIVE ALERTS/ BREAKING NEWS
subject: Pete Hegseth just put Gavin Newsom in his place.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JASON SMITH FOR CONGRESS
body:
The Radical Left has pushed too far

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrsgvo3cd4fv5e85m1er01gqb1lnv3rmu8d1ror0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sth64ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend,

I’m shaking as I write this.
The Radical Left has pushed too far — and finally, **someone had the courage to push back**.
Earlier today, a purple-haired, unhinged, WOKE activist _screamed like a maniac_ in Secretary Pete Hegseth’s face in broad daylight.
And what did Pete do?
He didn’t flinch.
He didn’t back down.
He looked her in the eye — and stood tall for **law, order, and AMERICA.** But that was just the beginning.

# [Demand Congress Impeach and Remove RFK Jr. NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td50e4293-2613-4ada-a515-0670abcf2514/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T18f98d02-c9dd-4fea-9366-38b221ab254c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **RFK Jr has been a disaster as health secretary, and[Congress must impeach and remove him now.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00c8e921-6d76-4380-a11b-f3b38fe6b8c2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** RFK Jr was wildly unqualified when he got the job, and has been making asinine moves ever since, such as getting rid of the entire CDC team of expert vaccine advisors, and promoting conspiracy theory nonsense as if it were actual science. It's gotten so bad, that even some [Republicans](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0bcdc4ce-f6f1-4759-87f8-18a7e8d82009/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in Congress are breaking with him. It won't be easy, but with enough pressure, we could get enough on board to make this happen. **When the nation's top health official is driving an agenda that will make us sick or kill us, it's time for him to go.** [**Add your name, and demand that Congress impeach and remove RFK Jr.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8df5d5bb-6be5-4fc6-8d5c-2bb6636accd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

body:
The [U.S. and China reached a trade deal framework](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHSoyAUBeCn0Q4HryixoNjGLttu6RC4xLu5ggMkbt5-J3mFvz9z5nznz3W9WmKK9992R1NDWiOehbFWzKvbKNqarUePlpFTtEfidKcVJIxCTqKH1Vvi96pabwIi4NCi6bWaNcA0z-1mYOid1KML9objiApHNQ3yIqebDxbC2JL5tMmph15KNV46ffFhGFC7gH7Ss2qURE815e5volg3DPxOL8ydS3vLZqv1KM3wq4GlgeU8zy6kf7dnoYilfDINLEdiquRKA8uziK9LZLRuEyHbHc-UH4L2g3HHWMWXLD5mwc8ayT1Ese_SZuOPk5ipTLpR8r5b4u-I-qPnXgb-BwAA__-PiIW1) on Wednesday, ensuring full U.S. access to rare earth materials and magnets, critical for technology, while allowing Chinese student visas, President Trump announced.

# Thursday, June 12, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1987, President Ronald Reagan gave his famous speech at the Brandenburg Gate near the Berlin Wall, addressing Soviet General Secretary Mikhail Gorbachev with a direct demand: _“Mr. Gorbachev, tear down this wall!”_ ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGngS0WXL7sgaFSlaVKpUzphjBcYlpsIofYyttX6St0PUf6Df_LyZ18Lnm5fvoZbUvVLbjfC7aGqwtTXnxbfcSIvmCpi7_VUq_ZAQN1YPrAwUWfy9NJGm1CBBQULTdyMAB6GOhkAwTEZGLfqzAA12kMMiIoMZpRcqVoti-NaQ6cMan6zvQxCYEmJIzaDJJIhjG3unbfNS9twlSedcO1C3WmxU6t3e5EvBE4Ejju-94966M9Rnz9r8W3MBFx3Ih4v3wxdv7ZPg7zma423vZcSr5rQyS7zj6XP7L9q8Nm4TcAAP__cIhxNQ)) Let’s face it: the beard might be mankind’s oldest accessory—and perhaps its most misunderstood. [A recent study](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAQRp_G7rDwGINdUNwmXW67pcXCECYiJoLZWHn7lVf7Btt_P0fn47pdHWXab__dAy3Hsu14tIzMWDefaHdcXcCALmMuu3uWXG60gYRZSC1G2IKj_N5UH2xEBJx6tKNRqwHQ69onC24NOI8xjsbPK2iJelFqmZcJg5fG9WTPNalHGKVU8zKYJcRpQuMjBm1W1SmJgbjU4V5o54Qxv8sL6-DLo882MT9bN_3r4NLB5TiOoXnC3Z_Ilc9QB5f7V2ORyiECVX4LV1F8oquhiYQVm-CE4rfWVxueB-VMTZtOydvDUf754j8Jeln4DgAA__9gfnuo) we write about below found that if left untamed, beards can harbor germs, but with daily washing and grooming, they can be hygienic and stylish. Ever had one? Did it change your life? Ladies, what happened when your partner joined the beard brigade? Tell us everything—bristles, bliss, or breakup. Just hit reply to this email. We're sponsored today by [BOXABL](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHOnCAUhZ8GdxoEBF2waPJndtNtl-QKV70NgkFmpvP2jdOmL9DtOV_uPfl-3N0dKFJav8OOti7ZJXydEWvF4vxGCWqBgAEhYswJjhzzSk5wMbRct71wASi-nWqCXRAFygZtb9RkhNDT1GzWeD0hThpnAMRBLeD9oDmfvUDUKjRkr2tc96LnXA1jZ8awSInGLxi0mRRTHAPVXLqfmVLdcInv_MTS-bw30W61HieT35i4MXGj9MSzdnP-BXO8iCuWt0fd3ZkfxSOTX7gDRSb0Fe4Y6LEz-XUAhfaAUhOWc6Pjb-9hP4DW9CH-lf3IWzlI90dBLzTnQppx0k2x4XhRjHRqwxRfr1efofW_7D6t-B0AAP__L-yO0w), offering _The Flyover_ readers an investment opportunity in a new building technology.

## US, China Reach Trade Deal for Rare Earths
President Trump announced the [U.S. and China reached a trade deal framework](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHSoyAUBeCn0Q4HryixoNjGLttu6RC4xLu5ggMkbt5-J3mFvz9z5nznz3W9WmKK9992R1NDWiOehbFWzKvbKNqarUePlpFTtEfidKcVJIxCTqKH1Vvi96pabwIi4NCi6bWaNcA0z-1mYOid1KML9objiApHNQ3yIqebDxbC2JL5tMmph15KNV46ffFhGFC7gH7Ss2qURE815e5volg3DPxOL8ydS3vLZqv1KM3wq4GlgeU8zy6kf7dnoYilfDINLEdiquRKA8uziK9LZLRuEyHbHc-UH4L2g3HHWMWXLD5mwc8ayT1Ese_SZuOPk5ipTLpR8r5b4u-I-qPnXgb-BwAA__-PiIW1) on Wednesday, ensuring full U.S. access to rare earth materials and magnets, critical for technology, while allowing Chinese student visas. Negotiated in [London after a Trump-Xi Jinping call](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHOnDAQRk9jOiMzgA2Fi40ikuZPkyIl8uJhcTTYyDaLuH3kvULqb_Q07_35mr-MI-dfv8yOOq9h9nglwpwxzsvmvMnRWLRoCCl4cwQKLzeDgJ4LyRuYrXF0z11l9YoI2FaoG9WNCkCOY7VpCTg8oR-kEE0_tMvwBFsuF2UQZK8qpwtNyAYaIbp-qNVg17ZFtaxopRo71gm0LodY_w3O5w1XusMbY72EvSK95Xwk1j4YTAym67rqPfmyMZjQ8zMxmIpUGUMky2DK8dwPnsyd-MeRX46Ip_M46ObRRORoYt4SPxPPgRuicPGUT4s-F46J_PFofrx_Dhtrp7A4y9rv30pFvNJvjEcVtT0K1CWpWCdeu3H0-Tf_V-S3hn8BAAD__3pxkoU), the deal includes 55% U.S. tariffs and 10% for China, with Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick optimistic about final approval. China will limit rare-earth export licenses to U.S. firms for six months, while the U.S. eases restrictions on tech sales like jet engines.
## Trump Welcomes Musk’s Apology After Feud
President Trump responded positively to [Elon Musk's late-night apology](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O5CAUBODT4AwLnm1sBwSbOOtNN7RoeNjs8GMB3ahvP_JcYeKSPlXVv8f-UM67ePxVAWW1aY_YisdaMe_6dFHVrAwaVB59iupKPh1uBwYTZYJy2I1y_rOPnZEWEXDoUPJ5XGcAsa7dKddB4MQstzBaI_SCz2U1SnDzBDbNSndO3hoTHDhj47T082LsMOCsLRoxryMZGRpXU-7_JxfridZ_0htzr1PovDxrvQoZ_hDYCGyttV7Hp75DAttNE9iYILBxTmC7V9DwKl-0qE-hJ9KMR8ZaaEkBaUnaKU8DGqfolUot1Lyyiwet-RUuWs7UTGqxP2vwXZbmas57V8RMRnYE5fxPq_qrK98SvgMAAP__0IuJUA) on Wednesday, after a public feud sparked by Musk's criticism of the Trump-backed "One Big Beautiful" tax bill. Musk, who had accused Trump of ties to Jeffrey Epstein and claimed credit for his 2024 election win, later deleted those posts and expressed regret, saying they "went too far." [See Musk's post here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFy6yAUheHVQGcPXNBFFBSvUefXpmSwuFgkSHgEtuPdZ5QtpD3FN2f-j4u_hFzydvsfVnI9Vb_RqxXqnXY_L3kLfQ-RIoVCpW7hXku9ZQ8ChpPAkwQfQy5vr3l0iQhIcXLSaGsA0Fq-OGVskNokVPE6ghJDtDhf5VURzsZi4tkdmkAJUgg9jGczxqQUmTlRRGM104Ji7nU_f9a89YVSedcn7ee5rry4pfd7Y-ofg4nB9H2sDKbj7fpoXwym1kN_NAaTtArQDnpEHLUdhEXgu4v3Vy4lNzRMi9sacvmF-59qPB38BAAA__-kI3CH). Trump's allies, including Vice President JD Vance, [worked to ease tensions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAQxvGnwRsRPoiJB4YubOna0aK-I6bFYAFO5Lev3D5C55P-ut_3cZ_uLsSQHu9uJdN8nhK9aqTWqEzzEpJrxSEhuUgxJ7flmB9hAgFXLgbew4QuxGNSHRpPBCQ7Mr1WowYYxrFbDCpCFCQkKSeF8DfolUQ9iFGABKe7YM6aGHrohVDX20Xf0EtJevaEgx4VU4IwtFwuXzmktpCPR35Sucx57aJZWtsqk28MLAObji3Xdp4Y2DPMwIqBge17Bnav_PQxsJiTi8hb2deNF6pbTlh5y_xk8nWv35X_aQ_ufKPCt_0zhpl72pGB7YrB7RViDHXQTInH6kL8_aj9a8angZ8AAAD__4HWhjs), while Trump expressed openness to reconciliation but prioritized national issues. The dispute had raised concerns about Musk's Tesla and SpaceX government contracts, which Trump had threatened to revoke.
## Beach Boys' Brian Wilson Dies at 82
Brian Wilson, the visionary co-founder of The Beach Boys whose melodic genius crafted iconic hits like _Good Vibrations_ and the groundbreaking album _Pet Sounds_ , [has died at 82](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ_G7hzhBYMpKK5Jl2uvtBZY4j0RsDBKlLc_-V7hL0cjzej7_jy2B3Lm8vyNL3I91a3Q58zUO7Ut7FywN4wUCTPlWvCouT55AwHLJPQ0wxaR83dTY3SJCEiO5GajrAHQ1o67gzCvPsyLnldrAyJ5j0kuCZOiIIwc2V1rQs8wC6GW9WbWmKQkExJFbawalKDIvbbb38ql75Tyt76p3UJ9jdntvR_nIH8NcB_gjscFcFVXaJ1DpgHuvjGW6cP5rGWKTOfkCcM--fo9JwADRgMpHZReQaDBJGxKwcjgLeqxuXh8OGc-tRmUeL6Q8__3_iNlbwf_AgAA__9zNH8t), his family announced. Wilson led the band to global fame in the 1960s, earning a 1988 Rock and Roll Hall of Fame induction. He was under a court conservatorship since May 2024 due to a major neurocognitive disorder. See [his life in photos here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGPnDAQhX-N6YzssTG4cJGGbtOmRAaPl4lmMQJr0f77aBNFd1df-_Tpe0_v1226RWLa7j_jA0PNZdrwOhlrxWNaVtpiPWLChJGRyxb3wuVOEyjopHJSw5Qi8WuyTQoZEdA0GHRvfQ_gvG_WsPjODxqzzz1qa5y13iNoi6i8QcCGwtumnAatlO2Gth9SNgb7JWNyvbfCKkxUy9H-LrTVFTO_yhOPdimPhsNa634K80PAKGC8rqudiXku8UhvQsC4r6WWU8A4HxQ3eRGfZZP_UjljXFY5l9cpNZjOe9fZTsBo5BdaewdSwWecKaOkD9H_Vqk7OwgYmyOk_SJmOl0vrLo_IvHf0fVbTz8D_AkAAP__48CRhQ). His innovative music inspired artists from Paul McCartney to Janelle Monáe, while he courageously faced personal struggles, including mental health issues and family disputes. Watch this [short analysis of _Pet Sounds_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAYBOCnsbcg499gPHioFNEpHapKHS0H_w5_6-AUHBBvX9FX6Pqd7ob7vLiLp0TT7c3f0ZaY3YTbkrAUnN0w0uTL7AMG9AlTnvwjp3wjJ4VsTqI91dIFT2l3igcbESUCR1trZbSUrTF8tAZNc9UwdKBDd_QAroAGvYLGCIyc7KGirWUthGq6SnchAqAeIoZWG8WUwEAlz9VXpqmMGNOeV5yrId95smMpj4XBC5M9k_22bdWen-V5xSM_xJdhZNCvDM49hca__pzfP775bMNjo5RoaTVT4nb3lP4my79-WK38DQAA___abHC8). Wilson is survived by seven children, and his cause of death was not disclosed. Readers can explore his story in the acclaimed [2014 film _Love & Mercy_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OqzAQxfGnMV2QGX-FwsVt6HLbLS2Dx2FWA47IKChvv8q-wlanONKv-H_d0i0T037_nzeMUlva8XwyiuCRlpX2LEcuWDAzctvzo3G7UwIN7qL9ZYBUMvE72a7EighoOoxDsGMA8OPYrdEZM9QwuxJM9i5cXS022MHCPDs_Lq6j-NG0H2DQ2rprH66lGoNhqVh8GK2yGgtJO_rvRrusWPndXnj0S9s6jqvI46nMPwWTguk8z562Mn9OBZOQMH5W9KiNd0HB1B2xPE5ipqcPyur7lol_MflTgVeEnwAAAP__nZRtTQ).

clean_body: The on Wednesday, ensuring full U.S. access to rare earth materials and magnets, critical for technology, while allowing Chinese student visas, President Trump announced. | | | | | | Thursday, June 12, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1987, President Ronald Reagan gave his famous speech at the Brandenburg Gate near the Berlin Wall, addressing Soviet General Secretary Mikhail Gorbachev with a direct demand: “Mr. Gorbachev, tear down this wall!” () Let’s face it: the beard might be mankind’s oldest accessory—and perhaps its most misunderstood. we write about below found that if left untamed, beards can harbor germs, but with daily washing and grooming, they can be hygienic and stylish. Ever had one? Did it change your life? Ladies, what happened when your partner joined the beard brigade? Tell us everything—bristles, bliss, or breakup. Just hit reply to this email. We're sponsored today by , offering The Flyover readers an investment opportunity in a new building technology. | US, China Reach Trade Deal for Rare Earths President Trump announced the on Wednesday, ensuring full U.S. access to rare earth materials and magnets, critical for technology, while allowing Chinese student visas. Negotiated in , the deal includes 55% U.S. tariffs and 10% for China, with Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick optimistic about final approval. China will limit rare-earth export licenses to U.S. firms for six months, while the U.S. eases restrictions on tech sales like jet engines. Trump Welcomes Musk’s Apology After Feud President Trump responded positively to on Wednesday, after a public feud sparked by Musk's criticism of the Trump-backed "One Big Beautiful" tax bill. Musk, who had accused Trump of ties to Jeffrey Epstein and claimed credit for his 2024 election win, later deleted those posts and expressed regret, saying they "went too far." . Trump's allies, including Vice President JD Vance, , while Trump expressed openness to reconciliation but prioritized national issues. The dispute had raised concerns about Musk's Tesla and SpaceX government contracts, which Trump had threatened to revoke. Beach Boys' Brian Wilson Dies at 82 Brian Wilson, the visionary co-founder of The Beach Boys whose melodic genius crafted iconic hits like Good Vibrations and the groundbreaking album Pet Sounds , , his family announced. Wilson led the band to global fame in the 1960s, earning a 1988 Rock and Roll Hall of Fame induction. He was under a court conservatorship since May 2024 due to a major neurocognitive disorder. See . His innovative music inspired artists from Paul McCartney to Janelle Monáe, while he courageously faced personal struggles, including mental health issues and family disputes. Watch this . Wilson is survived by seven children, and his cause of death was not disclosed. Readers can explore his story in the acclaimed . body:

---
| | |
---
| | It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21572/6374453/fe788de2bbbdb7c1e5f675ab26cff5a4b3b2fa72/44158ff10602134a397b792b76f0fea8d0cf85cd). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21572/6374453/fe788de2bbbdb7c1e5f675ab26cff5a4b3b2fa72/44158ff10602134a397b792b76f0fea8d0cf85cd).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21572/6374453/fe788de2bbbdb7c1e5f675ab26cff5a4b3b2fa72/44158ff10602134a397b792b76f0fea8d0cf85cd)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

## Abbott to Deploy National Guard
Gov. Greg Abbott announced late Tuesday he would [deploy the National Guard](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D3uozAQBfDTQDfIHj6cFC62ocu2W6IBD8aSg5E9CcntV8lqT_CvR_P0fu_PbbpRiGH3v-nOVl5rmnY-S2QRzpPjI6Z32L1svJOEtFP0D8puQoU9qAE0To5CfE9d7eys3FXXbLXprgYHo1S92X4wC-nWKINzi9RrNNxf8aJMzzT0WAf7CVODRq2VbrHp1ouaiQZe11UvrKpOsQuSciMbC7-orPGdnpybJd3raDeRo1TtrwrHCsfzPJs1vT6Kz73C8VEqHL9_4NMTfGYPNM9JBP4BC_zHwVcHtORUChQhYaCNyQHtEiAsDEdOwkVKna07zhBjKIOpOuXvFOK3kfxsx6fFvwEAAP__zCKKww) to multiple locations across the state to “ensure peace & order” where demonstrations against President Trump and his policies are planned for Saturday. “ _Peaceful protest is legal. Harming a person or property is illegal & will lead to arrest. [Texas National Guard] will use every tool & strategy to help law enforcement maintain order,_” Abbott [posted on social media](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1ygzAQQOHTiM6e1aIfXKhIQ-e0KZkFrUAzMvLA2sa3zzhXSPuKr3g_1-FKueR1_qYbBzlSHVZ-7YVFeBsi30t953WWhVeSXFcq84O2OCCgPYE7aRwi5fIeTBPDCPGiGw7am4tH5wGaJXj0k4sTeU8dAOroOBnyNnprW8emyeGDgdOoNegWzyZ1MBI5TinpiUEZ4JilbmdZWPigPZV3ffJ2nuqtKWERue-q_VLYK-yPT1XYzxvPNI5VZJBDYb8LyWNX2OtLi866zlrvTOe0tthsId5fuZS8O68MzDfK5U-X_z15BvwNAAD__3CidAE). Immigration enforcement operations in Los Angeles over the weekend sparked riots there and protests across the country in recent days, including several major cities in Texas. Four police officers were injured and over a dozen protesters arrested during an Austin protest on Monday. Around [1,800 “No Kings” protests](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOiN7IUAKF9eky7VXogXWsIqxkb0JyT39L_IKfzXNaDTf9-8-3JE9h-UvbmTl7eIQ6MieRCgNM-0-fjgsslJA4RjQL09M8wAaLkq3ysAwI_vP0JSzHfV8NSVZ0zXXDtpO63K1NRg0o6sv9YRouhFcM3W1I2joAjS1JdtzTLcGjNGmhqpxvR4RW3LOmYl00WiaWWKqZCWhN2bnP_FFqZriVnq7iuy5qP8UcCvgdhxHdSIcRI-zUMAtRPXgsGS1pyiURXlMy5lbHNnz_y-ZyhwmUpKe264kxoeKzvFECnRf96Yvk533g73n3HZFo5cN2X8fyO-8vSz8BAAA__92MIVK) are scheduled across the country for Saturday, when a military parade in Washington, D.C., will mark the U.S. Army’s 250th birthday. Abbott has [declined to disclose](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL0O2yAURp8GbzcCQrEzMHTxlq4drQtc20gYLHPz47evkqpP0PmTPp1zft-nO6acyvILN3L8nutU6NUyMdMxRdpzPVNZeKWCnGrBvDzwiJOW-gdIC0pPEVM-J9NF52W8qY6c6s2t17aXsludkXbocdDXaE1QGG3vjaLBGunDbNWtS-5zJq3SSkl11RczD9IjWprnWQWSwkiKietx4ZWY3tjmfNYnHZdQty67lXlv4vpT6FHoMfiGj8apfFahx4-O0GOuAbPQI3pfmSFSyKlQA67QVjwI1vqCDcsJ_0Thawp81Lo3CPWRI3iCv00oQirwhekOF_dXyjk12wsjlw1T_qLx_wV9Ov0nAAD__yA1jjQ) how many National Guard soldiers will be deployed.
## Fort Cavazos Renamed Fort Hood
Fort Cavazos in Killeen will once again be known as Fort Hood, as President Trump announced Tuesday that he would [restore the names](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuSnDAQhk8jMk21BCuYQIETsnXqkOpBLVBZD0rqWZbbu_AVNu3q__sffz6XTwwx5O03JrL87cuS6WyRmKkujo5YrpA33ikjh5Ixbm-sbtGgPyQYqfTiMMRrGTpnX-CeqiOrxuE5ajMCdLtFeBk_4TAZciN-gOkdTKY3z7GH17T6LtgbBkZppUD1-jH4CV6Ihrz3aiUQA5ALXOqDd2L6xubjVb6oPtaSumh35qOJ_pfQs9DzeZ6PFGJgrBeHRO3-Enq-awk9H5QZt5LlWvJWqd2321_oGYzQswKhZ67vdMhSHdUmK_G7ZslFluhumSdHFZlkDPkvOZkxUZO-VDlKrOmSLTDd3K5ad5whxtDMKAbYEob4PzT_bOovq_8FAAD__-HWlUE) of seven Army installations previously named after Confederate military leaders. The post’s new namesake is Distinguished Service Cross recipient [Col. Robert B. Hood](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAURb8Gd4zggY23cJHG3aZNaT3Mw0bBMGJexjt_HzmZP9jq6upIVzr31-fyiSmnsv3Egyb-inUpdD4yMVNbAt1zfaWy8U4FOdWCefuDLSygoJdqkBqWgCm_FtuFyavwoTuatLMfDganVLdPJhi7grdDPzjjNFlCsmM0ALofRwhdmq4xNWjQWmkDNxtH5REHijHqlZSwikLi2m68E9MXPmJ-1Se121qPLk878_0hzA8Bs4D5PM_b75UKPy8sYMbGac0kYL7MrnibCJiPlBNje8k3atVTY-nlXmuQ515lrI3_N0-pbLJRwYOCxMjUBMy9UtLFQCMSSAr9KC2aXnq3DhLX0UE0o3EeujaF-5lyTo_BCau2A1P-J8Dfu_05wd8AAAD__66olro), who served with the Army’s 12th Field Artillery during World War I. He was honored for activating a battery under heavy gunfire near Thiaucourt, France. [Established in 1942](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFygzAMANCvMVs4WaFABg9d2NK1IyewjH11rJxRQ_L3vfYX-gNveJ_X-Uopp7J90I2dPoPMhY89syrX2fM9yyuVTSMX0iSF8vZN1c8I-HaC_mRx9pTya-4a7xbwF9uws0N3GbAfAJroeLG0kiU_YBf6kbpxZA8QbAi42mVskvvFoLdoLdgztl0YYSHqOYRgVwbTAfukUluNrPykPeSXPLi2q9ya7KLqfTfnd4OTwek4jlb3SFJyKtxK3QxOkYpfRL4MTly0Jt4NTkGqnqKIb6rz9yPlnPZ-MB1sN0r5D9f_lTwc_gQAAP__RfN4Dw), Fort Hood was originally named after Gen. John Bell Hood, who led the Texas Brigade during the Civil War. Its name was changed in 2023 following federal legislation that barred U.S. military posts from bearing the names of Confederate soldiers. Texas native and Medal of Honor recipient Richard E. Cavazos was chosen as the installation’s namesake after Congress [overrode President Trump’s veto](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAQhU9jMpBtjBkCB5OQzSQbbIgMVYaS_INsb9N9-xWt1V5golcvqE9P3--v5cuSp7h_24CmPl1aIl7FY62YF8DTpxfFvR4YbaUUrd__2AyL5HJouW6FXMCSfy2qAbNymESDRoxqGqUeOW8Oo5X74ICgYJhgUGpatbDbh1gFH7jiriFzw7gWUgguetndD6u1Gp1zYkPOFEegmnJXD6z4tMX5V3pg7rYUGm-OWs_C-k8mZybn67o6QIexYLenB5PzN17lX7S_asqEd_3MlTaPTM72_9VLzVWvmJwhQbviTrG0FE6PAWOluLfRhju2FAKVQim2Ge-CEd5-bnKTDZwXeU9Fj0zxPVjy7631Z4YfRv4NAAD__5Tnkmw) of the legislation stripping the names of Confederate leaders from U.S. military posts in the final days of his first term.
## Lawmakers Aim to Boost, Fortify Power Grid
The Texas Legislature passed several bills aimed at boosting the state’s energy supply and ensuring the power grid’s resilience amid increasing demand and growing security threats. Senate Bill 6 authorizes ERCOT to [shut off power](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ8GOqO1j982hYu_obu0KdGC12BlwQg7x_H2EXmFTDvSjL7v8zk8MXLc5g9cyZV3SMNGZ2YqhY7B087pittcFtqwxLQhz994-EGB-idAC6kGj5Gvoa29G8F3siYnTdsZpQ1AvbgpaLAWA5nJaEKL49iCNmjVw3prQx3dPQZaKilBPlTTBgsjoqYQgpwIqhbIx5KOpixU6I058JVedDRTWmt2Syl7rh7_K9VXqj_Ps7lwSeluK9XfOJXqGc8Vv-jIYsecyYsxMmeRKeeYNjGmlIuQcEd3XbOUlevD-f2MzDFrU7Uwrxj597P8zdTLqZ8AAAD__8cLfxU) to facilities that use at least 75 megawatts of electricity during an emergency with a 24-hour notice. Developers of high-demand projects must also pay $100,000 for a study to determine the infrastructure needed to connect to the grid. Lawmakers also [allocated $5 billion](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdI7sxYFQuLiG7r_2SrTgNVhZbGQ7IXn7U_IKfzmj0ejT9-9n-sHAIa5_cSdbXz5Nkc7CVCvlydHB6R3iWjeKWEOKyOsDs5tAwVWqTmqYHAZ-T6ZxdlZu0A1Z3Zuhh65XqtnsYIzR19Y437adant_xRsA6Fs3-NYp1QT7OVOdBq2VbuFi_E3NiB157_VCShhFLtSUL3WjSi8snt_pSfmypL1hu9V6FNH-ETAKGAvGTy9gXBYB43cvGc8d75SLvAdmibEGmSnSiTOTnANzkS49PsGlM8oU5ZFOyvJgjFX6R3QhrgLGJlt3nIE5lK4XRq07Bv5y1N_Ze1r4HwAA__-0y4Xl) to the Texas Energy Fund for new power generation projects, including $1.8 billion earmarked for small-scale projects like battery backup systems. A new office was established to administer $350 million in funding for nuclear energy projects. [House Bill 5323](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO4zAMRU8jdwooxVZmChXbuJtttzQYiXKIkSVD5sbx7RdOsweYjngEif_fn6_pCzlzmX_jQl5eqU6F9i2TCLUp0prrwWWWBxUUrgXz_BdbnCzYQYPTxk4ROR9T30V_h_hpOvLm1n_erLsBdA8P0cF1cHeLJsZ-SAA4QBoGmxwM-HHv2J_PwBlrDJirvfTpA-6IjlJKJhCoHiiy1HaRBwm9cEv5qE9ql1CXLvuHyLqp6y9lR2XHfd8v3y8s51LZ8Wyj7Pg-02vNLBz-g4z7gt_UNh0aoZAOdVlYhEhL1aHWFrmcnAq1-dChlo3a861C46bnxlEnDHSOdecy60gLlqjs2DUf151z5s3dVA_zgpzfkeVnop_e_gsAAP__d02XnQ) establishes the Texas Energy Waste Advisory Committee, a collaboration of eight state agencies tasked with coordinating demand reduction programs. _Flying together with our sponsor_ **➤ Protect Yourself on the Road. **Accidents happen. But with a high-quality dash cam, you’ll always have the footage to back you up. With crystal clear video and easy set up, this dashcam can be a life saver for insurance claims. Whether it’s a fender bender or something more serious, having a dash camera on your side can make all the difference. clean_body: Gov. Greg Abbott announced late Tuesday he would deploy the National Guard to multiple locations across the state to “ensure peace & order” where demonstrations against President Trump and his policies are planned for Saturday. | | | | | | Thursday, June 12, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1939, Italian refugee conducted a "demonstration concert" at the Sunken Garden Theater in San Antonio. The concert's success led to the formation of the Symphony Society of San Antonio. Fort Hood is Fort Hood again, but it's as before it was Fort Cavazos. Find out why in our Top Stories. Check out these nine Amazon Prime perks you need to start using from today's sponsor, . Abilene 🌦️ 85/67° | Amarillo 🌦️ 88/60° | Austin ⛈️ 89/74° | Brownsville 🌦️ 96/82° | Corpus Christi 🌦️ 94/82° | DFW ⛈️ 79/70° | El Paso 🌤️ 104/75° | Houston ⛈️ 87/80° | Laredo 🌦️ 100/79° | Lubbock 🌩️ 89/62° | Midland 🌤️ 91/63° | San Antonio 🌧️ 91/74° | Tyler ⛈️ 80/71° | Waco 🌧️ 84/72° Don’t feel like reading the national edition of The Flyover? Tune in to The Flyover Podcast! New episodes drop daily—watch on YouTube or listen on Spotify and Apple Podcasts, all in under 15 minutes. | | Abbott to Deploy National Guard Gov. Greg Abbott announced late Tuesday he would to multiple locations across the state to “ensure peace & order” where demonstrations against President Trump and his policies are planned for Saturday. “ Peaceful protest is legal. Harming a person or property is illegal & will lead to arrest. [Texas National Guard] will use every tool & strategy to help law enforcement maintain order,” Abbott . Immigration enforcement operations in Los Angeles over the weekend sparked riots there and protests across the country in recent days, including several major cities in Texas. Four police officers were injured and over a dozen protesters arrested during an Austin protest on Monday. Around are scheduled across the country for Saturday, when a military parade in Washington, D.C., will mark the U.S. Army’s 250th birthday. Abbott has how many National Guard soldiers will be deployed. Fort Cavazos Renamed Fort Hood Fort Cavazos in Killeen will once again be known as Fort Hood, as President Trump announced Tuesday that he would of seven Army installations previously named after Confederate military leaders. The post’s new namesake is Distinguished Service Cross recipient , who served with the Army’s 12th Field Artillery during World War I. He was honored for activating a battery under heavy gunfire near Thiaucourt, France. , Fort Hood was originally named after Gen. John Bell Hood, who led the Texas Brigade during the Civil War. Its name was changed in 2023 following federal legislation that barred U.S. military posts from bearing the names of Confederate soldiers. Texas native and Medal of Honor recipient Richard E. Cavazos was chosen as the installation’s namesake after Congress of the legislation stripping the names of Confederate leaders from U.S. military posts in the final days of his first term. Lawmakers Aim to Boost, Fortify Power Grid The Texas Legislature passed several bills aimed at boosting the state’s energy supply and ensuring the power grid’s resilience amid increasing demand and growing security threats. Senate Bill 6 authorizes ERCOT to to facilities that use at least 75 megawatts of electricity during an emergency with a 24-hour notice. Developers of high-demand projects must also pay $100,000 for a study to determine the infrastructure needed to connect to the grid. Lawmakers also to the Texas Energy Fund for new power generation projects, including $1.8 billion earmarked for small-scale projects like battery backup systems. A new office was established to administer $350 million in funding for nuclear energy projects. establishes the Texas Energy Waste Advisory Committee, a collaboration of eight state agencies tasked with coordinating demand reduction programs. creates the Texas Grid Security Commission to address vulnerabilities to natural and man-made disasters. | Flying together with our sponsor Once upon a time, we had to make lists and physically go to stores when needed. Sometimes we’d have to go to several stores or even shopping malls for what we needed. Then one day, out of the heavens, . But if those reasons haven't been enough to entice you to join Prime, maybe some of will tempt you to sign up. | ➤ Houston: Three 18-year-old urban explorers were arrested for trespassing after breaking into the Astrodome and posting a video of their escapade. The dilapidated stadium has been closed to the public since 2009. () ➤ Dallas: Local ICE officials coordinated a June 3 deportation flight for 122 Chinese nationals previously detained at multiple sites throughout the country. According to a press release, some have been convicted of murder, rape, human smuggling, bribery, and narcotics trafficking. () ➤ Grand Prairie: A man detained after a chase on I-20 stole a police cruiser while handcuffed yesterday morning, leading authorities on another chase that ended when he crashed in Oak Cliff. () ➤ Amarillo: A groundbreaking ceremony was held Tuesday for the $159 million Panhandle State Hospital. The 75-bed, non-maximum-security psychiatric hospital is expected to open in fall 2027 and employ up to 400 people. () ➤ McKinney: A U.S. district court ruled last week that the city must pay nearly $60,000 to a woman whose home was destroyed by a SWAT team during a standoff with a fugitive in 2020. By Seamus Othot on Jun 12, 2025 06:43 am
Two law enforcement sources, who spoke with the Maine Wire on the condition of anonymity as they were not authorized to speak publicly about the incident, believe that multiple large institutions in Maine suffered from a ransomware-style cyberattack thought to originate from a foreign adversary. name: Eduardo =?UTF-8?Q?Ver=C3=A1stegui=2C?= Sound of Freedom
subject: The P. Diddy case is just the beginning…
body:
The shocking truth behind the headlines – and how you can help.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zo0fbjoo1lohdq0oe7itnnb6nd01rf6snjvsd1oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgm4oj2c1h2bs)
---
Dear Friend,The headlines are ablaze with the explosive allegations and legal battles surrounding Sean “P. Diddy” Combs – a high-profile case pulling back the curtain on a dark underworld: **sex trafficking happening within our own borders.** But make no mistake, Friend – what’s unfolding in courtrooms and tabloids right now is **just the tip of the iceberg.****This isn’t just about one celebrity.** **It’s about thousands of children, right here in the United States, being exploited in the shadows.**
---
[ Yes, I will give to save children](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqe4rof2ri135ar7nrp3a2g1cvm0spk41hnr3ng0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgm4oj2c1h2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3ejo11c95gi3p0f68vnr9htvs0re3ta0ujdtu80_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgm4oj2c1h2bs)
---
**The Alarming Reality:**
* An estimated **50,000 children are trafficked into sexual slavery every year in the United States.

**
* According to the National Human Trafficking Hotline, **nearly 11,500 cases of human trafficking** were reported in 2023 alone – and experts believe this is a _drastically underreported number_.

* Trafficking cases have been identified in **every single state** , from remote rural counties to affluent suburbs and major cities.

* The average age of a child first exploited through sex trafficking in the U.S. is **12 to 14 years old.**

And yes – it’s happening in places just like yours, Friend.
---
[ Yes, I will give to save children](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zubthk68onpilpr9lsntn2h9p730h6367m2f39ig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgm4oj2c1h2bs)
---
**We Must Act Now** My name is Eduardo Verástegui, producer of _Sound of Freedom_ , a film inspired by real-life rescue missions to free children from trafficking rings. But the film was just the beginning. Now, through the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** , we are committed to turning awareness into **action** – rescuing trafficked children, aiding law enforcement, and dismantling the networks of predators hiding in plain sight. Friend, today I’m urgently asking you to join this mission.Because every day we wait, **more children fall into the hands of traffickers.** Will you make a **life-saving, tax-deductible gift** of $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can give to help us rescue children and expose these criminal networks?
---
[ Yes, I will give to save children](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmpc84qsrrc98s8tntj2gjb0igpopcktof5p97oo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgm4oj2c1h2bs)
---
**This Is Happening Here** Here are just a few recent headlines:
* _Texas man sentenced to life for trafficking minors through social media platforms.

_
* _California couple arrested for operating a child sex trafficking ring out of a “modeling agency.”

_
* _15-year-old rescued in New York after being trafficked across state lines._

These are not stories from another country. These are **America’s children**. This is **our fight**. **The Time Is Now** Friend, you can be a voice for the voiceless. You can be a lifeline for the lost. Please help us shine a light in the darkest corners and bring these children home. Make your urgent, tax-deductible gift today. Let’s send the message loud and clear: **God’s children are not for sale.** With hope, **Eduardo Verástegui** _Producer, Sound of Freedom_ For the **Sound of Freedom Foundation**
---
[ Support Sound of Freedom](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2irldpjg2dms1t20g9rcr8l7nfe58hfkrkmpmd0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgm4oj2c1h2bs)
---
