name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 6/12/2025
body:
Colorado renters squeezed by costs, policy gridlock and population growth
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s8i75f3f535)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s7u73c98784)**
| | Hi friends,
As we count down to the **[Mountain Majesty Gala](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/sek3ebd02c0)** on June 21st, we want to extend our heartfelt gratitude to the incredible partners who are making it possible. From small businesses to bold coalitions, these sponsors are standing with Rocky Mountain Voice in support of liberty, community, and conservative values. Check out who’s backing the movement below—and be sure to support them in return. We'll be featuring them throughout the next week here and social! Stay tuned...
---
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s7kea344dc8)
Now let's dive in. Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s3j22cb1903), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s5rdbd5ef48) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/sfu6f4f770b)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Protests, policy clashes, and housing woes are driving Colorado’s headlines. Seventeen people were arrested in Denver during the [“ICE Out” protest](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s1gef2998aa), which saw graffiti, assaults, and blocked streets as demonstrators called for an end to federal immigration enforcement. “No Kings” protesters plan to [defy town officials](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s2r41958386) in Parker on Saturday despite safety concerns.
Governor Polis is under fire for [SB25-276](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s0jcabe4e0f), a new immigration law that limits cooperation with ICE and raises constitutional questions. Meanwhile, [soaring rent and scarce housing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s5jba903131) continue to squeeze Coloradans, as controversy brews over the state’s release of [sensitive ICE data](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s1j61e26966).
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** Chinese nationals were caught smuggling [crop-killing pathogens](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s8q3af7e318) into the U.S., part of what Gen. Jack Keane calls a broader infiltration. Meanwhile, Trump announced a [trade deal with China](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s4s80295323) securing rare earths and imposing 55% tariffs on imports.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Michael Hancock says Trump’s nuclear plan could [revive the grid](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/sfnc41727cf) and boost industry by cutting red tape and investing in small reactors. Greg Walcher questions the [ethics of “de-extinction”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/sdtbfef94d0) as scientists clone dire wolves. Robin Webb urges a “yes” vote on [Home Rule](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s7v4d6d4d08) to give Douglas County more local control.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, June 12, 2025.
– Team RMV
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Priced out, packed in: Colorado renters squeezed by costs, policy gridlock and population growth](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s5r2d292465)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s7g8c62466f)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s6md01c1912)
Colorado’s affordable housing crunch – especially in the rental sector – has been building for years. Reports from the Common Sense Institute and Bell Policy Center trace the tipping point to around 2015, when demand consistently began outpacing supply.
The last decade has seen rising home prices, stagnant wages and insufficient new construction which has made the situation worse due to recent immigration pressures and allegations of resource allocation issues.
Bell Policy Center noted a statewide rental rate increase from 30.9% in 2009 to 34.8% by 2022, with urban counties like Denver reaching 50.1%.
In just a year, Colorado slipped further down the affordability scale, now ranking 8th worst in the nation. For many renters, the numbers are personal – over half spend more than a third of their income on housing, and 13% are sacrificing half just to stay put. Behind those numbers is a staggering shortfall in available rental units. In the Denver metro, the deficit hit as high as 135,000 rentals in 2024.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s2m520b7c77)**
|
---
**DON'T MISS OUT ON THE MOUNTAIN MAJESTY GALA —LIMITED TICKETS AVAILABLE 🎟️ **
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s3tc960804f)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s1v2396ef5d)
|
---
**[Webb: A ‘yes’ vote for Home Rule is a vote for Douglas County’s future](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s1n4bee54e7)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s7vbebda71c)
* In a new op-ed by Douglas County GOP Chair Robin Webb, she dives into why she's supporting Home Rule for Douglas County. Voters will decide on June 24 whether to form a Home Rule Charter Commission, a move she says could grant the county more autonomy from state mandates by creating its own local constitution.
* If passed, Home Rule would allow Douglas County to tailor policies on land use, taxation, and public safety to its specific needs, joining Weld and Pitkin as one of only three standalone Home Rule counties in Colorado.
* She emphasizes that the process includes a transparent, voter-driven timeline with two elections, multiple public meetings, and the potential to boost local innovation, efficiency, and conservative governance.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/sak3ac4f7e7)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s8p9e854a2a)
|
---
**[Graffiti, assaults and street blockades: Denver ‘ICE Out’ protest leads to 17 arrests](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/sfl6cadce08)** [DENVER7](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s4uc66fe604)
* Seventeen protesters were arrested in Denver during the “ICE Out” demonstration, which included street blockades, graffiti, and assaults, including attacks on police officers.
* Charges ranged from obstruction and failure to obey orders to second-degree assault and assault of a peace officer.
* The protest aligned with nationwide unrest over federal immigration enforcement, following ICE raids that sparked outrage and backlash. More protests are expected this weekend.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/segfb3781c8)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Hancock: President Trump’s nuclear plan puts power—and America—back on the grid](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/sdgbe3e37a9)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s7p81f2a05c)****BY MICHAEL HANCOCK****| COMMENTARY | JUNE 11** _Politics doesn’t power cities—electricity does. And Trump just fired up the most significant energy move we’ve seen in decades. It isn’t about windmills or wishful thinking. It’s about fission. Steel. Jobs. It’s about restoring America’s backbone, one kilowatt at a time._
__
**[Released and reloaded: Montrose bond records show cracks feeding Colorado’s criminal underworld](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s5j9c640eb2)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/sdue3ed55b3)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | JUNE 10** _When a Montrose County woman was released on a $0 personal recognizance bond after skipping court in late 2023, it wasn’t her first time facing charges. It wouldn’t be her last either. Within nine months, she was arrested again – this time for second degree assault, harassment and criminal attempt. Her story is not an outlier. It is a warning._
__
**[Garbo: Sanctuary policies led to chaos—and now they’re blaming ICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s3h8491da71)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-Fw/s2p9073c9ff)****BY C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | JUNE 10** _The chaos unfolding in Los Angeles isn’t just disturbing, it’s the natural result of years of political cowardice and ideological extremism. The riots erupting in response to ICE’s lawful enforcement of deportation orders are not acts of civil disobedience._

clean_body: Colorado renters squeezed by costs, policy gridlock and population growth | | | | PRESENTED BY | | Hi friends, As we count down to the on June 21st, we want to extend our heartfelt gratitude to the incredible partners who are making it possible. From small businesses to bold coalitions, these sponsors are standing with Rocky Mountain Voice in support of liberty, community, and conservative values. Check out who’s backing the movement below—and be sure to support them in return. We'll be featuring them throughout the next week here and social! Stay tuned... Now let's dive in. Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast , or watch on or ! Here is a summary of today's top stories: 🏔️ Here in Colorado... Protests, policy clashes, and housing woes are driving Colorado’s headlines. Seventeen people were arrested in Denver during the , which saw graffiti, assaults, and blocked streets as demonstrators called for an end to federal immigration enforcement. “No Kings” protesters plan to in Parker on Saturday despite safety concerns. Governor Polis is under fire for , a new immigration law that limits cooperation with ICE and raises constitutional questions. Meanwhile, continue to squeeze Coloradans, as controversy brews over the state’s release of . 🇺🇸 On the National Stage... Chinese nationals were caught smuggling into the U.S., part of what Gen. Jack Keane calls a broader infiltration. Meanwhile, Trump announced a securing rare earths and imposing 55% tariffs on imports. 🗣️ Commentary Spotlight... Michael Hancock says Trump’s nuclear plan could and boost industry by cutting red tape and investing in small reactors. Greg Walcher questions the as scientists clone dire wolves. Robin Webb urges a “yes” vote on to give Douglas County more local control. This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, June 12, 2025. – Team RMV | TODAY'S TOP STORIES BY SHAINA COLE, Colorado’s affordable housing crunch – especially in the rental sector – has been building for years. Reports from the Common Sense Institute and Bell Policy Center trace the tipping point to around 2015, when demand consistently began outpacing supply. The last decade has seen rising home prices, stagnant wages and insufficient new construction which has made the situation worse due to recent immigration pressures and allegations of resource allocation issues. Bell Policy Center noted a statewide rental rate increase from 30.9% in 2009 to 34.8% by 2022, with urban counties like Denver reaching 50.1%. In just a year, Colorado slipped further down the affordability scale, now ranking 8th worst in the nation. For many renters, the numbers are personal – over half spend more than a third of their income on housing, and 13% are sacrificing half just to stay put. Behind those numbers is a staggering shortfall in available rental units. In the Denver metro, the deficit hit as high as 135,000 rentals in 2024. | DON'T MISS OUT ON THE MOUNTAIN MAJESTY GALA —LIMITED TICKETS AVAILABLE 🎟️ | In a new op-ed by Douglas County GOP Chair Robin Webb, she dives into why she's supporting Home Rule for Douglas County. Voters will decide on June 24 whether to form a Home Rule Charter Commission, a move she says could grant the county more autonomy from state mandates by creating its own local constitution. If passed, Home Rule would allow Douglas County to tailor policies on land use, taxation, and public safety to its specific needs, joining Weld and Pitkin as one of only three standalone Home Rule counties in Colorado. She emphasizes that the process includes a transparent, voter-driven timeline with two elections, multiple public meetings, and the potential to boost local innovation, efficiency, and conservative governance. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Seventeen protesters were arrested in Denver during the “ICE Out” demonstration, which included street blockades, graffiti, and assaults, including attacks on police officers. Charges ranged from obstruction and failure to obey orders to second-degree assault and assault of a peace officer. The protest aligned with nationwide unrest over federal immigration enforcement, following ICE raids that sparked outrage and backlash. More protests are expected this weekend. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ MICHAEL HANCOCK| COMMENTARY | JUNE 11 Politics doesn’t power cities—electricity does. And Trump just fired up the most significant energy move we’ve seen in decades. It isn’t about windmills or wishful thinking. It’s about fission. Steel. Jobs. It’s about restoring America’s backbone, one kilowatt at a time. JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | JUNE 10 When a Montrose County woman was released on a $0 personal recognizance bond after skipping court in late 2023, it wasn’t her first time facing charges. It wouldn’t be her last either. Within nine months, she was arrested again – this time for second degree assault, harassment and criminal attempt. Her story is not an outlier. It is a warning. C. J. GARBO | COMMENTARY | JUNE 10 The chaos unfolding in Los Angeles isn’t just disturbing, it’s the natural result of years of political cowardice and ideological extremism. The riots erupting in response to ICE’s lawful enforcement of deportation orders are not acts of civil disobedience. Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🫁 DID YOU KNOW? Your circulatory system stretches over 60,000 miles —long enough to circle the Earth nearly 2.5 times. | Who Are We Endorsing for the House of Delegates?
---
| Friends-
There are just FIVE DAYS until Virginia's primary election, and with federal job cuts, tariffs, and rising unemployment rates, it's more important than ever to vote for an affordable Virginia. That's why we're proud to endorse these candidates for the Virginia House of Delegates. Each has shown their commitment to fighting for affordability and a more fair Virginia.
Perhaps you've already voted (good for you, early voters!) or have your election day plan ready to go, but still want to do more for an affordable Virginia. Why not sign up to volunteer?

name: Team Ossoff
subject: Only if you can afford it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter, [**can you PLEASE give $5 to Jon Ossoff’s campaign today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=email-250612-1-8a&t=1&akid=460%2E5691347%2EPc467T)
We know it can seem like a lot, asking for you to chip in when the election isn’t until next year.
But here’s the truth: _Republicans are already spending millions of dollars coming after Jon, so we can’t afford to sit back and wait. We have to respond. What we are able to accomplish in these early days will set the tone for the entire race._
Trump and national Republicans have made it clear that Jon is their #1 target, and they will likely spend _hundreds of millions_ of dollars attacking him throughout this campaign.
So we do have to ask for your support. But it's important to Jon, especially right now, that people are contributing only if they are in a position to do so, and only what they can afford.
If it's $25, great. If it's $1, that will help too and means a lot because it shows you're in the fight. And if you can't donate today, that's fine too. But with right-wing attacks already coming Jon’s way, we have to fight back:
[**Can Jon count on you to make a contribution — $5, $50 or whatever you can afford — to his campaign today? We will put it to work fighting back against MAGA extremists and protecting this seat.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=email-250612-1-8a&t=2&akid=460%2E5691347%2EPc467T)

If it's $25, great. If it's $1, that will help too and means a lot because it shows you're in the fight. And if you can't donate today, that's fine too. But with right-wing attacks already coming Jon’s way, we have to fight back: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Anything you can give would mean a lot to our campaign. Thank you, Jon Ossoff for Senate Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

Peter,
I’m in Washington, D.C. this morning to testify before the Republican-controlled House Oversight Committee about so-called “sanctuary policies” that my state doesn’t even have.
**Let’s call this what it is: a political stunt designed to score cheap points by scapegoating immigrants and spreading fear. **
Trump and his MAGA allies want to demonize our neighbors, rip our communities apart, and distract us from their real agenda—helping their billionaire donors and big corporations get rich off the backs of working folks.
I’m not about to let this Republican BS go unchecked. I’ve held them accountable since day one, and I won’t stop just because they’ve called me to testify.

Let’s call this what it is: a political stunt designed to score cheap points by scapegoating immigrants and spreading fear. Trump and his MAGA allies want to demonize our neighbors, rip our communities apart, and distract us from their real agenda—helping their billionaire donors and big corporations get rich off the backs of working folks. I’m not about to let this Republican BS go unchecked. I’ve held them accountable since day one, and I won’t stop just because they’ve called me to testify. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for having my back, Tim Walz ********=******

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: [OFFICIAL INVITATION FOR YOU]
body:
Become a founding member of my new committee to SAVE New York.
| _**OFFICIAL INVITATION FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK**_
---
Friend,
---
Ever since she assumed the Governor’s office, Kathy Hochul has run New York into the ground.
---
Her incompetence, corruption, and radical, failed Far Left policies have brought our great state to the brink of collapse as businesses and families flee.
---
New Yorkers are sick and tired of her failed socialist agenda!
---
**Now, the latest independent polling definitively shows that Hochul is more vulnerable than any Democrat governor of New York in recent memory.**
---
**_Elise Stefanik in dead heat with Kathy Hochul in potential governor race, as Trump edges Democrat in favorability: poll_** “The incumbent governor up for reelection next year would have the support of 43% of New Yorkers with 42% for Stefanik — as about 15% of the electorate is still undecided” [Source: _New York Post_]
---
But Hochul isn’t going to leave the governor’s mansion without a fight.
---
Democrat mega-donors are already pouring MILLIONS into her war chest to help her **BUY** reelection despite her abysmal approval rating!
---
If we’re going to SAVE New York, we need to start leveling the playing field right now, Friend.
---

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: How often do you think about the Roman Republic?
body:
Limited Time: Free Color Map of Rome

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ca68191c0204ab1b470cf32b018044f&_e=6iubOqY48BBh3lOGXH-4nd0R9FSeBNiUbvyarmn6mPSsN255SaNScjVQugbOLdnVh1QP35WFL6b-QrRWY2XW1tyjn9v1F16v5D2sjGO1XQeLqAtKtSn5KqXcJSJJ5fvdIOBHN1lbberoULLxkN96TLWCIijwnu2hZHXVD83gqohtNwnoWSovzqgcQ5NpYQI4aPNfkqFavFv4ITIXuXYfmbRUGSNsO2aLa7HX3_yIdVl4DTEDrpJeaRnKpDQVmQdsdw-KmAa_8Kht6KZQcjDXAcac_0BXQBZMTKJDzscNZ_0N4U2FsM4b8rDx2kuqJazYvfyAlMSOBd-wFq5OIV39cOPSX5YtM8Oz_OUnXUcNQZ5RrMHZuHv2y8ypTryk7FH0Mon-PnKMGnqUbh6ELawMWg%3D%3D)
---
| |
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ca68191c0204ab1b470cf32b018044f&_e=6iubOqY48BBh3lOGXH-4nd0R9FSeBNiUbvyarmn6mPSsN255SaNScjVQugbOLdnVh1QP35WFL6b-QrRWY2XW1tyjn9v1F16v5D2sjGO1XQeLqAtKtSn5KqXcJSJJ5fvdIOBHN1lbberoULLxkN96TLWCIijwnu2hZHXVD83gqohtNwnoWSovzqgcQ5NpYQI4aPNfkqFavFv4ITIXuXYfmbRUGSNsO2aLa7HX3_yIdVl4DTEDrpJeaRnKpDQVmQds9zdqUeBxlNQmqWG2c7awS3XkSk0OiwCpCjQcmKdGbEbQkwffpBzqKQ4V6TWlaJxlESg0XYGPUuLBrlORjSeqjHslCVqoNSizsg3WXaYMWuSpTHkv6OuyBJb8kicDpe_uSRseYRcHpNfi9ZdQ_p3iSw%3D%3D) Peter,

The history of the Roman Republic is a captivating tale of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success. One that still impacts our world today.

To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic."**

**You can now receive your own DVD box set of "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**

And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a **free color map** of the Roman world at the end of the Republic. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures.
Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today:

[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=8ca68191c0204ab1b470cf32b018044f&_e=6iubOqY48BBh3lOGXH-4nd0R9FSeBNiUbvyarmn6mPSsN255SaNScjVQugbOLdnVh1QP35WFL6b-QrRWY2XW1tyjn9v1F16v5D2sjGO1XQeLqAtKtSn5KqXcJSJJ5fvdIOBHN1lbberoULLxkN96TLWCIijwnu2hZHXVD83gqohtNwnoWSovzqgcQ5NpYQI4aPNfkqFavFv4ITIXuXYfmbRUGSNsO2aLa7HX3_yIdVl4DTEDrpJeaRnKpDQVmQdsmxllsm817Zn0km6dsT-0u041HKBwa4fOZiOSzSeafp9qO16-cAOxXMsAk8dcTQAJ1DKVn_GRy6fRJMV8IBAtk5W-tEV0bf_7wAqy1dzkglqm4mLqPlz2Rab7Iq7sufiSI-h4rKzAcmCqecwKW5xcbA%3D%3D)

By studying ancient Rome, you'll discover the conditions necessary to preserve a republic, and, conversely, how a republic may lose its way.

That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"** and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD.

Thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA
---

subject: New York has become a third-world hellscape!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN
body:
The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.

| | |
---
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc36krfgl5hr9d6dmsuag1a9bf5t38f67st9245g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgmeor2c9h2bs)
---
| | My Dear Friend, [**My name is Maud Maron, and I need your help to defeat Alvin Bragg and replace him as the District Attorney of Manhattan.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6lv2jpblnq9llk7qm0agqm6gc8micl8pcpo315g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgmeor2c9h2bs) You know Alvin... The George Soros elected, Pro-Criminal, Trump-Deranged DEI hire that has turned my beloved New York City into a third-world Hellscape.If you think that sounds too dramatic, just look at a few examples of what Alvin Bragg’s “weak-on-crime,” Trump-obsessed tenure has brought to the law-abiding citizens of New York:
---
* An innocent woman set on fire by a Guatemalan Illegal Alien who had already been deported at least once before...
* A mob of Illegal criminals caught on video assaulting two New York City Law Enforcement officers outside a “Migrant Shelter,” all **released without bail by Alvin Bragg!**

---
Instead of working for the last 4 years to make the Citizens of New York safe and secure, Alvin has been on a singular, sick, twisted mission and one mission only -- TAKE DOWN DONALD TRUMP.That’s what he ran on...Those were his marching orders from George Soros and his Radical donors...And those are orders he dutifully followed -- at the expense of not only those of us who live in New York, but every single American that deserved to vote in a fair election not tainted by a ridiculous set of trumped-up charges made up out of thin air.New Yorkers deserve better...Americans deserve better.That’s why -- whether you live right here in Manhattan, a thousand miles away in Des Moines, Iowa, or anywhere else in our great country -- I hope you’ll help me defeat Alvin Bragg. **[Would you consider helping my campaign with a one-time $28 contribution today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqbtm2dl210iv6n5gm8uv1vqk112soddvkatq9ng_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgmeor2c9h2bs)** I could really use your help.Alvin Bragg has millions of dollars pouring into his campaign by the same Radicals who put him there the first time around...
---
* George Soros
* Hollywood Celebrities
* Elites right here in New York and Hollywood
* The deep pockets of the Democrat election machine

---
I don’t have any of that on my side -- but I hope I’ve got YOU on my side.To have any chance of beating the Democrat machine funding Alvin Bragg’s run for re-election, I need a nationwide army of Americans to rally by my side...A nationwide army of Americans who understand how toxic it is having a Radical like Alvin Bragg in charge of the criminal justice system of one of our largest cities...Who know how close Alvin Bragg came to knocking Donald Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election and what that would have done to our country... Who watched in disgust as Alvin Bragg conjured up a 34-count felony conviction against a man whose only real crime was trying to Make America Great Again!This is our chance to send a clear message not only to the people of New York -- but the nation -- that these Radicals put into place by George Soros to do his bidding are not invincible...That they CAN be defeated! Alvin Bragg is the perfect example of why I left the Democrat party.I think it all started when my 11-year-old got COVID... We were told to mask in the house and give my son meals in his room for 10 days. Instead, we cuddled up & watched TV together -- unmasked in the living room and ate our meals as a family at the dinner table. That was a watershed moment for me.What were we doing?When did the United States of America turn into a place where the Government told us how to live?When I dared to suggest that it may not be the best idea for biological boys to participate in girls’ sports, I was all but run out of town on a rail... Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. **[That’s why I’m asking good folks like you to help me.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za5imq0vqv9j4m1omfi19skcm05pmpe452fklj38_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgmeor2c9h2bs)** It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. **[So if you think you could spare a larger gift -- of $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more, a few of those would really help right now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7lq9095kbf2dcknb7gu907qkiakk03m028n6i7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgmeor2c9h2bs)** We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You!
---
---
**Maud Maron**

P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better...

Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan?**[If so, please rush a one-time gift of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500 or even $1,000 or more -- I could really use your help!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zd5ebse70330stm1ikv8984pvb09ccrgalh7trdg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stgmeor2c9h2bs)**
---
|
---

Then I dared suggest that the complete failure of our school system might be due to something other than racism, I -- after a lifetime of considering myself a liberal Democrat -- was labeled a “Right Wing Extremist” by the New York Times!The blinders came off -- suddenly, I realized that if simply acknowledging the truth, calling out corruption and challenging the long-held beliefs of the Democrat machine disqualified me from being a Democrat.The truth will set you free -- and it’s an honor to represent you on the “Freedom Side” of the wall.I’ve been in their camp.As a former Democrat and as a mom raising four kids in Manhattan. I know how much they are getting wrong. And how bad it is for our children. It’s going to take all of us to take down Alvin Bragg -- but this has been a season of political miracles!I humbly ask for your help today. I hope you’ll find it in your heart to send a one-time $28 contribution to help me pull off one more political miracle......and send Alvin Bragg back to obscurity where he belongs.He’s bad for New York...He’s bad for America...And he needs to go.One last favor...I know not everybody is going to be able to give that I write to today. We need a good, strong launch -- and without a few of those larger gifts, we’ll already be behind.Please just send what you can, My Friend.Just reading my email today is a tremendous favor, and I really appreciate it.Thank you, Wish Me Luck, and God Bless You! Maud Maron P.S. I guess Alvin Bragg has just been too darn busy to concentrate on the wave of crime and violence washing over New York...While he has spent the last 4 years prosecuting and persecuting President Trump, New York has become a third-world hellscape!New York deserves better...Our Country deserves better... Will you help me take the place of Alvin Bragg by supporting my campaign to become the District Attorney of Manhattan? | | | PAID FOR BY MAUD FOR MANHATTAN P.O. Box 274New York, NY 10013-0274 Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

Hey,
We made a great decision in sending the National Guard to deal with the violent, instigated riots in California. If we had not done so, Los Angeles would have been completely obliterated.
The very incompetent “Governor,” Gavin Newscum, and “Mayor,” Karen Bass, should be saying,**_“THANK YOU, PRESIDENT TRUMP, YOU ARE SO WONDERFUL. WE WOULD BE NOTHING WITHOUT YOU, SIR.”_**
Instead, they choose to lie to the People of California and America by saying that we weren’t needed, and that these are “peaceful protests.” Just one look at the pictures and videos of the Violence and Destruction tells you all you have to know.

**Let me say this loud and clear: we will always do what is needed to keep our Citizens SAFE, so we can, together, MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
America needs LAW AND ORDER. You want it. You voted for it. I will deliver!
**_[If you support me on this mission to KEEP AMERICA SAFE, please chip in what you can and tell me right here right now that you STAND WITH DONALD TRUMP!>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_**
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
We can’t let the Radical Lunatics win.
They want nothing more than OPEN BORDERS for everyone. Criminal after criminal will be unleashed on American soil if Democrats get their way.
First, this lawsuit. Next, they could **IMPEACH TRUMP.**
Well, I’ve got news for them: WE WILL NEVER SURRENDER!
**_[You’ve always stood by me. Please, at this very moment, I really do need you right now. Declare that you STAND WITH DONALD TRUMP to PROTECT AMERICA!>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)_**
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
May God Bless you,

Donald J. Trump
President of the United States

# [Trump is an Authoritarian?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=165784702&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1Nzg0NzAyLCJpYXQiOjE3NDk3MzQxNzIsImV4cCI6MTc1MjMyNjE3MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.SCCd8wRgazhKzL3ybqafFtjlximhomt-1f_HMhyxFrU)

June 12, 2025
It is finally dawning of Democrats, liberals and our increasingly effete corporate media hacks that Donald Trump is our President and that should he somehow be removed from the Office, he will be replaced by the like-minded J.D. Vance, at least until 2028 and probably longer.

Rather than quietly reformulate their strategy, raise money and try to win in 2026 and beyond, the Democratic strategy is violent protests and lately, multiple protests on June 14 entitled "No Kings Day" in which our corporate media in cahoots with the Democratic Party is organizing further protests against President Trump's parade celebrating of Flag Day and coincidentally his birthday, also on June 14. [Time magazine published ](https://substack.com/redirect/bc8b35d4-e6e3-4050-8f62-b60182ffa999?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)the schedule of these protests and the New York Times is practically offering its readers free Uber rides to increase attendance.

The narrative being propagated is that President Trump is a tyrant behaving like a king. The goal is to create so much anarchy that the average person gets disgusted and blames President Trump, thus making it impossible for him to govern.

I was going to write a response to this, but I was eclipsed by Connecticut Republican State Senator Rob Sampson, whose comments I repeat unedited below:
Good. I'm glad to see them finally opposing unchecked power. But they're looking in the wrong direction.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5fb799e2-721a-41a4-aa56-d8630ded049c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Connecticut Republican State Senator Rob Sampson

The real authoritarianism in America today isn't coming from kings, or Republicans. It's coming from the modern Democrat Party--and their allies in blue-state governments like Connecticut.
Let's talk about what authoritarianism actually looks like:
Forced business closures--while big box stores and liquor outlets stayed open.
Churches shuttered by executive order, while casinos stayed lit.
Stay-at-home orders and travel bans that treated law-abiding citizens like criminals.
Mask mandates and vaccine requirements for children--threatening parents with school exclusion if they didn't comply.
Workers fired for declining a shot. Students banned from class.
Censorship of political and scientific dissent--with the federal government colluding with
Facebook to silence anything they called "misinformation."
Cancel culture targeting people who dared to disagree with the narrative.
Speech codes and DEI-driven policies that discriminate based on race and ideology.
Efforts to criminalize opinion--misgender someone and you might be punished.
"Misinformation czars" deciding what truths you're allowed to say out loud.
Gun bans, magazine limits, and lawsuits designed to bankrupt lawful manufacturers.
Illegal immigrants prioritized over citizens for housing, benefits, and legal protection.
And a bloated, top-down bureaucracy that passes rules without votes and treats every citizen as guilty until proven innocent.
This isn't freedom. This is the quiet rise of soft tyranny--and in places like Connecticut, it's already law.
Meanwhile, Republicans--especially conservatives like me--have spent years standing up for free speech, medical freedom, religious liberty, the right to defend yourself, and the right to live without government breathing down your neck.
We are the real civil libertarians. We always have been. So let's be honest: Accusing Republicans of authoritarianism is like accusing firefighters of arson. It's absurd. It's dishonest. And it's exactly backward.
To the "No Kings" crowd: if you truly believe in freedom, then join me in standing up to the real authoritarians--the ones writing mandates, silencing dissent, and ruling by decree. Let's end the hypocrisy. Let's end the overreach. Let's end the rule of kings--in every form.
Thank you Senator Samspon.
Contact Dr. Bentivegna at [jfbentivegna@gmail.com](https://substack.com/redirect/a0a84fc9-5ab5-4150-bee9-51731a50c876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

The narrative being propagated is that President Trump is a tyrant behaving like a king. The goal is to create so much anarchy that the average person gets disgusted and blames President Trump, thus making it impossible for him to govern. I was going to write a response to this, but I was eclipsed by Connecticut Republican State Senator Rob Sampson, whose comments I repeat unedited below: Good. I'm glad to see them finally opposing unchecked power. But they're looking in the wrong direction. | | ---|---|--- Connecticut Republican State Senator Rob Sampson The real authoritarianism in America today isn't coming from kings, or Republicans. It's coming from the modern Democrat Party--and their allies in blue-state governments like Connecticut. Let's talk about what authoritarianism actually looks like: Forced business closures--while big box stores and liquor outlets stayed open. Churches shuttered by executive order, while casinos stayed lit. Stay-at-home orders and travel bans that treated law-abiding citizens like criminals. Mask mandates and vaccine requirements for children--threatening parents with school exclusion if they didn't comply. Workers fired for declining a shot. Students banned from class. Censorship of political and scientific dissent--with the federal government colluding with Facebook to silence anything they called "misinformation." Cancel culture targeting people who dared to disagree with the narrative. Speech codes and DEI-driven policies that discriminate based on race and ideology. Efforts to criminalize opinion--misgender someone and you might be punished. "Misinformation czars" deciding what truths you're allowed to say out loud. Gun bans, magazine limits, and lawsuits designed to bankrupt lawful manufacturers. Illegal immigrants prioritized over citizens for housing, benefits, and legal protection. And a bloated, top-down bureaucracy that passes rules without votes and treats every citizen as guilty until proven innocent. This isn't freedom. This is the quiet rise of soft tyranny--and in places like Connecticut, it's already law. Meanwhile, Republicans--especially conservatives like me--have spent years standing up for free speech, medical freedom, religious liberty, the right to defend yourself, and the right to live without government breathing down your neck. We are the real civil libertarians. We always have been. So let's be honest: Accusing Republicans of authoritarianism is like accusing firefighters of arson. It's absurd. It's dishonest. And it's exactly backward. To the "No Kings" crowd: if you truly believe in freedom, then join me in standing up to the real authoritarians--the ones writing mandates, silencing dissent, and ruling by decree. Let's end the hypocrisy. Let's end the overreach. Let's end the rule of kings--in every form. Thank you Senator Samspon. Contact Dr. Bentivegna at Follow Dr. Bentivegna on Twitter(X) @joebentivegnamd Comment below put please no incendiary or foul language | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Joseph Bentivegna 541 Cromwell Avenue, Rocky Hill, CT 06067 ? ?

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: GOP Rep: Gaza should be “nuked”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
There are some genuinely dangerous people with big platforms in the Republican party right now.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1666%2E791427%2EmbN8MJ)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250612-1-nor&t=2&akid=1666%2E791427%2EmbN8MJ)
Friend — There are some genuinely dangerous people with big platforms in the Republican party right now.
New far-right GOP member of Congress Randy Fine recently went on Fox to spread the slanderous lie that I “endorse and support Muslim terror.” In the wake of so much recent political violence, it’s a reckless thing to say to millions of viewers that only helps incite more hate and violence.
But it doesn’t end there.
While reacting to the killing of two Israeli embassy staff in DC last month, Randy proudly suggested that **_Gaza needs to be attacked with nuclear weapons.**_ Really. Watch the video below if you don’t believe me.
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4432?t=3&akid=1666%2E791427%2EmbN8MJ)
**_That is a disgusting, genocidal statement that has no place in our politics.**_ I can’t imagine the cruelty that must be in one’s heart to say something like this.
And the truth is, if this remark was made about any other conflict or directed at any other people, Randy Fine would be censored by the House and face calls to resign from all sides. But when it’s directed at Palestinians, it barely makes the news.
Randy Fine has put a target on my back and the back of all Muslim people because he is a hateful racist, plain and simple. The fact that he holds national elected office is proof of the complete takeover of the Republican party by extremists and authoritarians. **I’m reaching out today to ask for your help in fighting back.**
My campaign has always stood strong throughout these relentless attacks because we believe in the power of solidarity. We stand together to take on the challenges of our day rather than dividing people up and spreading lies.
We have a lot of work ahead, but we have a responsibility to turn back this tide of hatred and lies and instead promote understanding, fairness, democracy, and justice for all.
**[Show that you have my back today by chipping in whatever you can to our campaign. Randy Fine and the entire far-right movement must be defeated before they tear down our democracy for good.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250612-1-nor&t=4&akid=1666%2E791427%2EmbN8MJ)

clean_body: There are some genuinely dangerous people with big platforms in the Republican party right now. Friend — There are some genuinely dangerous people with big platforms in the Republican party right now. New far-right GOP member of Congress Randy Fine recently went on Fox to spread the slanderous lie that I “endorse and support Muslim terror.” In the wake of so much recent political violence, it’s a reckless thing to say to millions of viewers that only helps incite more hate and violence. But it doesn’t end there. While reacting to the killing of two Israeli embassy staff in DC last month, Randy proudly suggested that Gaza needs to be attacked with nuclear weapons. Really. Watch the video below if you don’t believe me. That is a disgusting, genocidal statement that has no place in our politics. I can’t imagine the cruelty that must be in one’s heart to say something like this. And the truth is, if this remark was made about any other conflict or directed at any other people, Randy Fine would be censored by the House and face calls to resign from all sides. But when it’s directed at Palestinians, it barely makes the news. Randy Fine has put a target on my back and the back of all Muslim people because he is a hateful racist, plain and simple. The fact that he holds national elected office is proof of the complete takeover of the Republican party by extremists and authoritarians. I’m reaching out today to ask for your help in fighting back. My campaign has always stood strong throughout these relentless attacks because we believe in the power of solidarity. We stand together to take on the challenges of our day rather than dividing people up and spreading lies. We have a lot of work ahead, but we have a responsibility to turn back this tide of hatred and lies and instead promote understanding, fairness, democracy, and justice for all. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | I’ve been attacked from all sides of the Republican party — Donald Trump, JD Vance, Elon Musk, Fox News, and more. I’m not backing down. In solidarity, Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

| | | | Peter, You’ve probably seen the chaos coming out of Los Angeles. Violent mobs throwing fireworks, rocks and bricks at officers, torching cars, and shutting down major freeways all because they don’t like the fact President Trump is cracking down on illegal immigration, securing our border, and deporting criminals. To make matters worse, many of the rioters are noncitizens. **I think if you are a non-citizen, and you assault a law enforcement officer in this country, you should be deported – PERMANENTLY! ** That’s why I just introduced legislation that will make this a reality, and the Left is LIVID. They’re calling me racist. They’re accusing me of inciting hate. And they’re gearing up for a smear campaign like you wouldn’t believe. _But I’m not backing down. I’ve fought tougher enemies than this – and I’m going to keep fighting. “**Gov. Greg Abbott sends Texas National Guard to sites of planned immigration protests,** ” Texas Tribune's**Jessica Shuran Yu** and**Ayden Runnels** – “Gov. **Greg Abbott** announced late Tuesday that he would deploy Texas National Guard troops across the state in anticipation of protests against federal deportation raids.

In a [social media post](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.Tb7ejk-5QfVnOrZFvpt2rkTtnLviXhAVPKvXnqJ5PfG8vXrTMIBg3XX5JPsDjHfhvf-jWrOy9oZCy1KAqy_G6JNZU2SeE73vGhpjg2ypIDLzrM73JEGp08JTiKYqLhsCdbtPs-FClzy-TuKFtIjBvOVp2Wnb2hcOEBMbiFa-hAETadS8BdG7TYUFC4vDr29_HWsrZJMbjoco0kCKP_icuFhyCdmD7s1QL7vEcRHcsAugkkytW_Q9GpjjRWZ7-Kd6wHbqg7Pj6F6N_Ik52tFxHRTCyr13fTIeDjSREQhybf8MqKN-PgzemFsBrLmDA8qQWw_jshkW4EOR0u9l4seHbjrf2HT9fLC6sa1vtgZAKv3vFCE928IwWDUJOoZnkgMrbgo6BIDli_GJtZSS-GyIbr_j3eUWOBbnPKytlMXl9CpqTNnOcJtstJh56zpWSSi7Y0AtmXSMFE6sWO-ypNyCEoQwpkQSbN1aFTWMdREXUKo/4ha/D3MP2pNuSwCnEL2np0d4QQ/h14/h001.EzLaalxa9U3dWRzTsvUng8Ako6UQeFYUgpnPvotfKUI), Abbott said the troop deployments were intended to “ensure peace & order.”

“Peaceful protest is legal. Harming a person or property is illegal & will lead to arrest,” the governor said. He did not specify where the National Guard would be sent.

The news comes amid demonstrations against immigration raids that started in Los Angeles last week and have spread across the country, including to Texas. Over the weekend, President **Donald Trump** deployed 2,000 California National Guard troops to Los Angeles in response to protests there, doing so without permission from Gov. **Gavin Newsom** , a Democrat who appointed the state guard’s adjutant general. “Peaceful protests are part of the fabric of our nation, but Texas will not tolerate the lawlessness we have seen in Los Angeles,” Mahaleris said in a statement. “Anyone engaging in acts of violence or damaging property will be swiftly held accountable to the full extent of the law.”

San Antonio Police Chief **William McManus** confirmed that Abbott has sent National Guard members to the city, but there are no additional details yet.

There are “No Kings” protests planned for Saturday in over two dozen Texas cities, including Houston, Austin, Lubbock and Longview. The title of the events — organized by the progressive group Indivisible — is meant to signal opposition to what the organizers see as Trump’s authoritarian actions." Greg Abbott sends Texas National Guard to sites of planned immigration protests, ” Texas Tribune'sJessica Shuran Yu andAyden Runnels – “Gov. Greg Abbott announced late Tuesday that he would deploy Texas National Guard troops across the state in anticipation of protests against federal deportation raids. In a , Abbott said the troop deployments were intended to “ensure peace & order.” “Peaceful protest is legal. Harming a person or property is illegal & will lead to arrest,” the governor said. He did not specify where the National Guard would be sent. The news comes amid demonstrations against immigration raids that started in Los Angeles last week and have spread across the country, including to Texas. On Monday evening, gathered in downtown Austin for a march that ended in the arrest of thirteen people and police firing tear gas into a portion of the crowd that refused to leave. » Over the weekend, President Donald Trump deployed 2,000 California National Guard troops to Los Angeles in response to protests there, doing so without permission from Gov. Gavin Newsom , a Democrat who appointed the state guard’s adjutant general. Newsom responded by accusing Trump of choosing “theatrics over public safety” and blaming him for escalating the “chaos and violence” that unfolded. California officials on Monday the deployment, calling it an “unprecedented usurpation of state authority and resources.” Andrew Mahaleris , an Abbott spokesperson, confirmed Wednesday that Texas National Guard soldiers “are on standby in areas where mass demonstrations are planned in case they are needed.” » “Peaceful protests are part of the fabric of our nation, but Texas will not tolerate the lawlessness we have seen in Los Angeles,” Mahaleris said in a statement. “Anyone engaging in acts of violence or damaging property will be swiftly held accountable to the full extent of the law.” San Antonio Police Chief William McManus confirmed that Abbott has sent National Guard members to the city, but there are no additional details yet. There are “No Kings” protests planned for Saturday in over two dozen Texas cities, including Houston, Austin, Lubbock and Longview. The title of the events — organized by the progressive group Indivisible — is meant to signal opposition to what the organizers see as Trump’s authoritarian actions." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This could be the most important race happening in Missouri next year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
MO-02 is officially in play. Let’s take action.
#
Peter,
I know I’m sharing this news a little late, but I can’t wait to tell you about it anyway:
**Missouri’s second congressional district — currently represented by Republican Ann Wagner — will be a national target for Democrats in 2026.**
Heartland Patriots will do everything we can to take back MO-02 for real working people next year — and today, I’m personally asking you to join us. **[So before I tell you more about what this means, will you please split a donation of any amount between our grassroots organization and the MO-02 Democratic Nominee Fund right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89641?refcode=em20250612-9002&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9002%2E614464%2Eoi8T1J)**
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89641?refcode=em20250612-9002&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9002%2E614464%2Eoi8T1J)**
Back in April, the DCCC added MO-02 to its “Districts in Play” list. **This is the first time since 2020 that they have decided to target this district, which tells us that they believe we have a real shot to defeat Ann Wagner in 2026.**
Just look at the PPP polling of MO-02 from last month:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89641?refcode=em20250612-9002&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9002%2E614464%2Eoi8T1J)
A generic Democrat is leading Ann Wagner by one point AND her approvals are underwater. **Already, this race for Missouri’s second congressional district is gearing up to be one of the most important races happening in Missouri this cycle.**
So here’s why I need your help today, Peter: We need to make sure the candidate running against Ann Wagner — a notorious recipient of corporate PAC money — has all the resources they need to build a strong campaign and win in 2026.
**That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between Heartland Patriots and the MO-02 Democratic Nominee Fund today.** Nominee funds are set up before there’s an official nominee for most major Senate and House races across the country. Once a candidate wins their primary and secures the Democratic nomination, this money becomes immediately available to them during one of the most critical points of their campaign.
Since we’re still more than a year out from the 2026 election, donating to the MO-02 Democratic Nominee Fund is one of the best ways you can be sure your money goes directly to the candidate taking on Ann Wagner. _And you could make an even bigger impact by making that donation recurring — even just $5 per month adds up over time!_
**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you split a donation of $10, $25, $30, or whatever makes sense for you today so we can defeat Ann Wagner and take back Missouri’s second congressional district next year?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89641?refcode=em20250612-9002&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9002%2E614464%2Eoi8T1J)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

clean_body: MO-02 is officially in play. Let’s take action. Peter, I know I’m sharing this news a little late, but I can’t wait to tell you about it anyway: Missouri’s second congressional district — currently represented by Republican Ann Wagner — will be a national target for Democrats in 2026. Heartland Patriots will do everything we can to take back MO-02 for real working people next year — and today, I’m personally asking you to join us. Back in April, the DCCC added MO-02 to its “Districts in Play” list. This is the first time since 2020 that they have decided to target this district, which tells us that they believe we have a real shot to defeat Ann Wagner in 2026. Just look at the PPP polling of MO-02 from last month: A generic Democrat is leading Ann Wagner by one point AND her approvals are underwater. Already, this race for Missouri’s second congressional district is gearing up to be one of the most important races happening in Missouri this cycle. So here’s why I need your help today, Peter: We need to make sure the candidate running against Ann Wagner — a notorious recipient of corporate PAC money — has all the resources they need to build a strong campaign and win in 2026. That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between Heartland Patriots and the MO-02 Democratic Nominee Fund today. Nominee funds are set up before there’s an official nominee for most major Senate and House races across the country. Once a candidate wins their primary and secures the Democratic nomination, this money becomes immediately available to them during one of the most critical points of their campaign. Since we’re still more than a year out from the 2026 election, donating to the MO-02 Democratic Nominee Fund is one of the best ways you can be sure your money goes directly to the candidate taking on Ann Wagner. And you could make an even bigger impact by making that donation recurring — even just $5 per month adds up over time! So what do you say, Peter? If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Since the election last year, we’ve seen major wins for pro-worker, pro-freedom candidates in red and purple states across the country. Next year, we’re making it happen in Missouri by defeating Ann Wagner and flipping MO-02. Thanks for helping us get it done, Peter. — Lucas | | Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Republican Congresswoman Harriet Hageman **[stood up to Democrat Rep. Eric Swalwell](https://substack.com/redirect/2bab6263-af56-4425-97b0-a9e8f73f390f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for attacking pro-life activists as "terrorists" during an unhinged rant.
She puts him in his place...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2bab6263-af56-4425-97b0-a9e8f73f390f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2bab6263-af56-4425-97b0-a9e8f73f390f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Swalwell hurled at insults at pro-life conservatives, calling them "terrorists" who "don't trust women, for opposing the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act, a federal law that makes it a crime to interfere with people accessing abortion clinics.
"The only people in America who are asking for this legislation to be appealed are terrorists," Swalwell claimed. "People who would choose to show up and terrorize women as they make a very personal, intimate decision that nobody else should be apart of. You don't trust women!"
Swalwell added, "It's not lost on me that on the other side of this debate is mostly old men, wealthy,... I don't see women on the other side, but they sure want to tell women what to do with their bodies. It's a sick obsession!!"
**[Hageman, who is a woman, patiently waited](https://substack.com/redirect/2bab6263-af56-4425-97b0-a9e8f73f390f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as Swalwell finished before exposing him for the fraud he is.
"I understand that Mr. Swalwell was waiting for me to come and speak on this bill so he could decide how to vote," Hageman quipped.
**[Swalwell rudely interrupted her,](https://substack.com/redirect/2bab6263-af56-4425-97b0-a9e8f73f390f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "I don't know who you are! Who are you?!" despite his passionate feminist speech just moments ago, nagging Republicans to "trust women."
Watch Hageman take a wrecking ball to Swalwell's argument in front of congress:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2bab6263-af56-4425-97b0-a9e8f73f390f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/d4e89a25-5015-4a5a-9167-c7015e4bdcc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Military discovery TERRIFIES Big Pharma
Everything in this video, while extremely controversial, is completely true.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d4e89a25-5015-4a5a-9167-c7015e4bdcc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

NO DRUGS needed...
...and success stories with complete memory restoration--even for Alzheimer's patients.
**[[WATCH THIS VIDEO before Big Pharma demands its removal.]](https://substack.com/redirect/d4e89a25-5015-4a5a-9167-c7015e4bdcc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d4e89a25-5015-4a5a-9167-c7015e4bdcc6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# NYPD not f-ing around with anti-ICE rioters, arrest 86 agitators
Police **[arrested 86 demonstrators](https://substack.com/redirect/3c26a56f-4028-45d3-a9df-97a2330c1967?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at a Lower Manhattan anti-ICE protest that turned violent in Foley Square Tuesday evening.
**[Video (The Post Millennial)](https://substack.com/redirect/97c578b7-5548-40b8-be41-92d0eca1ff34?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cc7c5142-214e-4ff4-98ef-1260ccf080f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Chaos Struck** \- The demonstration against the Trump administration's deportation efforts escalated into a riot around 5 p.m. when protesters began hurling bottles at police and throwing traffic cones into the street, with 34 facing serious charges including felony assault.
* **Many of those arrested come from wealthy, privileged backgrounds** \- Among those charged were Vega Gullette, a 19-year-old Sarah Lawrence student and daughter of actor Sean Gullette, and Rachel Schreiber, whose parents own a $3 million Hamptons home, suggesting these weren't desperate individuals but affluent activists.
* **Several arrestees are repeat protesters with histories of demonstration involvement** \- Robert Mills had previously been charged during an anti-Israel protest in Brooklyn, while Tabitha Howell was injured when a driver plowed into a Black Lives Matter protest in 2020, indicating some participants are likely professional activists.
* **NYC officials assured residents the city won't descend into Los Angeles-style chaos** \- NYPD Commissioner Jessica Tisch said the majority of 2,500 protesters were peaceful but "a smaller group of a few hundred" were "looking for trouble," while she and Mayor Eric Adams promised New York wouldn't require National Guard intervention like LA did.

* * *
# Republicans CRUSH Democrats in Congressional baseball game for 5th year in a row
Republicans defeated Democrats 13-2 in the annual Congressional Baseball Game on Wednesday, **[extending their winning streak to five consecutive years](https://substack.com/redirect/23ac9f9d-7c51-4919-b214-c9de49b03e19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** while raising $2.8 million for charity before more than 30,000 fans at Nationals Park in Washington D.C.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8d830846-0200-4caa-8d27-55e03aff8438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Rep. Greg Steube pitched a strong game despite his past serious injury** \- The Florida Republican, who was badly hurt in a ladder fall two years ago, pitched five innings and struck out seven Democrats, joking afterward that he would need an ice bath the next day.
* **Rep. August Pfluger won MVP honors for a spectacular diving catch** \- The Texas Republican made a unbelievable play that went viral on social media, diving to end the first inning after Democrats had loaded the bases, earning him the Most Valuable Player award.
* **The game was much calmer than last year and raised millions for charity** \- Unlike 2023's edition that saw anti-Israel protesters disrupt the national anthem and climate activists rush the field, this year's game proceeded smoothly while raising $2.8 million for dozens of local charities with over 30,000 tickets sold.

# OPINION | GOV. MIKE BRAUN: Make America Healthy Again is an Opportunity for Hoosier Farmers and Producers
---
| | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/nE3b8_a0DXA9h91c5IfTrhAHvQYB1wzq8pBhLKwX015HUXRIYPx3P3wSU6NnprKhIytCxqvDjcKFNFRkGG6jvskbjaYpNZIOez7qYup_rBqx1TanHnmkAjiIN_D84gvcjYw3uVYa9Lps-jAXPDas8ojnSFYgAX0ynddJlcwPDP7hGuekEg4B2kCmn6ciQ-NC4i2rwzxyQWpmB336SaF0lvd3V7Zw7AuGTcS23sH-LYVmSSkAChhfsc3enDC7hWxw5VtiCpnr7xkykSqJPBSzFxYs_Us_r6nA1p5xN3qi849qhBBSD1K1hlXyUMQ6_G8UWgPG4hYBk3Pdco9Xxr3wf6epl5gT6-Gn02ABlpcH4t0-w_xvNEFhG6VBNIe4nPQ5FlZfHeWQkKVzpX4XF_ywKzpB2JAXire_n5EaYGDooUCmsbqX865xEiZYLNupCd9WKwQnElydK2sbCe-edsx50UezSGTb/Lidt7LFqnBMKJhaufVFp5ojpBhCL2y4W/9)

Hoosier AG Today Governor Mike Braun June 3, 2025
https://www.hoosieragtoday.com/2025/06/03/governor-braun-commentary/ [Click Here To Read Full Story](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/Hzghy6Ug9KJ28xxrJz5g_zkUSJRJ9WsCt_LpMZJ6SYRT_0_AVGUzqQwEpbcYP806p1g7XNSwMb7dppjz28vu6MtefOv9DFwByt1lGx9AQ2XAk_xKYTNC_e98GxAs2y1iR1nKykfcSUf4Myz2Jj3dxJiwZuxxOZ0goH5HPv2uEbFc24OTj9WfXrm9G1wrzI8Ouu7xWyJVXQFs6ktHbZF_0LAPQr0d2ytFoyjHeIpAnv6JFeVUs_TBKKK18wHXjox2Kz_aWlqGEly7ClUMmvIgDpOESWn1eCRBMhIGNP2J1ECRCgCwR6WUigV4EAE8mMDrKQNg87nwa2dwax0q0hXNnlV7klKMlp77IN79ceZemq3v5Clk6fvHn9F_SenhtE6mDuCP2OV8ZlowmnAFzeGb2I6Q7p-Xr2EVwlC3s2DN2l6Q6wX2msnGHMPFAgAyUPbk2UdaO6vt6OWtGd2zaX70lXkxszyE/m-kiROM7t22Q8TeGTIRo9VMeK08KAmGr/9) As debates about the intersection of health and agriculture policy go on in D.C., I want to take a moment to share with Hoosier farmers what my Make Indiana Healthy Again initiatives mean for Indiana agriculture. Make Indiana Healthy Again creates fresh opportunities for farmers to diversify into new markets and empowers more Hoosiers to get involved in farming. My administration sees Hoosier agriculture as the key partner in this initiative. To me, Make Indiana Healthy Again is about expanding opportunities for Hoosier farmers to get their products to consumers – not telling them how to grow it. The steps we have taken to make our schools healthier are a good example of this approach. In addition to establishing the Governor’s Fitness Test and School Fitness Month to encourage physical activity in schools, we also started an initiative to encourage healthy, local food options. Indiana’s farm-to-school programs are connecting students with fresh, local food while supporting Hoosier farmers and teaching the next generation where their meals come from. Whether livestock, poultry, dairy, or produce, our farmers should have meaningful access to their local institutional buyers. It all goes hand in hand with our studies of the possible negative effects of artificial food dyes and our comprehensive study into diet-related chronic illness and preventions to help Hoosiers live longer, healthier lives. In fact, after I rolled out our initiative, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration also announced new efforts to replace certain artificial food dyes with natural alternatives. Across the board, we want to support Hoosier farms selling directly to consumers. Nearly 2,735 Indiana farms sell $45 million worth of food directly to consumers, yet many face regulatory and infrastructure barriers. Locally grown produce provides consumers with fresh and nutritious options that require shorter transportation and offer a local connection to farmers. That’s why our Make Indiana Healthy Again initiative included an executive order to increase awareness, availability, and access to Indiana’s local fruits, vegetables, meats and dairy products. The Indiana State Department of Agriculture was directed to start a comprehensive study on access to local foods and direct-to-consumer sales from Hoosier farmers. A major priority for my administration is identifying opportunities to increase direct-to-consumer sales from local farmers and identify—and remove—ways the state may be getting in the way. If you have experiences in this area you’d like to share, I want to hear about them. Our livestock, poultry, and dairy producers already engage in local and regional market chains, from your neighborhood grocery store to Hoosier-grown livestock feed that supports farms around the country. At the same time, homegrown agribusinesses like Corteva and Elanco have leveraged innovation and new technology to help local farmers do more with less. Our work is to grow these successes and build on them in other sectors. We’re already seeing results on the big parts of the Make Indiana Healthy Again agenda rolled out in April. Last week, USDA Secretary Brooke Rollins signed Indiana’s SNAP waiver enabling us to remove sugary drinks and candy from taxpayer-funded SNAP benefits. More SNAP dollars were spent on sugary drinks than on nutritious fruits and vegetables. Indiana agriculture will benefit as more of these dollars are spent on fresh produce rather than soda. Make Indiana Healthy Again will empower Hoosiers to lead healthier lives, provide transparent information to help make better health decisions, make it easier to access fresh local food from Indiana’s incredible farms, and tackle the problems in government programs like SNAP and Medicaid that contribute to making our communities less healthy. Hoosier agriculture is my biggest partner in this endeavor, and I’m proud to stand with Indiana farmers and producers to empower Hoosiers to live healthier, longer, better lives. [Click Here To Read Full Story](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/k-mDRzd2jXZPXx-ZjgB9m517vKx4IPu5FSm8KI1w5EgK4DCV8pUIv3WhMdE4In8gJMvZwLlLVBkxHEAIhWsI5D_vX-mcbxKB02TXjmpvVpdikx5aJOLIE5H-7i4Ps5vS_j2JHRbi9rYXn0puegjMEo0DX1pTJfv6qTk_FQGghGyPo7D3p2IO45i0NpaqjQUQYDhIwPzygFaDZrV9VbN_jMiICIWrcK_n1sNB19dkpDcr1uskO_CWuLqhxtn0yj7w8ed0v2Ba1mZZuodDMEpnxWo0uqjmaNHyCiFTHR9pXEPd3R2LnZ6jEKh-h26v0m9Jboq6D5pzDXttpKL68cQP8idJjGaGsQbYInOkJS13VtkU3-_3zLUTn8fhIulhgiIypo2L2xED2fJ3UhCeTQzq9LFkIWYKAQvs6QGklp3zmuS_jOHuKdFFkwEgdRm00pnu5nI77xJe-Pr8LR7fZALxRkRm92vD/GK2e3DMsTUTPPM3kc8Q7_HwR2fFvBYvn/9)
