To me, Make Indiana Healthy Again is about expanding opportunities for Hoosier farmers to get their products to consumers – not telling them how to grow it. The steps we have taken to make our schools healthier are a good example of this approach. In addition to establishing the Governor’s Fitness Test and School Fitness Month to encourage physical activity in schools, we also started an initiative to encourage healthy, local food options. Indiana’s farm-to-school programs are connecting students with fresh, local food while supporting Hoosier farmers and teaching the next generation where their meals come from. Whether livestock, poultry, dairy, or produce, our farmers should have meaningful access to their local institutional buyers. It all goes hand in hand with our studies of the possible negative effects of artificial food dyes and our comprehensive study into diet-related chronic illness and preventions to help Hoosiers live longer, healthier lives. In fact, after I rolled out our initiative, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration also announced new efforts to replace certain artificial food dyes with natural alternatives. Across the board, we want to support Hoosier farms selling directly to consumers. Nearly 2,735 Indiana farms sell $45 million worth of food directly to consumers, yet many face regulatory and infrastructure barriers. Locally grown produce provides consumers with fresh and nutritious options that require shorter transportation and offer a local connection to farmers. That’s why our Make Indiana Healthy Again initiative included an executive order to increase awareness, availability, and access to Indiana’s local fruits, vegetables, meats and dairy products. The Indiana State Department of Agriculture was directed to start a comprehensive study on access to local foods and direct-to-consumer sales from Hoosier farmers. A major priority for my administration is identifying opportunities to increase direct-to-consumer sales from local farmers and identify—and remove—ways the state may be getting in the way. If you have experiences in this area you’d like to share, I want to hear about them. Our livestock, poultry, and dairy producers already engage in local and regional market chains, from your neighborhood grocery store to Hoosier-grown livestock feed that supports farms around the country. At the same time, homegrown agribusinesses like Corteva and Elanco have leveraged innovation and new technology to help local farmers do more with less. Our work is to grow these successes and build on them in other sectors. We’re already seeing results on the big parts of the Make Indiana Healthy Again agenda rolled out in April. Last week, USDA Secretary Brooke Rollins signed Indiana’s SNAP waiver enabling us to remove sugary drinks and candy from taxpayer-funded SNAP benefits. More SNAP dollars were spent on sugary drinks than on nutritious fruits and vegetables. Indiana agriculture will benefit as more of these dollars are spent on fresh produce rather than soda. Make Indiana Healthy Again will empower Hoosiers to lead healthier lives, provide transparent information to help make better health decisions, make it easier to access fresh local food from Indiana’s incredible farms, and tackle the problems in government programs like SNAP and Medicaid that contribute to making our communities less healthy. Hoosier agriculture is my biggest partner in this endeavor, and I’m proud to stand with Indiana farmers and producers to empower Hoosiers to live healthier, longer, better lives. | | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. | | NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP. | | 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: They couldn’t cancel this...
body:
The Left hopes you don’t see this
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=54ad7de10beb49aaa80958781034a213&_e=JkOFbb1Yqg7v4N9OAwiTkwno0G_TMks8gWuQiwC1SzJwt0WMS-1wb8lqnTib-7xsCcoXjoL6cDMlSJy96mj3DhIMdVvf8ZPLoyNComInsDVL9PL6-kIqsqRZVYakAiAeESr_XhCi9DsEK5Vfvxa32hWIcj61_Pv5Pxul2Gt6ZIw72T3lzrg6DZoyg9PhHLbXJ3slACSOaPgXsn6oapcu8Qa6HR7dViF-jZu9Ck168o-LLUBHh8SwaeZV0MQU-Z97_CWOyZW10Vk5KSxJb-GEeNBoiJQcIJ2sEQ5AW7ux1jT-QjIHxoI3ze4UmzqyfGLB)
---
Peter, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?**I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside...You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=54ad7de10beb49aaa80958781034a213&_e=JkOFbb1Yqg7v4N9OAwiTkwno0G_TMks8gWuQiwC1SzJwt0WMS-1wb8lqnTib-7xsCcoXjoL6cDMlSJy96mj3DhIMdVvf8ZPLoyNComInsDVL9PL6-kIqsqRZVYakAiAeESr_XhCi9DsEK5Vfvxa32sTMz8nhyJBf5MMVfTSFMhCDcn0QJUHi7UorTOAa4dTJEgLJL30VGchW6ngSORC4vmh95Ssw8GlGRJKXWnRSWryLuecXv3GfS1W97b1UvOjompOfwwdYu3kCQNmFDLFNioERDYgIXlK-UNH8LRRV2TJ8G0lnUcfrMNR212kBTWHy)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:**Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.**And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...”They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=54ad7de10beb49aaa80958781034a213&_e=JkOFbb1Yqg7v4N9OAwiTkwno0G_TMks8gWuQiwC1SzJwt0WMS-1wb8lqnTib-7xsCcoXjoL6cDMlSJy96mj3DhIMdVvf8ZPLoyNComInsDVL9PL6-kIqsqRZVYakAiAeESr_XhCi9DsEK5Vfvxa32sodRakSmgz9roXjkON1-lS7gCWeCpEULL8uXIeJsRyqxhHdaty2hD7jTP_umoMOlr5K5dXPB922-mlInyJtLDZGjaWpJq8FvwI0RefeGTk8YvklRwSaASDE9mMjwqSKCT5Ry6A2uVxIAnIyJzoHJQ3F4TezIE9doeZmjAmEzjWF)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.And each one was just as powerful...This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before._But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago.**Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did.**Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message...**But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=54ad7de10beb49aaa80958781034a213&_e=JkOFbb1Yqg7v4N9OAwiTkwno0G_TMks8gWuQiwC1SzJwt0WMS-1wb8lqnTib-7xsCcoXjoL6cDMlSJy96mj3DhIMdVvf8ZPLoyNComInsDVL9PL6-kIqsqRZVYakAiAeESr_XhCi9DsEK5Vfvxa32rUjZYtx05CtWTXOA845NlOy5BqzOV-rpzfPp3CFHCZ4wXpkWSXVAO8OPcMzYZGsvBx_CGQMj-5cgPYffneWpld0kvYbbbnNXsSvGHXQnmBMEuQzK6PXNfXaqSNxNFBv5FBW3nQDv1ZmOj8FINGcsxZkSNV3Jx7cOD0SHqzameHV)
---
_Peter, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.**But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible.Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most.**You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...But this summer?We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through.We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. **_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Peter._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible...We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong.**I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.****Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=54ad7de10beb49aaa80958781034a213&_e=JkOFbb1Yqg7v4N9OAwiTkwno0G_TMks8gWuQiwC1SzJwt0WMS-1wb8lqnTib-7xsCcoXjoL6cDMlSJy96mj3DhIMdVvf8ZPLoyNComInsDVL9PL6-kIqsqRZVYakAiAeESr_XhCi9DsEK5Vfvxa32lYOE6R3HKQWS8An7K6OMX3cU5d2EJdIorCAEB5ioryKUw-CA7Bd6CwoTJknIUeBA7FTDFTyxU5yw_mcUmBGXhm_kJ6r0B4b0ZiAk_GgjQuJ9B7YPFoIz8VXEzxVAg5XVD9vi_NC-Bv3HsXyW-jOW9P7e9XFYUp7HNc9TOW3hysf)
---
**P.S.** I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Peter... **_But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS._** These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas.This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.**And the Left is terrified.** You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore.**Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student.** **And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED.** That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. _So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._ Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. **[We’re not done. Let’s go DEFEAT the Left once and for all. Make your gift to Turning Point USA today and have your impact immediately DOUBLED.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=54ad7de10beb49aaa80958781034a213&_e=JkOFbb1Yqg7v4N9OAwiTkwno0G_TMks8gWuQiwC1SzJwt0WMS-1wb8lqnTib-7xsCcoXjoL6cDMlSJy96mj3DhIMdVvf8ZPLoyNComInsDVL9PL6-kIqsqRZVYakAiAeESr_XhCi9DsEK5Vfvxa32omt0bj_i2ZiB6aM4STVItNW-xSFwgnjyFbPkjvTrJpmZ77RcQxdrwa_NhvFK8vVbOCbncMoHbmRNO8VBB9u1i-9zqPiOtzDfZKwQwr7QLEWDEYksoLGsVdkmvi5dz_niFhrI-lpbyJOfSfUQ3YzB6mZNckP-azDMREf1FCs4tUF)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=54ad7de10beb49aaa80958781034a213&_e=JkOFbb1Yqg7v4N9OAwiTkwno0G_TMks8gWuQiwC1SzJwt0WMS-1wb8lqnTib-7xsCcoXjoL6cDMlSJy96mj3DhIMdVvf8ZPLoyNComInsDVL9PL6-kIqsqRZVYakAiAeESr_XhCi9DsEK5Vfvxa32rm6Ucm9u82wlqaVz6w9DPtRoJILiNmsAKm3nE4Nh11eHYN-daCfWec0bHoDR-SpdQgIP-GqSHG5hm8wU7U4_PA3pq1hhFQqIRYrhkUw1F2sS5Zls7Lvbl4pLTLHmGlNG2QTYNexoJ0GFAePMvRT3pVR-SL8RKrRl3IHzhLrn72O)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
[Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=54ad7de10beb49aaa80958781034a213&_t=UBsU77QXhZ8NXz9svHPeHtSJpTZhb0oXoGryLe4i1cVE29K16zcUW9On15KHX9ksoDKmSoZry1ZNsjEwMHlE_YFeCLgAWUfC8pZKjiCDNG6MUb3lMbqHqNjXeExgO1Hl)

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: It’s official: we just won the Democratic primary in New Jersey
body:
The general election begins now.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250612-1?refcode=em-20250612-1&refcode2=162_1086043_iRKKsQ&akid=162%2E1086043%2EiRKKsQ)
Peter, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted.
And we can’t stop now.
We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. **[Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $5 between my campaign and Wes Moore today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250612-1?refcode=em-20250612-1&refcode2=162_1086043_iRKKsQ&akid=162%2E1086043%2EiRKKsQ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250612-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250612-1&refcode2=162_1086043_iRKKsQ&akid=162%2E1086043%2EiRKKsQ)**
Peter, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.
And it’s why, Peter, I’m running to serve as New Jersey's next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.
**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban and defund public schools. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**
**[Peter, if you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Wes Moore today →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250612-1?refcode=em-20250612-1&refcode2=162_1086043_iRKKsQ&akid=162%2E1086043%2EiRKKsQ)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250612-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250612-1&refcode2=162_1086043_iRKKsQ&akid=162%2E1086043%2EiRKKsQ)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Mikie
_Use of photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250612-1&t=1&refcode2=162_1086043_iRKKsQ&akid=162%2E1086043%2EiRKKsQ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=162%2E1086043%2EiRKKsQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=162%2E1086043%2EiRKKsQ)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

And it’s why, Peter, I’m running to serve as New Jersey's next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t. But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban and defund public schools. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start. Thank you so much for your support, Mikie Use of photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Casey Given
subject: It keeps happening under communism
body:
Imagine a regime so brutal that it wiped out nearly 2 million people — roughly 25% of its population.

|
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpefmfu22lddhob4cb851pg7p0b64l2tvqb097i8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj0cth2bs) Friend,

Imagine a regime so brutal that it wiped out nearly 2 million people — roughly 25% of its population.

That’s exactly what happened in Cambodia’s Killing Fields under the Khmer Rouge, one of the deadliest communist regimes in history. Their radical collectivist ideology demanded absolute power.

What was the result?
* _Intellectuals were murdered_
* _Families were torn apart_
* _Many others died from starvation._

Today, young Americans are told that socialism is “fair” and that “real” communism was never really tried. But history repeatedly shows that centralized power and collectivist economics often lead to oppression, censorship, and human suffering.

**Survivors of these regimes — people like the Dissident Project’s speakers — know the truth.**

The Dissident Project brings survivors of authoritarian regimes to high school and college classrooms across America to expose these dangerous ideas before it’s too late.

** **[Will you help us continue this vital work by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zddp47c7tq6mkdc5jr9omnbph53ud65p2qi9ir7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj0cth2bs)
[Donate to the Dissident Project](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjobmv4uf8c8vq87kqpiq76lc3umn6lu8k9j72m8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj0cth2bs)
The Dissident Project is on a mission to share the stories of those who have lived through authoritarian regimes and fought for the values of freedom, democracy, and individual rights.

Among the voices of the Dissident Project is Daniel Di Martino from Venezuela, who experienced the terrible consequences of socialism firsthand before escaping to the United States...
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv98o1kl0b89f585l0fsa4038je8djf1e0it4dpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj0cth2bs) Mailyn Salabarria from Cuba, whose story of defection from the Cuban regime shines a light on the struggles of those living under communist rule... [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhqaeioklo1c0bepcd64t937hpqv5cgq9ltmjouo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj0cth2bs)
Frances Hui, from Hong Kong, who knows what it looks like when a communist regime takes over your country and cracks down on political and social movements...
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0cevf4ai11ua1int411isjhcn814ptflo17eef8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj0cth2bs)
And Grace Jo, a North Korean defector, whose story offers a firsthand account of life under one of the most repressive regimes in the world, and the courage it took to escape.
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm5od6oaa5rtrlftefmahprb6mh44pigl4lvt9eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj0cth2bs)
**These individuals — along with the rest of our remarkable dissidents — embody the resilience of those who refuse to be silenced by tyranny.**

The Dissident Project is proud to continue our mission of training and empowering speakers who can share their transformative stories with audiences nationwide.

You can help them share their firsthand experiences, revealing the horrors of socialism and communism and educating the next generation about the real consequences of statism by donating today.

name: Urgent Military Parade Update via Our Revolution
subject: Tell Congress: Pull the Plug on Trump's Military Birthday Parade NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Trump's militarism and intimidation of ANYONE who dares to speak against
him are escalating. He dispatched 4,000 National Guard troops and 700
marines on the streets of Los Angeles. And now he's issuing threats not to
disrupt his authoritarian-style birthday parade on Saturday, saying "If
there's any protester wants to come out, they will be met with heavy
force."

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31908?source=email-20250612&t=1011&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Headline: Trump warns 'any' protesters at military parade will be 'met
with heavy force'

His message is chilling. But here's the thing: our democracy is stronger
than Trump. As he rolls tanks through the streets of Washington D.C., more
than 500,000 people we will be rising up in 2,000+ events across America
to celebrate liberty, equality, and the right of dissent. We're joining
grassroots allies across America in organizing a MASSIVE No Kings” day of
DEFIANCE this Saturday.

Our team is working around the clock to counter Trump with a
record-breaking day of protest. But it's also long past time CONGRESS does
something to stop this – and the first thing it can do is step in to
immediately revoke funding for Trump's dangerous military spectacle.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31909?source=email-20250612&t=1012&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Will you urgently sign our petition demanding Congress pull the plug on
Trump's military parade? RIGHT NOW, we must send a clear message that the
public is standing together against Trump's tyranny.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31909?source=email-20250612&t=1013&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]ADD YOUR NAME

The military spectacle Trump has long dreamed of isn't a traditional
celebration – it's a chilling display of military force, weaponizing
patriotic symbolism to threaten political opponents. And by sending our
military into communities in LA and threatening to do the same across the
country, Trump is showing just how far he's willing to go.

Let's be clear: in a democracy, presidents don't parade tanks down our
streets to silence dissent. They don't unleash the military on their own
communities. That's a tactic used by authoritarian regimes to project
power and instill fear among ordinary citizens.

Across the country, people are coming together to send a clear message to
Trump that he IS NOT KING.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31908?source=email-20250612&t=1014&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Headline:'No Kings': Millions to protest Trump's 'dictator-style
birthday parade'

But we can't stop there. Now more than ever, we must remind Trump and
Congress our government exists to serve us – not the other way around. So
together let's send a clear message to Congress: No taxpayer dollars, no
permits, no parade.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31909?source=email-20250612&t=1015&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Add your voice now and stand with millions across America who oppose
Trump's tyranny. Tell Congress to DEFY Trump's authoritarian threats and
withdraw ALL support for his military birthday parade immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31909?source=email-20250612&t=1016&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20250612.SVQ5rI&t=1007&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20250612.2o3cU1&t=1008&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20250612.Qn9cf7&t=1009&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20250612.b4XM5S&t=1010&akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2 ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=8797%2E5885482%2ECGxaI2

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

name: Casey Given
subject: It keeps happening under communism
body:
Imagine a regime so brutal that it wiped out nearly 2 million people — roughly 25% of its population.

|
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm28biek8ejm6m210ikg1eu3m8mnmj6a06lp0340_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs) Friend,

Imagine a regime so brutal that it wiped out nearly 2 million people — roughly 25% of its population.

That’s exactly what happened in Cambodia’s Killing Fields under the Khmer Rouge, one of the deadliest communist regimes in history. Their radical collectivist ideology demanded absolute power.

What was the result?
* _Intellectuals were murdered_
* _Families were torn apart_
* _Many others died from starvation._

Today, young Americans are told that socialism is “fair” and that “real” communism was never really tried. But history repeatedly shows that centralized power and collectivist economics often lead to oppression, censorship, and human suffering.

**Survivors of these regimes — people like the Dissident Project’s speakers — know the truth.**

The Dissident Project brings survivors of authoritarian regimes to high school and college classrooms across America to expose these dangerous ideas before it’s too late.

** **[Will you help us continue this vital work by donating $10, $35, $50, or even $100 today?](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zvrid9b85aog2o6evtp77oj55aghfl2epc2rbp9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)
[Donate to the Dissident Project](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zlgfu504jg8dg1hkf249foid1bquqc029piq6mk8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)
The Dissident Project is on a mission to share the stories of those who have lived through authoritarian regimes and fought for the values of freedom, democracy, and individual rights.

Among the voices of the Dissident Project is Daniel Di Martino from Venezuela, who experienced the terrible consequences of socialism firsthand before escaping to the United States...
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zemgu76lm8bo7mpctqid951695r3tigt8uiligj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs) Mailyn Salabarria from Cuba, whose story of defection from the Cuban regime shines a light on the struggles of those living under communist rule... [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z31p483vqshtjemj3cob13o8ae6qfdsfeeoua9o0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)
Frances Hui, from Hong Kong, who knows what it looks like when a communist regime takes over your country and cracks down on political and social movements...
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z9n6nr00eq7poc8u0169gmtt1mibmlqd265bftuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)
And Grace Jo, a North Korean defector, whose story offers a firsthand account of life under one of the most repressive regimes in the world, and the courage it took to escape.
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8pg9a787pcgduf19dus2gvdqbf54m9l6u9n9aj0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)
**These individuals — along with the rest of our remarkable dissidents — embody the resilience of those who refuse to be silenced by tyranny.**

The Dissident Project is proud to continue our mission of training and empowering speakers who can share their transformative stories with audiences nationwide.

You can help them share their firsthand experiences, revealing the horrors of socialism and communism and educating the next generation about the real consequences of statism by donating today.
[Donate $10](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zge176s6hjpe8roebt396ou8s7qtkc8uhjsip8io_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zflpi6rivo3j02veor7jmt30n5dopkh86h7c1u58_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zunr8qhas3f3pnkjsn8ghnpd361j8lu7qce5h1s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zs8rl98b5g9o95i954qb48s8p1ilq76jbsmcs1q0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zmhsiop296g0o4eo1796u1r6ptihuvucj642npco_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zsf4lvdl94uhl479on5mlnr35k4c6ai563r9lap0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zmedioornprlhumhg3f3tlk14ndv654j2v8338ag_rp22sh2s8i6eob4stim8oj4chh2bs) Sincerely,

Casey Given
_The Dissident Project is a program of Young Voices, a 501c3 nonprofit organization. All donations are tax-deductible and will be acknowledged via email receipt. Donations made to the Dissident Project will be spent exclusively on that program._

| Peter Willis, This Saturday, we are hosting a Flag Day barbecue in Haslett to celebrate my great grandfather, Congressman Louis Rabaut, and his legislation to add “Under God” to the Pledge of Allegiance. It was 71 years ago this week that President Eisenhower signed the legislation and my family is incredibly proud of his legacy.I look forward to seeing you Saturday! - Tom

name: Katherine Donovan
subject: This fight is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Nobody could have expected what would happen next.
#

Rarely does a day go by when I don’t think about February 14, 2018.
I was an assistant principal at a middle school just a few miles down from Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School. We were celebrating Valentine’s Day. Nobody could have expected what would happen next.
Within minutes, a gunman used an assault weapon to fire 139 shots -- killing 17 people and injuring 18 others. I lived through the aftermath with my current and former students.
School shootings were no longer just something that happened on TV, far away. It was here, and it affected the people I loved.
That event led me to become a gun safety advocate. **I’m a former educator, a gun owner — and now, a member of the Florida chapter of Gun Owners for Safety. I’m working with GIFFORDS to stand up against the gun lobby, and I hope you’ll join us.**
[**Will you make a contribution to support GIFFORDS PAC’s work before their mid-month deadline this Sunday? Through your support, we can reduce gun violence through advocacy, public education, and policy change**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=1&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june25.CEhNxI&amount=3&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=20&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-june25.zYHkRG&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=21&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-june25.kO3487&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=22&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-june25.YBJ-OM&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=23&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-june25.p6AJDp&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=24&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june25.CEhNxI&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=25&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
This fight is personal: I have three young grandsons. They deserve to live their school years free from gun violence.
Unfortunately, our elected officials are more focused on appeasing the gun lobby than making our communities safer. **Donald Trump and Ron DeSantis are doing all they can to get more unregulated guns on our streets.**
Just this year, they’ve pushed to erase some of the critical changes we accomplished after Parkland -- including funding for school mental health resources and restricting potentially dangerous people from owning guns.
**Let me be clear: Despite what the gun lobby says, a majority of gun owners support commonsense measures.** We can prevent gun violence _and_ support the Second Amendment. I take that very seriously.
So if Ron DeSantis, and Donald Trump continue to do the NRA’s bidding, then I will continue working alongside my friends at GIFFORDS to fight back.
[**If you are able, will you donate any amount to help GIFFORDS PAC continue their important work? We are working to build a big coalition, and your donations help us rally even more people.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=26&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-june25.CEhNxI&amount=3&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=45&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-june25.zYHkRG&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=46&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-june25.kO3487&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=47&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-june25.YBJ-OM&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=48&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-june25.p6AJDp&refcode=em250612-1-b&t=49&akid=10569%2E3935704%2Ez6Giru)**

---
****
The Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School massacre is a stark reminder of the urgent need for legislative change regarding firearms. We have a responsibility to help keep our families and communities safe.
Thank you for supporting GIFFORDS.
-- Katherine “Kitty” Donovan
Senior Ambassador, Florida
GIFFORDS Gun Owners for Safety

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: The reality of an authoritarian administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Every day, our office gets more and more heartbreaking stories from constituents and concerned neighbors about the impact of the actions of this authoritarian administration. We’ve seen immigrants, even as young as high schoolers, being detained by ICE at mandated, scheduled court appearances. Beloved community members are being ripped from their families. This administration has even rolled back the mandate of the Biden Administration to keep migrant families together, which will create even more inhumane conditions for those in detention. More and more Americans are waking up to the reality and extremism of the Trump administration — they’re coming after our friends, family members, and neighbors here in Arizona and across the country. I’m doing everything in my power to uphold the rule of law and due process, and stand up to the authoritarian actions of the Trump administration, but I’ll be honest, Peter, I can’t do it alone. ****_**[This work puts me right in the sights of the fundraising machine that supports the GOP, and I know they’ll try to flip this seat with everything they have. body:

#

Now, I need to know I have your support.[Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89633?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9001%2E614464%2EKvZMwd)**

Instead of standing up to Trump and his billionaire allies, Young Kim has stood by and let the fire spread. We need leaders in Congress who stand up to defend middle and working-class families.
As a former firefighter and labor leader, I’ll fight relentlessly to protect good union jobs, defend the right to a living wage, and ensure families can afford to live with dignity.

name: Anika Page
subject: Teaching Our Children Why America Matters
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/bundledeal?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Good morning Friend,
In a world full of noise, sometimes all it takes is a simple story to speak truth. _What Makes America Special_ is a beautifully illustrated book that helps children understand the foundational values that make our country great — freedom, opportunity, faith, and responsibility. It’s written with young readers in mind, but it speaks to timeless truths we all hold dear.
---

---
| And this month, every order comes with a free flag and patriotic activity bundle — because loving America should be both meaningful and fun. Thank you for helping us shape hearts and minds with truth and hope.

Warmest wishes,

Anika Page
Director of Operations

That’s why I launched Restore Our Nation PAC — to help elect bold conservatives who will put America FIRST, fight the woke mind virus, and secure our border once and for all. name: Laura Loomer
subject: EXPOSED: The Democrat Cover-Up Machine
body:
After McIver’s assault on ICE agents made headlines, Goldman didn’t condemn the violence—he attacked the Department of Justice, calling their charges “politically motivated.” This isn’t justice—it’s partisan protectionism at its worst.
| If this is irrelevant to you, please click **[unsubscribe here](https://libersend.loomered.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/jNrcjifZkRuM7634SQt2EHxg/zFHerA3892SVcexwDA6bOitg)** to be removed.

[****](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/F3E6sMf892Jd7638923b8VQUfTLQ/zFHerA3892SVcexwDA6bOitg) Dear Patriot,

The Democrat cover-up machine is in full swing, and Democrat Congressman Dan Goldman is leading the charge. But I'm not backing down--[**and neither should you**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/F3E6sMf892Jd7638923b8VQUfTLQ/zFHerA3892SVcexwDA6bOitg).

My latest investigation has uncovered a **shocking pattern of corruption** involving Rep. Dan Goldman and his defense of fellow Democrat Rep. LaMonica McIver.

**After McIver 's assault on ICE agents made headlines**, Goldman didn't condemn the violence--**he attacked the Department of Justice** , calling their charges "politically motivated." This isn't justice--it's partisan protectionism at its worst.

Goldman's track record is a disgrace.

From bragging about his role in Trump's impeachment to defending Rep. Jasmine Crockett's incitement of violence, he's proven time and again that he'll shield his allies while waging lawfare against President Trump.

And let's not forget his ethically murky ties to Judge Merchan's daughter--her firm represents him, and I exposed payments sent to her home while her father oversaw Trump's trial in New York City.

This is the Democrat machine at work: **protecting their own, no matter the cost**.

**[**I need your help to keep exposing this rot**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/F3E6sMf892Jd7638923b8VQUfTLQ/zFHerA3892SVcexwDA6bOitg)****. **[**Your donation will fund my travel and reporting as I dig deeper into this scandal**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/F3E6sMf892Jd7638923b8VQUfTLQ/zFHerA3892SVcexwDA6bOitg). **Without you, the truth stays buried.**

Donate Now--Fight the Cover-Up.

Don't let Goldman and his cronies get away with this. [**Stand with me. Give generously**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/F3E6sMf892Jd7638923b8VQUfTLQ/zFHerA3892SVcexwDA6bOitg).

**Together, we 'll make sure justice prevails.**

With Vigilance,
Laura Loomer

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: It’s official: we just won the Democratic primary in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
The general election begins now.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109450396/551141971/-922610151?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5545-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODg5ZmY0ZS05ZjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90t0xzuRQbsjcF-n9a_B-XFmu7gonlourz5yvAEme0s=)
Team, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted.
And we can’t stop now.
We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. **[Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $5 between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109450397/551141972/-922610151?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk5545-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODg5ZmY0ZS05ZjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90t0xzuRQbsjcF-n9a_B-XFmu7gonlourz5yvAEme0s=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109450399/551141973/-922610151?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5545-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODg5ZmY0ZS05ZjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90t0xzuRQbsjcF-n9a_B-XFmu7gonlourz5yvAEme0s=)
---
Team, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.

It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.

It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.
And it’s why, team, I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.
**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**
**[Team, if you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Jacky Rosen's today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109450400/551141974/-922610151?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5545-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODg5ZmY0ZS05ZjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90t0xzuRQbsjcF-n9a_B-XFmu7gonlourz5yvAEme0s=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mikie Sherrill and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109450401/551141975/-922610151?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk5545-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODg5ZmY0ZS05ZjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=90t0xzuRQbsjcF-n9a_B-XFmu7gonlourz5yvAEme0s=)

clean_body: The general election begins now. | | | = Team, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted. And we can’t stop now. We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. = | | = Team, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor. It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time. And it’s why, team, I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t. But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mikie Sherrill and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for your support, Mikie Use of photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._ | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: It’s official: we just won the Democratic primary in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
The general election begins now.
| [](https://fight4progress.org/sherrill?t=YyVKVDa8mIbr&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-06-12_1&amount=25)
---
Peter, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted.

And we can’t stop now.

We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. [_**Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $25 between my campaign and Fight for Progress today?**_](https://fight4progress.org/sherrill?t=PKvnAZAA7OQM&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-06-12_1&amount=25)
| [ DONATE ](https://fight4progress.org/sherrill?t=4NnSMTfgtBmz&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-06-12_1&amount=25)
---
Peter, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.

It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.

It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.

It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.

It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.

And it’s why, Peter, I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.

**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**

[_**Peter, if you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress today →**_](https://fight4progress.org/sherrill?t=QVJSJyfIn3H5&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-06-12_1&amount=25)
| | | [ CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://fight4progress.org/sherrill?t=r87WqoD6cxOo&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-06-12_1&amount=5)
---

---

---

Thank you so much for your support,

Mikie

name: Tom Fitton
subject: FWD Breaking News…We Are Going to the Supreme Court!
body:
This week the U.S. Supreme Court announced that it has agreed to hear Judicial Watch’s appeal of a Court of Appeals decision in our lawsuit challenging Illinois’ reckless law “extending” Election Day beyond the date established by federal law.

|
Dear Fellow American,

The decision by the U.S. Supreme Court to take up our challenge to Illinois' reckless law that "extends" Election Day is so important that I want to be sure you had a chance to read it!

No group or individual digs in and uses the legal system and the courts to protect honest elections the way Judicial Watch does.

This work is hard, it is time consuming and it is expensive.

Everything that we achieve is because of the financial support we receive from members and friends like you.

[**And I hope you can help us today with a contribution so that we can continue to fight for you, and for the rule of law!**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74587&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5)

Thank you so much!

Tom Fitton
President

* * *

**From:** Tom Fitton
**Date:** Thur, June 5, 2025 at 9:14 AM
**Subject:** Breaking News...We Are Going to the Supreme Court!
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

This week the **U.S. Supreme Court** announced that it has agreed to hear Judicial Watch’s appeal of a Court of Appeals decision in our lawsuit challenging **Illinois** ’ reckless law “extending” Election Day beyond the date established by federal law.
**This is a very big deal** ...and it is a _tribute_ to you and your past support of Judicial Watch!
**[And at this critical moment, I ask you to help us today, as we prepare for the biggest court battle in our 31-year history!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74587&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74587&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Our lawsuit against **Illinois** (and our similar lawsuits against **California** and **Mississippi**) argues that the federal law setting an Election _Day_ is clear and that states cannot “extend” the time for accepting ballots.

And don’t forget...these state laws not only violate federal law and the civil rights of voters...**they are open invitations for massive voter fraud**!

Now, our election legal team is preparing for arguments before the highest court in the land during its next term.

**[The stakes could not be higher...and we need you to help us make more history in our persistent battle to protect honest elections from attacks by the Left](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74587&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5)**!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74587&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We scored a huge win in March, when the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit declined to rehear its previous ruling in which it _agreed with Judicial Watch that it_ _was unlawful for Mississippi to count ballots received after Election Day_.

No one can predict what the Supreme Court will decide but I believe the ruling in our Mississippi lawsuit will carry a lot of weight with the Supreme Court, and also on the outcome of our ongoing lawsuit against California’s “extending” Election Day law.

And a Judicial Watch victory at the Supreme Court will be a massive setback to the Left’s constant efforts on so many fronts to corrupt and steal our elections!

Judicial Watch has done more to successfully defend traditional election safeguards than any group in America...and now we are facing our biggest and most important test ever.

Your support now will help us continue to be the nation’s leader in the fight for honest elections. I deeply hope [I can count on you to help us today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74587&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5), as we carry forward all our legal research, investigations and lawsuits to protect the rule of law.

I look forward to welcoming you as a supporter of Judicial Watch!
Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=74587&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

|
---
|
---

Washington, DC 20024

Friend, MAGA Republicans have proven again and again that public education and our teachers are not their priority. Their latest attacks include appointing a former WWE star to denigrate our public schools, threatening to defund institutions that do not comply with their extremist agenda, and illegally dismantling the Department of Education by Executive Order. Trump and his MAGA administration's effort to defund public schools is a disservice to children. **Every child deserves an excellent education for free – no matter where they live and who their parents are.** And friend, I won't let Trump, the GOP, or any MAGA extremists deprive our children of having a bright future. _This means I will stand for public schools and our educators to receive the support and funds they need._ [**Will you add your name if you will join me in protecting public schools today? Our children are our future, and a quality education is their foundation for success.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109452261/551147058/-551747463?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.12_PublicSchools_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWE3Zjc2MC1hMjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiMcxq7HT17Jza-u-XK_j7UP8kFdKG7bVviYr92rO78=&emci=60fb79bb-d746-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a5a7f760-a247-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=11913588) | | [**ADD YOUR NAME »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109452262/551147059/-551747463?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.06.12_PublicSchools_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWE3Zjc2MC1hMjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XiMcxq7HT17Jza-u-XK_j7UP8kFdKG7bVviYr92rO78=&emci=60fb79bb-d746-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a5a7f760-a247-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=11913588)

**From protecting our students from indoctrination in schools to standing with law enforcement, defending the unborn, and fighting government overreach, your immediate support is critical to holding the line.**

This is OUR home. These are OUR values. name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: One of these things is not like the other
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Leadership or self-worship
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109454633/551154006/623074613?refcode=jtk1407-su-nd&code=jtk1407-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgxZjlhNGItYTY0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ONfKMQAJr-xgtVp4JAiB44ll9qRLpEL3EEy_7N405yM=&emci=c75d7f4d-1c47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c81f9a4b-a647-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9329426)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109454634/551154007/-1224022600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1407-su-nd&code=jtk1407-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgxZjlhNGItYTY0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ONfKMQAJr-xgtVp4JAiB44ll9qRLpEL3EEy_7N405yM=&emci=c75d7f4d-1c47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c81f9a4b-a647-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9329426)
Dear friend,

This week, the streets of Washington, D.C., have been transformed, not in celebration but in service of one man’s ego. Barricades block entire sections of the city, troops have been deployed, and security checkpoints control the flow of citizens. All of this while Americans across the country are told we can no longer afford basic programs that feed children and families or provide basic health services.
And in front of the Department of Agriculture hang two massive banners, one of Donald Trump and one of Abraham Lincoln.
Lincoln led this country through its darkest hour, not in service of himself but for a more perfect union. He knew the presidency was not a pedestal but a responsibility. His leadership was marked by humility, compassion, and a belief in the American experiment.**Americans were not to sacrifice for his sake but for each other.**
He believed in a government that would serve its people, and in the midst of the Civil War, Lincoln never used his position to fuel his pride. He stayed devoted to the foundations of the country, the Constitution, and that all people are created equal with the government existing to protect their rights, not to parade its power.
The Gettysburg Address, a defining speech of our nation, was under 300 words. It lasted less than three minutes, yet it reaffirmed the freedoms we are owed by our government, brought to us by our forefathers and those that continue to fight. Lincoln spoke not to glorify himself but to honor those that came before and those who live on now to carry that work forward.
What will Trump say? And how long will he speak?
You already know the answer. Trump demands that you sacrifice for himself. He cloaks his self-aggrandization in patriotism. So what we see in Washington, D.C., is no celebration of our country but a taxpayer-funded narcissism parade.
I believe in the United States of America that Lincoln believed in, one where the strength of our democracy is not measured by the military in our own streets but by how we care for each other. **[Keep that vision alive, add your name if you believe in an America rooted in humility, and oppose Trump’s wasteful birthday parade.>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109454635/551154008/-1224022600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1407-su-nd&code=jtk1407-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM3OTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzgxZjlhNGItYTY0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ONfKMQAJr-xgtVp4JAiB44ll9qRLpEL3EEy_7N405yM=&emci=c75d7f4d-1c47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c81f9a4b-a647-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9329426)**
Yours in service,

Dick
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/p3FPDNcG3USxiOP5q9s2qQ2?unsubscribedata=FgPxIZ8bGaJdfigfpYGqlYycJjUKvnhBRsSeMvfL593wy%2Ft4%2FlonDBfA5fsSrqUrJT9ob%2B0D1NmXTCt0BuryoOAXLNY%2BzOiG%2FNHuBU2ZLokm%2FVXtA5JbjoDBi0Uq0j3CSJSQun%2FO%2FaI5BakTDij4Ubq0jswk0TYt1MpQblf5xzo9x5cM07sKZ01k0FWvSNve1ZriNU5J%2Bwcsx%2Bp3ORmQhMv%2FV7DrNkcL1W74ChAsjYCa%2FQWVG%2B3oE3Cu9%2Bzvmkl46pNhH19%2B%2B0Mc8kpzSWWtUMeLgwAaiHTbuO%2FBQFiq3Kn3zBUEWUv9aRxLkUlqTZ%2F%2Brdgi%2Fxmb7c%2B%2F8NZkrfEzSqSVDPC4hEQFYqE2mkYoHxTzpdsHBey5PZzzsutKfP49CajT8YfJLcO9qrZt3LpSqujafqz2AyJzN0n5OrOYrNfgPJiRNvrQBuikv%2B0gaqSp) | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

It lasted less than three minutes, yet it reaffirmed the freedoms we are owed by our government, brought to us by our forefathers and those that continue to fight. Lincoln spoke not to glorify himself but to honor those that came before and those who live on now to carry that work forward. What will Trump say? And how long will he speak? You already know the answer. Trump demands that you sacrifice for himself. He cloaks his self-aggrandization in patriotism. So what we see in Washington, D.C., is no celebration of our country but a taxpayer-funded narcissism parade. I believe in the United States of America that Lincoln believed in, one where the strength of our democracy is not measured by the military in our own streets but by how we care for each other. Yours in service, Dick | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut Blumenthal for Connecticut 1111 Summer Street Suite 301 Stamford, CT 06905 United States

name: Sarah Kline
subject: LAST CALL: Peter, it’s go time for our transportation package!
body:
Dear Peter,
Today is our last day to turn out volunteers to testify for the transportation package, so we need your support now! Will you help us advocate NOW for a transportation package that reflects all of our values? [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2]
Donate now [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=cMJ7kjtWc/7nGdnQSD8h2UOeQiU8suBWvLD6nviBevIDQuuNve3y9a94DYK58O4f3GCjzntwI0Pp96aUQbyLYYFlmmUWNQ2Jgd15Kg0fem05k4jm1rPQMBZreaahS5YW]
We can’t achieve the lifeline transportation package all Oregonians deserve without your support. Please consider giving what you can today. [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2]
With gratitude,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=cMJ7kjtWc/7nGdnQSD8h2UOeQiU8suBWvLD6nviBevIDQuuNve3y9a94DYK58O4f3GCjzntwI0Pp96aUQbyLYYFlmmUWNQ2Jgd15Kg0fem05k4jm1rPQMBZreaahS5YW [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=cMJ7kjtWc/7nGdnQSD8h2UOeQiU8suBWvLD6nviBevIDQuuNve3y9a94DYK58O4f3GCjzntwI0Pp96aUQbyLYYFlmmUWNQ2Jgd15Kg0fem05k4jm1rPQMBZreaahS5YW]
Hi Peter,
Big news: the Legislature has finally unveiled the long-awaited transportation package [https://www.oregonlegislature.gov/wagner/Documents/Oregon%20TRIP%20to%20Invest%20in%20Roads,%20Bridges,%20Transit%20and%20Provide%20Oversight%20of%20ODOT.pdf] ( HB 2025 [https://olis.oregonlegislature.gov/liz/2025R1/Measures/Overview/HB2025] )! While this package includes several things we advocated for – like Safe Routes to School and wildlife crossings – some important items are missing, including dedicated funding for transportation electrification. Without climate investments, this package will take us backwards on climate. This is a critical moment; we’re all hands on deck turning out volunteers to testify at hearings this week and we need your help. Will you make an urgent donation to OLCV today to help? [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2]
Donate now [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=cMJ7kjtWc/7nGdnQSD8h2UOeQiU8suBWvLD6nviBevIDQuuNve3y9a94DYK58O4f3GCjzntwI0Pp96aUQbyLYYFlmmUWNQ2Jgd15Kg0fem05k4jm1rPQMBZreaahS5YW]
This session you’ve shown up tirelessly in support of a transportation package that works for ALL Oregonians. With the help of grassroots supporters like you, the package includes important programs like Great Streets and Safe Routes to School, and funding for wildlife crossings and transit. One thing that is not included, however, is investments in electrification, which is essential for us to reduce toxic air pollution and meet our climate goals ( read more here [https://www.moveoregonforward.org/news/for-immediate-release-oregon-transportation-bill-wins-on-safety-falls-short-on-vehicle-electrification-and-off-street-trails] ). https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=cMJ7kjtWc/7nGdnQSD8h2UOeQiU8suBWvLD6nviBevIDQuuNve3y9a94DYK58O4f3GCjzntwI0Pp96aUQbyLYYFlmmUWNQ2Jgd15Kg0fem05k4jm1rPQMBZreaahS5YW [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=cMJ7kjtWc/7nGdnQSD8h2UOeQiU8suBWvLD6nviBevIDQuuNve3y9a94DYK58O4f3GCjzntwI0Pp96aUQbyLYYFlmmUWNQ2Jgd15Kg0fem05k4jm1rPQMBZreaahS5YW]
There’s still time left to make sure that the transportation package includes climate investments in electrification like incentives for electric trucks or vehicles and charging infrastructure. We’re recruiting folks to testify at hearings this week and we need your help now.
Will you help by donating now? Your support ensures that we have the resources we need to mobilize OLCV members to testify in support of a climate friendly transportation package. [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2]
Renew your membership [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=cMJ7kjtWc/7nGdnQSD8h2UOeQiU8suBWvLD6nviBevIDQuuNve3y9a94DYK58O4f3GCjzntwI0Pp96aUQbyLYYFlmmUWNQ2Jgd15Kg0fem05k4jm1rPQMBZreaahS5YW]
Transportation not only connects us, but is also a lifeline for many people. We deserve a transportation system that works for all of us, and reflects our state’s values and commitments to our environment, climate, and communities. But the clock is ticking on our ability to get this done.
OLCV, our members, and our partners, have been working together for over a year to ensure the future of transportation reflects our values. The work isn’t done, but if all of us contribute however we’re able to now, I believe we can achieve a transportation package that reflects all of our values. [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2]
Renew your membership [https://secure.everyaction.com/TDc4a2r_QEugjeZtF01ipw2?am=20&contactdata=cMJ7kjtWc/7nGdnQSD8h2UOeQiU8suBWvLD6nviBevIDQuuNve3y9a94DYK58O4f3GCjzntwI0Pp96aUQbyLYYFlmmUWNQ2Jgd15Kg0fem05k4jm1rPQMBZreaahS5YW]
Thank you for your support,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Sarah%20Signature.png]
Sarah Kline (she/they)
OLCV Communications & Membership Coordinator
P.S.: If you’d no longer like to receive fundraising emails, please use this link here [https://secure.everyaction.com/p/24dczWT--Uqtcu_3MxYYog2] to log-in and update your email preferences.
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

name: Austin Davis
subject: Education has always been the great equalizer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis
body:
Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/XrGKMtCcbE2djJaqLq6C9g2?unsubscribedata=cfRS1LEoA3iyMsnxuH%2FfwPF1LMt3EN4nhE58zX4wZ7CPjXa%2Bcme%2BxrdhwuVe%2BcB%2BVBM%2Bks0QZD%2BvWyRD7FCqvmACA6fQ%2FyRK75MIVlBz0GrjYkBWCBcL3P9XWiZNsuAIMc4H826e5jzd72xNdqmUtZqthpNkCe5mDb9T1A1zLqbmzzyvaUG7H2UO5g%2FzjYl9GWP%2F%2F%2FeAXq4vROYWsFokXOOm3mnPyFStalEcBH5ua9d8tPRKcyDW1vNszqspv5%2Fn%2BcDyYsffD%2FeFj3BaZQWQAMOY0mdNh0ZyQqAbuobN7auI9p3kZCs2JkYJqaOnYnxCfcc%2BexqNmokGvy9Fk%2Bax4iLdg3N5YXAnsp7Lf4%2Fd7tq%2Fh0PWh50P7UbA3xHitNf9bbNULaCEggps7D5t5WFpB1yZ8Y57RYrBh6c6bBOxvLt%2Ba02ZW9W4RhGoxiqS0A%2FZ)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109455638/551157280/-717610454?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_061225_CAFE_30DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzEzZjhiZC1hNjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pLOI35GlYzfpP3bZAbHlx6kGYl-2L9dqxkuFywdCiMQ=) Education has always been the great equalizer. That's why I'm proud to report that here in Pennsylvania, we've raised investments in education by $2 billion to support our teachers, upgrade textbooks, expand athletics and extracurricular activities, and much more, all to ensure our students have every opportunity to succeed. Supporting public schools across the Commonwealth is **non-negotiable** when it comes to lifting communities out of poverty and creating a better future for our young people. But Peter,**it's also just the first step in achieving lasting change. ** **We also need to provide opportunities for young people outside the classroom.** When I visited Cafe Momentum in Pittsburgh, it was evident how much this program and the mentorship from their teachers mean to the students. Supporting community programs like this is how we can reduce violence and build upon the skills young people need to be successful in life. So, in addition to our investments in Public Education, the Shapiro-Davis administration has delivered $56 million in targeted funding that expands youth programs, invests in community-based organizations, and improves victims' services – _and we're seeing the difference. _ **[We're making real progress, and with continued investments in these programs, our communities will thrive. get involved to support austin davis for
PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades.

Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Education has always been the great equalizer. That's why I'm proud to report that here in Pennsylvania, we've raised investments in education by $2 billion to support our teachers, upgrade textbooks, expand athletics and extracurricular activities, and much more, all to ensure our students have every opportunity to succeed. Supporting public schools across the Commonwealth is non-negotiable when it comes to lifting communities out of poverty and creating a better future for our young people. But Peter,it's also just the first step in achieving lasting change. We also need to provide opportunities for young people outside the classroom. When I visited Cafe Momentum in Pittsburgh, it was evident how much this program and the mentorship from their teachers mean to the students. Supporting community programs like this is how we can reduce violence and build upon the skills young people need to be successful in life. So, in addition to our investments in Public Education, the Shapiro-Davis administration has delivered $56 million in targeted funding that expands youth programs, invests in community-based organizations, and improves victims' services – and we're seeing the difference. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Peter. | Friend,
California Democratic U.S. Senator Alex Padilla was just tackled and handcuffed by Department of Homeland Security agents for attempting to ask DHS Secretary Kristi Noem questions at a public press conference in Los Angeles.

---
| | [](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TPag2tMxAndVyF08YW4SJh-eGTGdms7GRIh7S5mMEFqvzhtGqRm6wsjW0Fm9XlYtFPVX0G3-jBpJWQ6tHhobpX15UYBfq56Ks1YdTNHxBhU278xcH3cpkJaGfIJTS0RZHax67rIF3FbXb6PXQLJt60QKY7F7DXo1W5cOgj4FUjg0fxBJQSqubxzmWRFBpv5F8Lar728MEBJA1c67gQcJuWjdcEguJVGKEbwGK8-ZopM=&c=AtPnsKYJLhnXb_XIjilN_lHEFpZxru-u34vZSoeSZ_IrmzcsscltIA==&ch=c10Wvr3xuG9evhVvtdVI0_RVawRM2otw6VNbLqzZRDB9MBpy9zfjzg==)
---
Trump's thugs are out of control. This kind of violence used against a U.S. Senator for simply asking the head of a federal agency questions at a public event is more reminiscent of the most brutal dictatorships in the world than it is of America. At Trump's behest, Kristi Noem is sending masked ICE agents escorted by U.S. Marines to arrest people in Home Depot parking lots and first graders at elementary schools. Trump and Noem have a lot to answer for. Trump has already had the Mayor of Newark and Dem Congresswoman LaMonica McIver arrested and charged for standing up to ICE, no doubt he will also try to throw Senator Padilla in jail too. The only reason why Trump isn't conducting mass arrests of his political opponents is because of our courts. That's why Defend Our Courts is working non-stop to help Dem supreme court justices in key swing states where Trump is attempting to replace them with MAGA loyalists who will let him act as a dictator and rig elections in his favor - like in Pennsylvania's upcoming 2025 supreme court retention election. [Will you help us fight back and defend our courts from Trump's attempts to become a dictator?](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TPag2tMxAndVyF08YW4SJh-eGTGdms7GRIh7S5mMEFqvzhtGqRm6wsjW0Fm9XlYtFPVX0G3-jBpJWQ6tHhobpX15UYBfq56Ks1YdTNHxBhU278xcH3cpkJaGfIJTS0RZHax67rIF3FbXb6PXQLJt60QKY7F7DXo1W5cOgj4FUjg0fxBJQSqubxzmWRFBpv5F8Lar728MEBJA1c67gQcJudhhwIPAtNvSaM83GYDRV_U=&c=AtPnsKYJLhnXb_XIjilN_lHEFpZxru-u34vZSoeSZ_IrmzcsscltIA==&ch=c10Wvr3xuG9evhVvtdVI0_RVawRM2otw6VNbLqzZRDB9MBpy9zfjzg==)
