name: Team DNC
subject: Abigail Spanberger:
body:
---
Derek, At the DNC, it’s our job to send resources where they’re needed most, when they’re needed most to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. This year, we’ve done just that — and have stopped Elon Musk from buying a Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin, elected Democratic mayors in San Antonio and Omaha, and more. **Now, we’re gearing up to do it again in Virginia.** [**If that’s all you need to hear and you’re ready to get involved as the general election begins, pitch in now to support the DNC’s work to organize _everywhere_ — in Virginia and beyond:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?refcode=em_20250612_3713_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3713_22930333_AeRbq9&akid=3713%2E22930333%2EAeRbq9) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?refcode=em_20250612_3713_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3713_22930333_AeRbq9&akid=3713%2E22930333%2EAeRbq9)** With your help, we have the opportunity to make Democrat Abigail Spanberger Virginia’s next governor _and_ send a powerful message nationally. Abigail is a public servant who will get things done for working families — keep communities safe, lower costs, and protect our rights. She’s worked to protect and serve our country her whole career, including in Congress. Meanwhile, her opponent is a rubber stamp for Trump’s agenda: She has a record of supporting a near-total abortion ban, and recently downplayed the federal layoffs that are jeopardizing the jobs and livelihoods of thousands of Virginians, instead saying: “Do not fret.” **This election has huge implications — not just for people in Virginia, but all over the country. It’s our _only_ chance to flip a governor’s seat this year and send an unmistakable message that voters are rejecting Trump’s disastrous agenda.** [**If we can win in states like Virginia and beyond, we’ll be showing that voters are fed up with Trump, Republicans, and their corruption and chaos. But we can only send that message if we have the resources _now_ to fund our on-the-ground organizing work. If that work is worth $3 to you, we’re asking for your support today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?refcode=em_20250612_3713_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3713_22930333_AeRbq9&akid=3713%2E22930333%2EAeRbq9) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250612_3713_fr&refcode2=3713_22930333_AeRbq9&akid=3713%2E22930333%2EAeRbq9)**

clean_body: Derek, At the DNC, it’s our job to send resources where they’re needed most, when they’re needed most to elect Democrats up and down the ballot. This year, we’ve done just that — and have stopped Elon Musk from buying a Supreme Court seat in Wisconsin, elected Democratic mayors in San Antonio and Omaha, and more. Now, we’re gearing up to do it again in Virginia. With your help, we have the opportunity to make Democrat Abigail Spanberger Virginia’s next governor and send a powerful message nationally. Abigail is a public servant who will get things done for working families — keep communities safe, lower costs, and protect our rights. She’s worked to protect and serve our country her whole career, including in Congress. Meanwhile, her opponent is a rubber stamp for Trump’s agenda: She has a record of supporting a near-total abortion ban, and recently downplayed the federal layoffs that are jeopardizing the jobs and livelihoods of thousands of Virginians, instead saying: “Do not fret.” This election has huge implications — not just for people in Virginia, but all over the country. It’s our only chance to flip a governor’s seat this year and send an unmistakable message that voters are rejecting Trump’s disastrous agenda. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for your partnership in this important work. We are so grateful. name: Katie Porter
subject: Don’t doubt if you can make a difference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39798%2E3422442%2EJyv9_A)
Dear Derek,
The most common reason I hear for Americans not getting involved in politics is not that they don’t care—it’s that they question whether they can make a difference.
**Let’s be crystal clear: your voice matters.**
Before I ran for office as a first-time candidate in 2018, I had doubts myself. I kept waiting for someone else to give me the opportunity to serve my community, but with all the terrible things happening in the first Trump administration, I decided I was done waiting.
**With Trump and his cronies now emboldened, the same calling and urgency I felt in 2018 is even greater today.**
If you’re wondering who is going to save us from the mess we’re in, stop looking around and start looking in a mirror.
Your voice has power—that’s exactly why extremists like Donald Trump are so invested in trying to silence it through chaos and intimidation.
Join a peaceful protest. Volunteer in your community. Make sure your friends, neighbors, and social media followers know what Trump is doing. **[Donate to a candidate or cause you believe in (I hope you’ll consider my campaign for governor!).](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250612_1_ak?refcode=em20250612-39798&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39798_3422442_Jyv9_A&akid=39798%2E3422442%2EJyv9_A)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250612_1_ak?refcode=em20250612-39798&refcode2=39798_3422442_Jyv9_A&akid=39798%2E3422442%2EJyv9_A)
You won’t be waiting long to see the difference you can make.
—Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250612-39798&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39798_3422442_Jyv9_A&akid=39798%2E3422442%2EJyv9_A)**

name: Jane Fonda
subject: I want to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Are Democrats doing enough?

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109456954/551161711/1328794144?refcode=ea.6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjZWUzZDRhLWE4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hBM7hQCparhxIgFye2WD7zuhVV498W0-av1gmTQhv7o=&emci=da2e3213-3b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
I’ve been in this fight for a long time, and if there’s one thing I know, it’s that the climate crisis is no longer a distant warning. We feel it in the record-breaking heat. We see it in the wildfires, the floods, and the rising toll on frontline communities. And still, too many of our leaders in Washington act like we have time to spare. Last month made that crystal clear. California had a mandate to phase out the sale of new gas-powered cars by 2035. It was an ambitious rule that could have shaped national climate policy for years to come. **But when anti-climate lawmakers got the chance to roll back that law, dozens of congressional Democrats joined Republicans to overturn it.** I want to be crystal clear: At JanePAC, we don’t support leaders just because they have a “D” next to their name. We support leaders who are willing to take risks and fight to protect everything that’s on the line right now — from our planet to our fundamental rights and democracy. We can’t afford to stay quiet when even our so-called climate allies are letting us down. So I’m personally reaching out to hear your take. | **[Do you believe Democrats in Washington are doing enough to combat the climate crisis?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109456955/551161712/-548908541?refcode=ea.6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjZWUzZDRhLWE4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hBM7hQCparhxIgFye2WD7zuhVV498W0-av1gmTQhv7o=&emci=da2e3213-3b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)** | [**YES, THEY ARE**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109456963/551161718/-548908541?refcode=ea.6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjZWUzZDRhLWE4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hBM7hQCparhxIgFye2WD7zuhVV498W0-av1gmTQhv7o=&emci=da2e3213-3b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105) | [**NO, THEY ARE NOT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109456965/551161724/-548908541?refcode=ea.6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZjZWUzZDRhLWE4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hBM7hQCparhxIgFye2WD7zuhVV498W0-av1gmTQhv7o=&emci=da2e3213-3b42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6cee3d4a-a847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)

I value your voice. Your response will help my team and me understand where this movement stands, so we can keep putting pressure on the leaders in Congress, sharpen our strategy, and support the candidates who won’t back down when the stakes are high.
Let’s fight like hell for our planet.
xx Jane

clean_body: Are Democrats doing enough? | I’ve been in this fight for a long time, and if there’s one thing I know, it’s that the climate crisis is no longer a distant warning. We feel it in the record-breaking heat. We see it in the wildfires, the floods, and the rising toll on frontline communities. And still, too many of our leaders in Washington act like we have time to spare. Last month made that crystal clear. California had a mandate to phase out the sale of new gas-powered cars by 2035. It was an ambitious rule that could have shaped national climate policy for years to come. But when anti-climate lawmakers got the chance to roll back that law, dozens of congressional Democrats joined Republicans to overturn it. I want to be crystal clear: At JanePAC, we don’t support leaders just because they have a “D” next to their name. We support leaders who are willing to take risks and fight to protect everything that’s on the line right now — from our planet to our fundamental rights and democracy. We can’t afford to stay quiet when even our so-called climate allies are letting us down. So I’m personally reaching out to hear your take. | | | ---|--- I value your voice. Your response will help my team and me understand where this movement stands, so we can keep putting pressure on the leaders in Congress, sharpen our strategy, and support the candidates who won’t back down when the stakes are high. Let’s fight like hell for our planet. xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: Trump’s crackdown escalates — Marines now on U.S. streets

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061225_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061225_2]
Peter,
We are watching a real-time authoritarian takeover unfold in Los Angeles — and every moment we fail to act is a moment Trump tightens his grip.
Here’s what’s happening:
🔴 Trump ordered 700 U.S. Marines into L.A. — in addition to 4,000 National Guard troops already deployed
🔴 Peaceful protesters were met with curfews, batons, tear gas, and mass arrests
🔴 Neither Governor Newsom nor Mayor Bass approved the escalation
🔴 And now — Trump is calling for Newsom’s ARREST for speaking out
This isn’t leadership.
This is dictatorship.
And if we don’t organize and fund resistance right now, we risk normalizing the worst abuses of power we’ve seen in generations.
We’re building a war chest to support Democrats at the state and local level who are directly confronting this dangerous power grab — but we can’t do it without you. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: California may be first, but it clearly will not end here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee
body:
| Friend, Donald Trump, without consulting with California's law enforcement leaders, commandeered 2,000 of our state's National Guard members to deploy on our streets. Illegally, and for no reason. This brazen abuse of power by a sitting President inflamed a combustible situation putting our people, our officers, and the National Guard at risk. body:

Peter,

You’re not gonna believe this...

**George Soros just dumped MILLIONS into Texas** to try and flip our state blue.

I wish I were kidding.

Soros is bankrolling a group called ****Texas Majority PAC**** , and they’ve teamed up with the Texas Democrats to launch a massive campaign—** _eight figures_** —to try and buy the 2026 elections.

They’re calling it “Blue Texas.”

I call it an absolute nightmare.

[**Before I continue, will you chip in an emergency contribution immediately to help stop George Soros and the radical left from turning Texas blue?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1e69d385202744f796848733493e6ad7&_e=G1bjLNo0jU0jf68aDhu04X2CYEi6672jnip07Cq79FsdwaAN1TirGamQjQ8b6x7TIGpmTXa4nJhDJl5Xopj_0OqHbtSha2Rq6PsRMdGiTMz_ExBR_hhnR44oQyF7z7j_VQpqL3JcDpwL92oZpthLdyNgg6SbGI-FBHM8BpvOaimnTwu7C-US7XEJZAgpAP_gr3yd7gh93J0zv5Hh0zLFq2tQDjFoGGYyg9k10hh9VqY56Gndi8gGXarSkEaSYBOnPo9eejx2ShVYr_7qz9X8owRYGSlM0qlkjzrzYHRhEyP5d_cE_VJC4QHLK4oRhxJxGGrHL739lqYk2bCOPTITcfIksE19LaPgOpk-lj2LXMsqddcF0ga4QCzXGSyejaDorpgFdfz_RBeOfbXiYxBR_fD5mhiV-ICFjE_T5k1ViOiv69YlTGSAC3AvyyRb6nqb)

They’re planning rallies all over the state—Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio—you name it. They’ve even got a “Turn Texas Blue” tour hitting over **24 cities**.

Look, Soros has spent years successfully destroying cities with soft-on-crime DAs and radical leftist prosecutors. And now he wants to bring that same chaos to every city across Texas?

_**Not on my watch.**_

I’ll tell you what this is really about:

The left knows they can’t win on ideas. So they’re trying to BUY power. They want to pump cash into every corner of our state and hope Texans don’t notice what’s happening.

Well, we noticed. And we’re not gonna sit back and let it happen.

[**I’m asking you—right now—to stand up and help me stop this madness. Chip in $20.26, $50, or whatever you can to help us fight back:**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=1e69d385202744f796848733493e6ad7&_e=G1bjLNo0jU0jf68aDhu04X2CYEi6672jnip07Cq79FsdwaAN1TirGamQjQ8b6x7TIGpmTXa4nJhDJl5Xopj_0OqHbtSha2Rq6PsRMdGiTMz_ExBR_hhnR44oQyF7z7j_VQpqL3JcDpwL92oZpthLdyNgg6SbGI-FBHM8BpvOaimnTwu7C-US7XEJZAgpAP_gr3yd7gh93J0zv5Hh0zLFq2tQDjFoGGYyg9k10hh9VqY56Gndi8gGXarSkEaSYBOnPo9eejx2ShVYr_7qz9X8o4tP7CNcvI4QhhwBl7sS1OjkfJWtwYAM1hbaIqgX4fPFmbd8Q1g46d_aOWfT8aX5wjVgszr-f2S2OxOXAKF499qXaz2_DZyrbjjoTAyuH_2avzMJ85h2v5YAY8fBEImQmQ9GXlBNl8AZaqGQvDhgUZ54dj_3pw5i-NAaw7Gqs2-H)

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

subject: Built for men who don't flinch...
body:
No flash. No fluff. Just a rugged tool...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21573/6374453/1dc1db6e386aaf9630a798b5a7f2d710d68d1734/1b84d2c72b46ed44275ad7b97f7b71fa73d74c13)

_June 12th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
| | Some guys talk tough. Others carry it. The Steel River Executioner was built for one kind of man: **The kind who doesn’t back down.**
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21573/6374453/1dc1db6e386aaf9630a798b5a7f2d710d68d1734/1b84d2c72b46ed44275ad7b97f7b71fa73d74c13)

But since day one, Donald Trump has done the opposite: prioritizing his wealthy donors while leaving everyday Americans behind. Instead of focusing on the real challenges families face, Trump is attacking political opponents, rolling back fundamental rights, and attacking programs like Social Security. At New Dems, we believe there's a better way: building an economy that grows without leaving people behind. | **300,000 Virginians to Lose Healthcare In Federal Budget** A new report from the Joint Economic Committee estimates that the proposed and pending changes to Medicaid and health insurance under the Affordable Care Act would push 166,025 Virginians off Medicaid and cause 136,583 to lose coverage through the Virginia Health Benefits Exchange, leaving a total of 302,608 more state residents without health insurance. The estimated losses fall in more rural districts in Southwest and Southside Virginia.

---
Don't get complacent, come out and canvass! There will be an informative discussion on how you can get involved in the campaign, and an opportunity to knock doors. Whether you're new to volunteering or an experienced activist, there are plenty of ways to help Sam win this election! East Gate Park is located at 1620 North Ave NE, Roanoke, VA 24012.

**Washington Park Pool****Now Open**
---
The Washington Park Pool is open! Stop by for a dip this summer. Washington Park features an array of features including a playground (updated in 2022), Lick Run Greenway access, exercise equipment and basketball courts. The bottom section of the park is home to one of Roanoke’s two public outdoor swimming pools (built in 2025), a basketball court, shelter, and restrooms.

**Rainbow Run 2025 - 5K & 10K - June****14****

Come out and join the community for the 5th annual Rainbow Run. Choose between 5k or 10K, both with virtual options. Run or walk, it's totally up to you and everyone is welcome. # RCPS SUMMER SERVICE MEAL
---
Roanoke City Public Schools will offer free summer meals to children ages 18 years or younger through the USDA's Summer Food Service Program (SFSP). Meals are provided on-site on a first-come, first-served basis at school locations. Full times, dates, and locations can be found [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109459501/551171315/801713345?fbclid=IwY2xjawK3pr1leHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETE3UmczVUw4STQzcllhRkx4AR7xTz53HGhPyd349Uni_9Ng3nSSmzO9LZZuK7sQl7uP60z-nD9816wF8HXlnw_aem_0dGCGVohuGizgTqT_dcnSw&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjYxYjg4OS1hZTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Jrn2NjECLKIRE2JSzuTPAzSxpquYsxEXs9oq2UcsgY=&emci=3d9c2422-2346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4661b889-ae47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010).

# RCPS SUMMER PROGRAMS
---

Their Roanoke Summer Connect directory provides a list of free and low-cost resources. RCPS offers summer programs for all ages to provide students with a way to remain connected to their school over the summer. Learn more about these programs [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109459502/551171318/-1537266494?fbclid=IwY2xjawKjVi5leHRuA2FlbQIxMABicmlkETFiVG90WUt3Nm55cndYdFZtAR4sKQejI6ycYp0BDTF1DWIxV3FTSybXjspATK913eMBKEme5Y9e5DVRkcEo4w_aem_je_FID3GL8IEJAruGq0yBg&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NjYxYjg4OS1hZTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Jrn2NjECLKIRE2JSzuTPAzSxpquYsxEXs9oq2UcsgY=&emci=3d9c2422-2346-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4661b889-ae47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18273010).

The Trump regime is doing everything in its power to target immigrants, create fear, and fabricate excuses to deploy the military on immigrants and on U.S. born citizens.
As an immigrant myself, and as someone fortunate to work as a human rights lawyer, this anti-immigrant hate strikes to my core. And that's why I'm speaking up without hesitation. In this piece I provide guidance on how to protect your rights when ICE tries to strip them away, and I provide clear action items on how you can work to protect immigrant rights. As I've said before, I cannot do this alone--[I need your partnership](https://substack.com/redirect/95ed1888-524b-4ffa-a018-ba7ed32366cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I am grateful for your trust to stand united against fascism. **Let 's Address This.**
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..krbwVo7jKafAHuwVRpp3RgL5vCHUeoK38MSmc2i2aH4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=165790330)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ea01e068-b3ec-4c7a-b745-67a78c79d449?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Anti-ICE protesters in Downtown Los Angeles on June 8, 2025. Credit: Middle East Images/AFP via Getty
## Part 1: Answering FAQs
Here are answers to four of the most common questions I've received on how to protect yourself during these ICE raids. ICE is short for Immigration and Customs Enforcement. Feel free to post additional questions in the comments and I will do my best to answer them, or direct you to the right resource.
### 1\. In light of ICE raids, should I send my child to school?
Student and child safety is of paramount importance. As I've shared in detail, Trump is sending his cronies into schools, while lying about who they are, and refusing to show ID--all to literally kidnap children and deport them. This is absolutely fascism. So what do we do?
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ad95b6e7-a334-48ca-bfa5-9a4eabee5274?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
First, call your local board of education and teacher's union now to understand what steps they are taking to protect your children, and how you can be involved.
Second, demand your city council break any agreements with ICE, and instead ensure this remains a local matter, not a Federal matter (more on this below).
Third, this cannot only be an action taken by immigrant parents. I especially ask those who are US citizens or do not have undocumented children to stand firm as an ally--contact your local board of education and teacher's union and ask them how you can get involved.
### 2\. What do I do if I am stopped by ICE?
If stopped by an ICE agent, do your best to remain calm. And while the following information is not official legal advice (mandatory disclaimer), this is what I would and have advised my legal clients.
* Have memorized your A number, phone number of your lawyer, and of your family.
* Do not speak to ICE agents without your lawyer present. If you are asked to speak, give testimony, or sign any document--exercise your right to remain silent.
* Do not lie or give false documents or false statements. Know that ICE agents are allowed to lie to you to get you to speak. You are not allowed to lie to ICE agents.
* If an ICE agent appears your door, you do not have to allow them to enter your home unless they have a criminal search warrant signed by a judge. You are completely within your rights to turn them away, or refuse to open the door, if they do not provide you a signed warrant.

In short, the only words you should say to ICE agents are to ask if they have a warrant for your arrest. If they do not, send them on their way. If they do, then request to speak with your lawyer and say no more to ICE. Citizen or not, documented immigrant or not--your documentation status does not restrict your right to speak to a lawyer. Exercise your rights.
### 3\. Should I call local police for help?
Calling your local police to stop ICE officers is not necessarily a great idea. For example, even right now in LA, the LAPD issued a statement acknowledging that the protests were peaceful, yet have still aligned with ICE and the Trump regime against ordinary residents of Los Angeles.
Likewise, certain jurisdictions have what are known as 287g agreements and in such a situation, calling your local police potentially obliges them to arrest you on behalf of ICE. If you have questions or concerns on how to respond to ICE agents, call your lawyer, and let your lawyer speak on your behalf.
### 4\. What If I do not have a lawyer?
It is advisable to reach out to lawyers ahead of time in case you need to call them in an emergency. You can (and need to be) fully transparent with your lawyer about your immigration status. They will only be able to assist you if they have all the information needed at hand. If English is not your preferred language, most law firms have lawyers that can speak multiple languages, or have access to translators.
If you are arrested and cannot afford a lawyer, ask for a public defender. Especially if you are being charged with a crime, wait for your public defender. And to repeat yet again, no matter what, do not speak to law enforcement without a lawyer present.
## Part 2: How US Citizens can help protect immigrants and immigrant communities
We are not helpless. Truth requires courage. And I encourage everyone to take action. Some of the seven action items below have immediate effect and others take time. I ask you to engage in both types of calls to action. We must act quickly to protect our immigrant neighbors now, and build capacity to change fascist policy in the future.
### **1\. Activate**
Get involved in your local politics. Whether it is your local school board, your local city council, your local teacher's union, or your local immigrant rights organization--get involved. Show up to the next meeting, meet your local elected officials, and understand the local issues impacting your community. Google is your friend in finding a local calendar of events. Use it. All politics is local, and it is critical you get involved locally.
### **2\. Communicate**
Contact your member of Congress ([find them here](https://substack.com/redirect/c8be4df1-b286-4ee7-82e9-2b16df7684ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and relentlessly remind them that you do not support mass deportations or ICE raids. Instead, you do support due process of law, a humane immigration policy, and equal rights for immigrants. Ensure they hear your outrage as much as possible. They have to document how many times they are called and on what subject, so ensure they know a just immigration system matters to you.
### **3\. Invest**
Invest your time and your money into the people and organizations doing the front line work. If you have time to volunteer, make phone calls, knock doors, and sign petitions, do so. If you have the financial resources to donate to organizations working to protect our democracy, please do so. Start by donating to your local immigration rights orgs.
### **4\. Educate**
It is critical we remain informed on the key issues, by educating ourselves and those around us. As corporate media sadly continues to capitulate to fascism, support writers and human rights lawyers working to stop fascism in America (e.g. [like yours truly](https://substack.com/redirect/95ed1888-524b-4ffa-a018-ba7ed32366cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). Read the work of non-profit media like ProPublica, The Appeal, and more. We may not have the billions of dollars in dark money from corporate autocrats, but we have strength in numbers and your support makes that difference.
### **5\. Organize**
Bring friends with you. You are the best ambassador for justice in your friend group--lead by example. Grab even one friend and drag them with you to the next school board meeting, city council session, or town hall in your local community. We need to build organizational capacity, and means each one reaches one to get involved. (And when your friend comes to the second meeting, it is their opportunity to reach one more and bring them with).
### **6\. Sanctuary Locations**
During the previous Trump regime, some 800 or more churches, synagogues, and other houses of worship established themselves as sanctuary locations for immigrants. These are locations that invited immigrants who feared deportation to remain within their walls for housing, food, and safety. To be clear, these sanctuary locations have no particular legal authority, and ICE agents can still procure a warrant to search sanctuary locations and arrest anyone a judge has authorized for arrest.
However, these sanctuary locations served as another line of protection for those fearing such raids. These locations forced ICE to have to make the decision of whether they want to violently raid a house of worship. And given the passing of the Laken Riley Act, which allows authorities to arrest and deport immigrants on the mere accusation of a crime--including petty and non-violent crimes like shoplifting--sanctuary locations may be a source to help protect innocent people.
### **7\. Repeal 287g Agreements**
Earlier I promised I'd discuss this in more detail. Here's the background on how 287g agreements work--and why we must repeal them. The Illegal Immigration Reform and Immigrant Responsibility Act of 1996 added Section 287(g) to the Immigration and Nationality Act. This authorized ICE to force state and local police to do what ICE wants them to do--in this case, round up immigrants.
In other words, 287g agreements allow federal ICE officers to require local and state police officers to work for them. These agreements are why it's incredibly risky to call local police on immigration issues. And it is a devastating policy for several reasons:
* It pulls local human resources for local needs and forces them to do federal work.
* It puts women suffering abuse at risk. If an undocumented woman is suffering abuse, her abuser knows that she cannot go to law enforcement without fear of deportation, separation from her children, or permanent detention. Thus, 287g agreements perpetuate the cycle of abuse countless women already face.
* There's no evidence this agreement makes us safer. In fact, a detailed study by the National Institute of Justice across 167 counties that enforce 287g agreements, "_found no evidence that 287(g) arrangements were linked to meaningful crime reduction_."
* On the contrary, there have been hundreds and hundreds of reported cases of sexual abuse committed by ICE agents in detention facilities, and few of them are ever investigated or resolved. To ask ICE to round up immigrants, while ICE itself has a documented history of epidemic sexual abuse, is the height of absurdity and hypocrisy.

Currently, ICE has some form of a 287g agreement with hundreds of police departments across 25 states--[which I have uploaded here](https://substack.com/redirect/9c023dd4-6754-46ef-b97a-c53c876bed2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for your convenience.
Here's the key call to action--287g agreements cannot go into effect until local government approves their enforcement. That means, if your locality has a 287g agreement in place, it is because your local elected officials voted for it. Therefore, they can be repealed with that same local authority. And that local authority will only act to repeal these abusive agreements if local citizens activate, organize, and invest in that change. So, if you live in one of the states or localities listed above, advocate to your city council, mayor, or relevant governing authority to repeal this harmful agreement and instead uphold meaningful justice.
And if you do not live in such a locality, you can still petition your local government to pass ordinances to protect immigrants from abusive federal enforcement.
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..krbwVo7jKafAHuwVRpp3RgL5vCHUeoK38MSmc2i2aH4?&gift=true)
## In Conclusion
Trump's anti-immigrant raids are hurting the American people, the U.S. economy, and betrays our constitutional right to equal justice and due process. No one is claiming that the U.S. immigration system is perfect. However, the facts are clear--immigrants make our country safer, healthier, and stronger economically. Rather than falling for political propaganda that demonizes immigrants, we should focus on meaningful immigration reform that maximizes public safety, economic growth, and public health.
My immense gratitude to those who are investing their time, money, and efforts to uphold meaningful justice in America, including for immigrant communities. Do not lose hope. Instead, double down your efforts. Be relentless. In standing united, we can build a fairer, more just, and more effective immigration system that continues to advance American growth and success.

name: Donavan McKinney
subject: This is personal for me.
body:
I’m fighting to protect Medicaid.
#
Peter,
My childhood was not much different than what many families in the Mighty 13th still experience today. Growing up, my mom worked two and three jobs just to put food on our table and keep our lights on — and even then, times were still tough. But public programs meant my family, and many families like ours, didn’t have to struggle alone.
Medicaid, SNAP, and free school lunches kept me healthy and able to learn as a kid. And when I went to college, Pell grants paid for my books, tuition, and more. **I wouldn’t be where I am today without these public programs.** Hell, I might not even be here at all.
So when I see politicians in Washington standing by as Medicaid funding is slashed, I take it personally. **Up to 43% of our community in the Mighty 13th are set to lose their healthcare from this cruel Republican bill. And because I know exactly who gets hurt when those services are taken away: working-class families, kids, seniors, and people struggling to survive.**
**People just like you. And people just like me.**
Let’s be clear: **cutting Medicaid, SNAP, and these critical public programs that literally keep our community members alive is a moral failure.** It will mean grandmas going without life-saving medication. Kids going hungry. Hospitals closing. Thousands of our families suffering — all because Trump wanted tax breaks for his own family, and his super-rich donors. It’s the largest wealth transfer in history to the top 1%: at our community’s expense.
It’s cruelty and corruption, plain and simple. And it’s being driven by the same selfish set of multimillionaires who only care about the health of their own pocketbooks, not the health of the people they are meant to represent.
In Congress, I’ll fight to restore and expand funding for critical public programs like Medicaid and SNAP. **But to get there, I need your help.**
**[Will you chip in today to my campaign and Justice Democrats to help us build a government that takes care of its people instead of ignoring those most in need?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250612-dm?refcode=em20250612-36753&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36753_1203867_WSqV_J&akid=36753%2E1203867%2EWSqV_J)**
**[Contribute $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250612-dm?refcode=em20250612-36753&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36753_1203867_WSqV_J&akid=36753%2E1203867%2EWSqV_J)**
This fight is personal for me. And I will not stop until every person has the care and dignity they deserve.
In solidarity,
Donavan McKinney

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250612-36753-footer&t=2&refcode2=36753_1203867_WSqV_J&akid=36753%2E1203867%2EWSqV_J)**

Being in the “democracy business,” as I like to call it, isn’t always easy, but it is always worth it.
Minnesota regularly leads the nation in voter turnout because we do things right:**we respect voters, we invest in secure systems, and we build trust.**
_**That work has never mattered more.**_
The forces working to undermine democracy are loud and dangerous, but we can be louder, more organized, and more committed.
**[I’m not backing down. Not now, not ever. Join me by chipping in $5 or more today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109460790/551175909/1241229473?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250612&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ0Y2ZkNWQtYWY0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UUu8xzsIkIXFrz5Ffvs58WRCntl3M6X9-9HHE3v4GFo=) **
Thank you,
Steve

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Don't miss it: Join us for an exclusive briefing on our Senate plans
body:
TODAY at 6pm ET / 3pm PT

If you are unable to see the message below, [click here to view](https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI1OTg0NjIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjI0MDg1OTM5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0).
| | | | ICYMI — TODAY at 6pm ET / 3pm PT, join our exclusive briefing with activists across the country. You’ll hear about our plans to help stop Senate Republicans from passing the billionaire tax scam that will raise our costs, gut clean energy investment, and expand drilling on public lands.
---
| | [**Click here to RSVP for the briefing,**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/WabwQy6eZ_) and we’ll be in touch later today with call-in details. Hope to see you there!
---
|
* * *
---
| |
---
|
* * *
---
| | | | [ ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_)
---
| | Peter,
---
| | Right now, Senate Republicans are rushing to try to pass a bill that would gut clean energy investments, severely increase energy costs for consumers, and create pay-to-play schemes for polluters to ignore environmental safeguards and drill on public lands, along with other threats to people’s health and safety. **It’s on track to be one of the most harmful, costly, and sweeping pieces of legislation ever.**
---
| | If you want to learn more about our plans to fight back, join us on **Thursday, June 12th, at 6pm ET / 3pm PT** for an exclusive briefing with environmental organizations and activists from across the country to discuss the plan of action, and how you can get involved. We will be joined by special guest **Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer** to give us the latest from the Senate on how we’re fighting dangerous budget cuts that threaten clean air, safe drinking water, public lands, affordable clean energy choices, and good-paying jobs.
---
| | | [ RSVP TODAY ](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/YYbZBxPkKXS~)
---
| | Thanks for all you do, Peter, and we’ll see you on June 12th.
---
| | Tiernan Sittenfeld
Senior Vice President, Government AffairsLeague of Conservation Voters
---
| | |
* * *
---
| | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,[ _update your contact information_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12598462&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDg1OTM5MAS2&spReportId=MjI0MDg1OTM5MAS2) _._ [_Click here to unsubscribe_](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12598462&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjI0MDg1OTM5MAS2&spReportId=MjI0MDg1OTM5MAS2) from our supporter list. [_Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here_](mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=) , or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.
**740 15th St NW, Suite 700**
**Washington, DC 20005**
**202-785-8683**
---
| | | [ DONATE ](https://links.messages.lcv.)
---
|

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: About to be on the road with Bernie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
I’m joining Bernie Sanders on the road in Texas.
We’ll be bringing people together to fight back NOW and not wait until 2026 or 2028. As you probably know, I have been holding town halls across Texas for months and have seen the power that comes from bringing people together: sharing stories, encouraging others to volunteer or run for office, and committing ourselves to the meaningful action that this moment demands, whether it’s registering voters, protesting, or holding our elected representatives accountable.
Republican Representatives in Texas don’t want to face their own constituents. They’re scared to face the people they represent. That’s why Bernie and I are going to meet people where they are, to listen to and fight right alongside them.
[**If you are in a position to do so, please consider pitching in a few bucks to help cover the costs of travel as I continue to hit the road in Texas (this time alongside Bernie Sanders) in these next few days.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250612.gRH_uK&refcode=ema20250612-240148&t=1&akid=240148%2E444211%2E7uEeQd)
**[DONATE $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250612.gRH_uK&refcode=ema20250612-240148&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=240148%2E444211%2E7uEeQd)**
Thank you for reading,
Beto

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250612-240148-footer&t=21&refcode2=240148_444211_7uEeQd&akid=240148%2E444211%2E7uEeQd)**

name: Congressman Tim Walberg
subject: Take back our classrooms
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WALBERG FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’re watching as classrooms are turned into battlegrounds for cultural experiments, where traditional values are pushed aside and young, impressionable minds are caught in the crossfire. |
---

Dear Fellow American,

As Chairman of the Education and Workforce Committee, I’ve seen firsthand how far some will go to take control of our children’s education—and it's nothing short of alarming.

Instead of focusing on reading, writing, and preparing students for successful futures, many school administrators are prioritizing political agendas. Across the country, children as young as kindergarten are being exposed to confusing and inappropriate lessons about gender identity, sexuality, and radical social ideologies—often without their parents' knowledge or consent.

**This isn’t education—it’s indoctrination.**

We’re watching as classrooms are turned into battlegrounds for cultural experiments, where foundational skills are pushed aside and young, impressionable minds are caught in the crossfire. Parents are being silenced. And our children are paying the price.

[**If you agree that we need real leadership and bold action to restore sanity in our schools, I need you to show your support.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5eb799b3e13f48d2a97531f931ac22b8&_e=MKPuOcQyNsbGPefK_1gwDm33VAyrrks9_YeYrrlVYXXGPn8jdG7Su6VPTR4JyRayPhV7_Z1vl2mn3lI3giyaTLwa7Fl6Koyvz7qXgTehrEcTJwKwlSgvcM1xiCYNmhMvi9Kb937pfnT41BeLJip2_lFryazpUkK8bZceiq-pzzIG29QU9tC3TAxUhKuFUfaRCdx_Gp2cBBtwwgEa9hcvYi_65XUWBkttU-3tPLV1GYTAo5d4C63tPDrx81ctLT1Eo3LFXC-MGU8ygeCFws47aMU-eIkZH5MlrlmNV1tHLDuDUfE_vJHuq9722i_jGyd8M1RfKhieC4th-6wNOhfXLDUG8Qcj-8lP-lQa8mloUI2irtvnu0-Z_iKUUY8LoWH0uPJyT7mGx90gTdrqlSKCFWRMH_9FXkWCMhl-OyjsMlQ%3D)

| [** MAKE A DONATION **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5eb799b3e13f48d2a97531f931ac22b8&_e=MKPuOcQyNsbGPefK_1gwDm33VAyrrks9_YeYrrlVYXXGPn8jdG7Su6VPTR4JyRayPhV7_Z1vl2mn3lI3giyaTLwa7Fl6Koyvz7qXgTehrEcTJwKwlSgvcM1xiCYNmhMvi9Kb937pfnT41BeLJip2_lFryazpUkK8bZceiq-pzzIG29QU9tC3TAxUhKuFUfaRCdx_Gp2cBBtwwgEa9hcvYi_65XUWBkttU-3tPLV1GYTAo5d4C63tPDrx81ctLT1EDDLdD2FCVs31nRcIYQkGgWcQF4vq6rXya_hGlO1aSO6NKXlHTfNt1XH3Hqum3BgR-btkK4TTI9NEExJQA0JS6czU8lXpmVP3L09LgYHa9sxUSH6j0R2bvyNn8QXz5qofbcSbCRN9h8aYKn-8Tc6Fv0psAvg_NBawGRMmlM2rnhU%3D)
---

As Chairman, I’m fighting every day to put students and parents back at the center of our education system—not bureaucrats, unions, or radical activists. We’re working to protect parental rights, uphold transparency, and ensure that schools return to their core mission: **educating, not indoctrinating.**

_But I can’t do it alone._

[**Will you stand with me in this fight? Your support today will help us push back against the radical left’s takeover of our classrooms and defend the values we hold dear.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5eb799b3e13f48d2a97531f931ac22b8&_e=MKPuOcQyNsbGPefK_1gwDm33VAyrrks9_YeYrrlVYXXGPn8jdG7Su6VPTR4JyRayPhV7_Z1vl2mn3lI3giyaTLwa7Fl6Koyvz7qXgTehrEcTJwKwlSgvcM1xiCYNmhMvi9Kb937pfnT41BeLJip2_lFryazpUkK8bZceiq-pzzIG29QU9tC3TAxUhKuFUfaRCdx_Gp2cBBtwwgEa9hcvYi_65XUWBkttU-3tPLV1GYTAo5d4C63tPDrx81ctLT1EXZoATgEtLcP5Lih-eNcHd9Jk6ghZbDjK6jwNxphcorHxOXJU4051Xem4RlLZOnpzASLwV5r3KNS35p6ZLA-u7CMqP40eVCGSQte7hU0l01NUQFCA5ZjnBMl7zHP7-y34V5DkLcI6t0bJo7dcenxl1p70Xj0-GfKMephkrPQlJ7s%3D)

[** CHIP IN NOW TO PROTECT OUR CHILDREN'S FUTURE **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5eb799b3e13f48d2a97531f931ac22b8&_e=MKPuOcQyNsbGPefK_1gwDm33VAyrrks9_YeYrrlVYXXGPn8jdG7Su6VPTR4JyRayPhV7_Z1vl2mn3lI3giyaTLwa7Fl6Koyvz7qXgTehrEcTJwKwlSgvcM1xiCYNmhMvi9Kb937pfnT41BeLJip2_lFryazpUkK8bZceiq-pzzIG29QU9tC3TAxUhKuFUfaRCdx_Gp2cBBtwwgEa9hcvYi_65XUWBkttU-3tPLV1GYTAo5d4C63tPDrx81ctLT1EbnLQv15pUP02hof_z-vkzmbas7kdwOtfXPc7Z301SRlkOkXG5l_L5EOMrRcHcx6uAHS2EgkCX7vuR13pnKzUnihkOwmcsRBFKV3Wz3hvc2VEkGexoTpYO1y_FOID7x_YUSvs2g259dQKPd5U2G3wyatjqZE4HSzkytihlqfOTOs%3D)
---

Thank you for standing strong with us. Together, we can take back our schools and give every child a chance to succeed—free from political agendas.

Sincerely,

Tim Walberg

**_MEET TIM_**

Tim Walberg believes in the Michigan values of hard work, entrepreneurship, compassion, and creating opportunities for each person to use their God-given gifts to care for their families, reach for their dreams, and help their community. As an elected official, community foundation leader, manager in higher education, and pastor, Tim has demonstrated a consistent commitment to advancing opportunities for individuals to succeed and doing his part in elected office to help make America a pillar of freedom and hope in the world.

Of all of Tim's accomplishments, he is most proud of his family. Tim and his wife Sue have been married for 50 years. They live in Tipton where they raised their three now-adult children Matthew, Heidi, and Caleb. Matthew and his wife Erin, and Heidi and her husband Prince have blessed Tim and Sue with their pride and joy, their six grandchildren.

| [** Support Tim Walberg for Congress **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5eb799b3e13f48d2a97531f931ac22b8&_e=MKPuOcQyNsbGPefK_1gwDm33VAyrrks9_YeYrrlVYXXGPn8jdG7Su6VPTR4JyRayPhV7_Z1vl2mn3lI3giyaTLwa7Fl6Koyvz7qXgTehrEcTJwKwlSgvcM1xiCYNmhMvi9Kb937pfnT41BeLJip2_lFryazpUkK8bZceiq-pzzIG29QU9tC3TAxUhKuFUfaRCdx_Gp2cBBtwwgEa9hcvYi_65XUWBkttU-3tPLV1GYTAo5d4C63tPDrx81ctLT1EfDX_xrasbwU1zilhZatY25ivSKo_mLYcIQMdneFCX_4xhWf8F3O_b_WsOM3y1hkqugez8lTqCGk8kIBPGZarUsZylQIv9NbwMBuSiydMEz0k0XvmcbI7-F26SekUK-gEPDBLtWfKojteHaa3ImI0KMG817Q4S1jdmw4yHrMRDNE%3D)

name: Keith Ellison
subject: We're in uncharted territory, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Donald Trump is once again abusing the power of the executive branch.

This is uncharted territory, Peter. The scale and frequency of Trump’s executive overreach are unlike anything we’ve seen in modern American history. And the stakes get higher every single day.

From issuing sweeping executive orders that undermine the Constitution to weaponizing federal agencies against immigrants and protestors, this administration continues to test the limits of the law. Trump’s cruel ICE raids and brutal response to protests in Los Angeles are further proof that we need to rein in his authoritarian agenda.

I’ve filed numerous lawsuits against Trump and his administration, and together with my fellow Attorneys General, we’ve stopped many of his illegal orders in their tracks by challenging them on the grounds of executive overreach.

But I can promise you this fight is far from over.

It’s critical we remain vigilant, Peter. Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or whatever works for you so that I can continue holding Trump accountable for his abuses of power?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thanks for standing with me,

Keith Ellison

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: We must be prepared
body:
| | Peter,

Wildfire season has arrived in Washington, and experts have already predicted an above-average risk across the state. The reality is that natural disasters like this are increasing in frequency and severity, and our communities need to be prepared.

As tribal communities face these worsening extreme weather events and sea level rise, it’s critical that they have the resources to quickly manage and respond to the resulting damages. Last week, I helped introduce a bill to empower Tribal Nations in building environmental resiliency by removing red tape currently preventing access to those much-needed federal resources.

[There’s no time to waste when it comes to disaster preparedness, Peter. If you agree that disaster assistance should be accessible for all communities, add your name with mine here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109462837/551183125/-529101845?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_250612_1_1&refcode2=dd00fa6f-b447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDAwZmE2Zi1iNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8pa-N9EpxxYfL7BVJJ5M3Hr-MybWGa2pdXjmQfOMd8=&emci=db00fa6f-b447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=dd00fa6f-b447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31138575)

---

Protecting access to emergency preparedness and disaster response funding is just common sense, Peter. It’s not wasteful to ensure tribal communities can relocate and rebuild after a flood, or to ensure that our kids, seniors, and neighbors have a safe place to evacuate nearby.

In the wake of FEMA cancelling millions of dollars in federal funding for disaster mitigation programs across Washington, this fight is more urgent than ever.

[We must ensure all of our communities – regardless of ZIP code – are prepared for emergencies before they hit. Are you with me? Add your name here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109462839/551183127/-529101845?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_250612_1_1&refcode2=dd00fa6f-b447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDAwZmE2Zi1iNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h8pa-N9EpxxYfL7BVJJ5M3Hr-MybWGa2pdXjmQfOMd8=&emci=db00fa6f-b447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=dd00fa6f-b447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=31138575)

clean_body: | | Peter, Wildfire season has arrived in Washington, and experts have already predicted an above-average risk across the state. The reality is that natural disasters like this are increasing in frequency and severity, and our communities need to be prepared. As tribal communities face these worsening extreme weather events and sea level rise, it’s critical that they have the resources to quickly manage and respond to the resulting damages. Last week, I helped introduce a bill to empower Tribal Nations in building environmental resiliency by removing red tape currently preventing access to those much-needed federal resources. | Protecting access to emergency preparedness and disaster response funding is just common sense, Peter. It’s not wasteful to ensure tribal communities can relocate and rebuild after a flood, or to ensure that our kids, seniors, and neighbors have a safe place to evacuate nearby. In the wake of FEMA cancelling millions of dollars in federal funding for disaster mitigation programs across Washington, this fight is more urgent than ever. – Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by MGP Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Marie for Congress, Washington State Democratic Central Committee, and Timber PAC. name: Mark Warner
subject: 📎 Sharing some old photos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,
My friend Tim Kaine asked me to reach out, re-introduce myself, and share some old photos with you. Keep reading for one of my favorite photos with Tim... But first, I’m hoping you’ll consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Tim Kaine to protect my seat and take back the Senate for Democrats. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Like so many Americans, I grew up in a middle-class family and was lucky enough to attend good public schools. I have a vivid memory of being the Richard Nixon surrogate in my 8th grade class – yes I know, I’ve come a long way. I have my 8th grade history teacher, Jim Tyler, to thank for setting me on the path to being a Democrat.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Fast forward a few years, I became the first person in my family to graduate from college, made possible by working multiple jobs and taking out student loans. That’s something I’m incredibly proud of.
Before I became a U.S. Senator, I actually started out in business. I invested my entire life savings, a few thousand dollars, into my first venture... which failed in about 6 weeks, by the way. My second venture did a little better, lasting six months, but it wasn’t until my third try that things started to look up. I’m extremely proud to have founded what became one of Virginia’s leading tech companies.
It was actually that experience that got me into public service. I thought that everybody in this country ought to have the same kind of fair shot that I had. So, I ran for governor in Virginia, and won.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
And if you can believe it, my good friend Tim Kaine (now my fellow Virginia senator) was my Lieutenant Governor.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
After our four years in the governor’s office, Virginia was rated the best state for business, the best managed state, and the best state to receive a public education. But even then, I knew that my work to make sure that every family – no matter their background – has the same shot that I did, was far from over.
That’s when I ran for the United States Senate, and won.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
In the Senate, I helped spearhead the largest infrastructure and public lands investments in half a century, worked to significantly expand Virginia’s domestic manufacturing, and have fought to lower health care costs across the Commonwealth.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
But I have to tell you, in my time in the Senate – maybe in my time in politics – there has been nothing as challenging, as bizarre, and as holy sugar as the last 143 days of the second Trump administration.
This administration's corruption has made every American less safe. Trump is implementing tariffs causing prices to skyrocket for working families, refusing to fire Pete Hegseth even after he shared classified information on an unsecured platform, and backing the largest cuts to Medicaid in history to fund big tax giveaways for the wealthiest Americans.
I didn’t get into politics to let people like Trump and Elon dismantle our federal government and rebuild it for billionaires like themselves. I’m proud to lead the fight with Tim against this corrupt administration, but we can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking: can I count on you to split a contribution between Tim Kaine and my reelection campaign to protect my seat in the Senate and take back the Senate so we can keep up our work to hold this administration accountable and continue delivering for Virginia’s communities? The road ahead will not be easy, but I know, if we all stand up and speak out, we will fight back and win. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
The fight continues,
Mark Warner
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-warner]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. clean_body: He is truly one of the greatest people I’ve ever met Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this Peter, I've had the honor of working closely with President Trump as RNC Co-Chair. And let me tell you - he is one of the greatest people I've ever met. He values every American so much. Even just talking to him for a few minutes, you can tell how much he truly loves this country. That 's why it makes me absolutely FURIOUS to see the media saying that Americans are abandoning him! I want to show the world that we're standing by him even as the swamp attacks him - and that's why I'm reaching out to you. One of President Trump's most profound traits is his humility. He's never above talking to everyday Americans who believe in him. And I truly believe he would meet every single one of you if he could. He's done so much for us. Now, it's time we show the world that we'll never abandon him. DO YOU APPROVE OF PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP? Thank you, KC Crosbie RNC Co-Chair Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: The L.A. Riots Should Wake Us All Up

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: It’s official: we just won the Democratic primary in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=2289%2E135344%2EV4-fgR)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherill-feb25.OCNMSH&refcode=em250612-1&refcode2=2289.135344.V4-fgR&t=2&akid=2289%2E135344%2EV4-fgR)
---
Team, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted.
And we can’t stop now.
We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. [**Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $5 between my campaign and Elissa Slotkin today?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherill-feb25.OCNMSH&refcode=em250612-1&t=3&akid=2289%2E135344%2EV4-fgR)
**[DONATE](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherill-feb25.OCNMSH&refcode=em250612-1&t=4&akid=2289%2E135344%2EV4-fgR)**
I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.
And it’s why I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.
**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**
[**If you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Elissa Slotkin today →**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-sherill-feb25.OCNMSH&refcode=em250612-1&t=5&akid=2289%2E135344%2EV4-fgR)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Elissa Slotkin and Mikie Sherrill instantly:_

clean_body: Team, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted. And we can’t stop now. We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor. It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time. And it’s why I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t. But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution to Elissa Slotkin and Mikie Sherrill instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you so much for your support, Mikie PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826

clean_body: This is a deadly serious situation... | | | | | Fellow Conservative, Chaos in LA... Cars burning in the streets... Mobs attacking law enforcement... This is the world that Democrats want for all of us- lawless mayhem and violence. I'm so thankful that President Trump is calling in the National Guard to protect Americans. Leftist elected officials and the liberal media can't hide the truth. The American people can see what's going on with their own eyes- and we demand that California Democrats obey the law and allow law enforcement to swiftly carry out deportations immediately. I 'm proud to stand with ICE and President Trump and I know you are too. Those organizing these "protests" are now attempting to take their chaos nationwide - all because they don't want our nation's laws enforced - and earlier this week, we had rioters assault police officers in Dallas. The fact that radical-left Democrats will take the side of violent anarchy over law and order, all because of their hatred of President Trump, tells us all we need to know! We need to rally the American people around the men and women serving on the front lines in ICE, and around our National Guard troops called in to restore peace. For Liberty, Ted Cruz PS: What world do these Democrats live in where they can call this situation on the ground in Los Angeles "mostly peaceful" protesting? We're going to stop the violence in the streets and then we're going to get to the bottom of who exactly is funding these riots in the first place- thank you for standing with us! | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. | id: 2025-03-17-13:15:41:261t

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Want to see what the media won’t show you?
body:
The Left hopes you don’t see this
\- This tour went somewhere no one thought we’d reach - The Left’s strongholds are crumbling - This generation is choosing freedom - The comeback is happening — and YOU made it possible - This wasn’t just noise... - Packed crowds. Roaring students. The Left? Speechless. - We’re beating the Left. On their turf.

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=743f5c7dcf2e4825a4fa47a378d810b6&_e=QOB4FEjW9Djh-Ftd2hJlzT8K0Ieo0qxoc10FVRdnf_mxynfTui3VSrDdXrh7Q-NgIrEQ35ieL6Dm_y_p7uiJJbC0VhyMP6bbiRubC7ndSRR23m4ExlwZMGB5Mv3CiraTNnccmZ7UTGb2GxZHFAX8JbZdSASpCb1qXeyGopY0vNok9GfpWl4GscL_2ToweePLzHh2cLMncQEQsUaLXvtWCAjMKxqVAiWGqtnu69ZIIojtM0qcPQNe9s_Av8OwGfgmW5Hn1WdbGHQR6Z3ct7_10MKMqlehwe63hveE_2if7AbnvCATQrmfRuWybf6LIYxA)
---
Fellow Patriot, I’ve written a lot of messages to patriots like you over the years... but never one quite like this.Because I’ve never had this much good news to share. And I’ve never felt this much urgency to say one thing: **THANK YOU.** I don’t know if you’ve ever felt something just... _shift..._ while it was happening... But this spring on the American Comeback Tour?**I did.** And if you were standing where I stood — listening to the crowd roar before I walked up to the “Prove Me Wrong” table at our Spring Finale at UC Riverside...You would’ve felt this generational shift in real time, too.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=743f5c7dcf2e4825a4fa47a378d810b6&_e=QOB4FEjW9Djh-Ftd2hJlzT8K0Ieo0qxoc10FVRdnf_mxynfTui3VSrDdXrh7Q-NgIrEQ35ieL6Dm_y_p7uiJJbC0VhyMP6bbiRubC7ndSRR23m4ExlwZMGB5Mv3CiraTNnccmZ7UTGb2GxZHFAX8JbCvfUyciyObWHFzMVm2gqfPOj0ZJCPDxYI2M7yF5gkTliLxQEsJrrpt9jMCr59W0KyPfKA3KxotaoNp4j8JEsT_YlyPj-jiTlhFWxN3dG8_F_Vfm2ddRx_fEIpRayyX-fPeoPwz1kDhbtb-_3djjUqgcjDZ1jsb8oDP7BP3C7BY)
---
You may have seen the photos from the tour... caught some of the videos... read about the chants of _“USA!”_ from students...But let me tell you exactly what happened this spring:**Patriots like you helped launch the most powerful Conservative campus tour in American history.** It was BOLD. It was LOUD. And it was PACKED... From beginning to end.**And the American Comeback Tour’s Spring FINALE was in a place no one thought we’d ever touch: California.** The same state where Leftist professors shut down free speech... where mobs scream in the faces of our students... where conservative ideas aren’t just unpopular — _they’re punishable offenses._ And yet... We filled the campus quad at UC Riverside.Students came early. Packed shoulder-to-shoulder. Ringing around the “Prove Me Wrong” tent to hear the truth.And when I walked on stage and said: “It’s okay to love America...”They ERUPTED.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=743f5c7dcf2e4825a4fa47a378d810b6&_e=QOB4FEjW9Djh-Ftd2hJlzT8K0Ieo0qxoc10FVRdnf_mxynfTui3VSrDdXrh7Q-NgIrEQ35ieL6Dm_y_p7uiJJbC0VhyMP6bbiRubC7ndSRR23m4ExlwZMGB5Mv3CiraTNnccmZ7UTGb2GxZHFAX8JX1dFVenUk8SfYaNdlBzWIXWArOErZibXveyQmycmeM0cdGlban6-BxA6gDmj85c4_Q5aRIIaywnBIlVVhemdkaecQDpTO1P-C7z2P5lq3tNzp4s5lLSbEqpMbpSCyjYpIRVGfQu_LyinUBUMQ9udd_cFUqxnltb-YmIIfkBNAs7)
---
It wasn’t just another great tour stop... **It was a BREAKTHROUGH.** Because this wasn’t the first stop in California this spring — it was the fourth IN MAY and the SIXTH of the tour.And each one was just as powerful...This wasn’t just another campus tour. _It was a line in the sand._ And every single time, the story was the same: The Left tried to dismiss us, hurl their obscenities, or shut us down...The students showed up anyway. And the truth rang out louder than ever before._But let’s back up for a moment..._ Because while the California finale may have been the last stop of the Spring, this all started months ago.**Back in January, when we were laying out the calendar... These were the goals: Go BIGGER. Go BOLDER. Go DEEPER into Leftist territory.** We wanted to hit not just the battleground states... Not just the safe “Red” states... _But the ones the Left claimed as their own._ And then? We wanted to plant our flag. And because of patriots like you — that’s exactly what we did.**Let me give you the big picture:** ✅ 21 American Comeback Tour stops✅ Overflow crowds with thousands of students✅ Deep “Blue” states seeing young people rising up ✅ The Left rattled by a movement of young people who are rejecting them... _wholesale._ Students who had never once heard a Conservative speak in person... _finally heard one._ Students who were afraid to wear a cross or sport an American flag... _were loud, proud, and unashamed to stand for God and their country._ Students who were told they were alone... _realized they were part of something BIGGER than they ever imagined._ There are too many great stories, moments and pictures to pack into this one message...**But just look at what we're accomplishing:**
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=743f5c7dcf2e4825a4fa47a378d810b6&_e=QOB4FEjW9Djh-Ftd2hJlzT8K0Ieo0qxoc10FVRdnf_mxynfTui3VSrDdXrh7Q-NgIrEQ35ieL6Dm_y_p7uiJJbC0VhyMP6bbiRubC7ndSRR23m4ExlwZMGB5Mv3CiraTNnccmZ7UTGb2GxZHFAX8JTESls_AcLz5I-Lf6kMoiPujVNiO9wfsT1XLvS7WCnXmMLWyGj4bAoyTatiFvBLl1bhd9y12p3wUmfznj2om73ihLSKeHsGcKVQRSu85UYT0ruXh0AyUYQ0WRQzR13JPs3lpLsWwfyRf29FMjStWTfTnh1XfVmDFKuqY0Rt4XksN)
---
_Fellow Patriot, this is why we fight..._ Not just for campus speeches. Not just for questions from students.**But for a generation-wide cultural reset — playing out in real time, in real places, in the hearts of real students.** This is why the American Comeback Tour matters.And I hope you know:**It wouldn’t exist without patriots like****YOU****.** Your support — your prayers, your belief in our students, your generous gifts — made all of this possible.Patriots like you put us on the road. You brought us onto these campuses. You sent us to the students who needed to hear our America First message the most.**You weren’t just watching this tour... You were powering it.** Now, let me be totally honest: _We’re not done. Not even close._ The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...But this summer?We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through.We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. **And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. **_I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Fellow Patriot._ Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible...We can’t back down. Not now. _Not ever._ Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong.**I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.****Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time.**
---
For America, Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=743f5c7dcf2e4825a4fa47a378d810b6&_e=QOB4FEjW9Djh-Ftd2hJlzT8K0Ieo0qxoc10FVRdnf_mxynfTui3VSrDdXrh7Q-NgIrEQ35ieL6Dm_y_p7uiJJbC0VhyMP6bbiRubC7ndSRR23m4ExlwZMGB5Mv3CiraTNnccmZ7UTGb2GxZHFAX8JW0IoNsl0cad31HRYcrdvS3wbwaFCDfspUbYcAqnvaAMlVXJtPSKAKM-SMdaiqDtbVV3etWR3NxmFHt8EmSbWO6W5xKqcW1kCxla4riY0_kCdpXBfnhbAzZoR1CMAx8st0q71ZLd-ipy0Vf6krcuQ40yDkhQslzvu2Y_q2PXLxtY)
---
**P.S.** I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Fellow Patriot... **_But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS._** These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas.This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.**And the Left is terrified.** You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore.**Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student.** **And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED.** That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. _So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall..._ Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. **[We’re not done. Let’s go DEFEAT the Left once and for all. Make your gift to Turning Point USA today and have your impact immediately DOUBLED.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=743f5c7dcf2e4825a4fa47a378d810b6&_e=QOB4FEjW9Djh-Ftd2hJlzT8K0Ieo0qxoc10FVRdnf_mxynfTui3VSrDdXrh7Q-NgIrEQ35ieL6Dm_y_p7uiJJbC0VhyMP6bbiRubC7ndSRR23m4ExlwZMGB5Mv3CiraTNnccmZ7UTGb2GxZHFAX8Jb23_z7ZezB2OCfhXPkRUQDKl7kFvnTqLt-g_AyNiHPpeb34mjyOIXquV8V14209N_xKvVgqcbf49Hkifph0QRS18b4ktEXXmd_U0V8IgJKmZpNr3pOLpWABK1p6uyt0e6YtHlFQ5crhNj_A_r6cF4OXChXd3hAPt5He5y--e25a)**
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA &**
**DOUBLE Your Impact**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=743f5c7dcf2e4825a4fa47a378d810b6&_e=QOB4FEjW9Djh-Ftd2hJlzT8K0Ieo0qxoc10FVRdnf_mxynfTui3VSrDdXrh7Q-NgIrEQ35ieL6Dm_y_p7uiJJbC0VhyMP6bbiRubC7ndSRR23m4ExlwZMGB5Mv3CiraTNnccmZ7UTGb2GxZHFAX8JZZ1D7ZSnR6SU3JkHVyBn6_cyzuutx4cvusBw67NrPcUOaLaqQHKw90nnTk3fXS9Damqd3b5WCTJ7l3zvkQ-oQjbtzDaiRxVymwrnpKgln2Emzi1AgPVcVwDMbdsWf2-J4_bruQWZRloWbGcTGNcwgN6W2ovGox6o-uREd2cvAkh)
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
[Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=743f5c7dcf2e4825a4fa47a378d810b6&_t=6xe-TCeAmQDBMLjTvJIZAdBD-1BCTAzO4zppQ8hrutQgwBj1JkYcQfjFVZhMylS44zgCwcQU-EqIbBsg9Nceo-KTPXqaorTpkmFW2QHT_qYpXoNbyHKKGB-InHZKaCu1)

Not even close. The American Comeback Tour may have just ended for the spring...But this summer?We’re preparing for something even BIGGER. We’re already mapping out new stops in the fall. New states. New targets in Leftist territory to break through.We’re building a plan to take this movement to the next level — to complete the cultural shift that started on this tour.To reach more students. To change more hearts and minds. And raise up the boldest, most unapologetic generation of freedom-loving Americans since the founding of this country. I’m going to need you fighting alongside me, Fellow Patriot. Because now that we’ve tasted victory... now that we’ve seen what’s possible...We can’t back down. Not now. Not ever. Let’s keep building. Let’s keep pushing. Let’s keep GOING.The American Comeback is well underway. Let’s make sure it keeps rolling strong.I can’t say “thank you” enough to the patriots like you who’ve helped make Turning Point USA the force it is today.Together, we’re SAVING America... one student at a time. For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA P.S. I’ve been doing this for over a decade now, Fellow Patriot... But I’ve never seen momentum like THIS. These students are ready. They’re hungry for the truth and our ideas.This country is shifting — In a way you can genuinely FEEL.And the Left is terrified. You can see it in their mobs... The way they lash out at us and our students... But it’s not working anymore.Because you and I are reaching the next generation — campus by campus, state by state, student by student. And that’s why I’m asking you to stand with us again today. Because every dollar you give today will be MATCHED. That means your gift of $50 becomes $100... $100 becomes $200... And your impact? DOUBLED. So, if you believe in this mission... If you’re proud of what we’re accomplishing... If you want to go even BIGGER this fall... Then this is your moment to step up and fuel what comes next.Let’s take the American Comeback Tour to every corner of this country when it returns this fall... Let’s train thousands of students this summer at our events to become the LEADERS we need for our America First movement...And let’s make sure the Left NEVER thinks they can own the hearts of America’s young people again. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044
