name: Jena Griswold
subject: Standing with the victims of the Boulder attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://jenaforcolorado.com/]
Peter,
Like so many Coloradans and Americans, I was devastated to hear the news of the antisemitic attack in Boulder on June 1. My heart goes out to the victims, their family and friends, who were impacted by this senseless and despicable attack.
This attack has every mark of a hate crime. Peaceful marchers were attacked because they are Jewish. This has impacted Jewish people here in Colorado and across the country. We have seen the rise in antisemitism nationwide, including the murder of two Israeli embassy workers and the attempted arson attack on Governor Shapiro. Enough is enough – the time to stand up against antisemitism and hatred in all forms is now.
Last week, I attended a vigil in Boulder to stand for the victims and send the message loud and clear: Antisemitism has no place in Colorado. Hatred and violence must stop, and Americans across the country must work together to root out antisemitism and racism of any kind.
Thank you,
Jena Griswold
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]

name: Voter Action Project Texas
subject: Blatant power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We get it -- sometimes it feels like there's nothing we can do in these situations. But we have to fight these power grabs whenever and wherever we can so that we don't obey in advance and let the vote suppressors get away with these dirty tricks to protect their power and silence the will of the people.
We can't do this alone. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us fight partisan gerrymandering and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=PjNQStFpP4z+qwbKk1dkRZJtpr1i6nuo/DRf53sjb05b0SzJw8ibf6Rm4P2woI1l/riBVdcKqx+QD5Y47pOPcst2IFMwEu6Z873MwPbtt1k=]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=PjNQStFpP4z+qwbKk1dkRZJtpr1i6nuo/DRf53sjb05b0SzJw8ibf6Rm4P2woI1l/riBVdcKqx+QD5Y47pOPcst2IFMwEu6Z873MwPbtt1k=]
Democracy Docket: Top GOP Map-Drawer and Right-Wing Law Firm Team Up to Target Texas Minority Voters [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=PjNQStFpP4z+qwbKk1dkRZJtpr1i6nuo/DRf53sjb05b0SzJw8ibf6Rm4P2woI1l/riBVdcKqx+QD5Y47pOPcst2IFMwEu6Z873MwPbtt1k=]
The fight against gerrymandering never ends, Team.
Reports from Texas indicate that the opponents of voting rights who run one of Texas’s biggest counties have recruited the top conservative map-drawer, as well as a leading Washington, D.C.-based anti-voting group, to ram through a new gerrymander that aims to expand the U.S. House majority.
For background: Voters in Tarrant County — Texas’s third-largest county, with a population of around 2.2 million, and home to Fort Worth — elect four commissioners who, along with the County Judge Tim O’Hare, make up the county’s five-member governing body, known as commissioners court. (In Texas, a county judge is not a judicial officer, but a regular elected official.) O'Hare, for context, is an opponent of voting rights who tried to remove polling sites from college campuses ahead of the 2024 election.
Now that panel -- finalized in a 3-2 party-line vote -- has moved to redraw Tarrant County's maps and put local minority communities' right to fair representation at risk. The new map packs many of the county’s Black and brown voters into one heavily partisan district , switching the balance of the other district back in their direction. The map was shared publicly only in the past week and had not been discussed at public hearings.
Voter suppression anywhere changes the balance of Congress and hurts everyone, everywhere. Help us fight back for fair maps with $25 or whatever you can today and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=PjNQStFpP4z+qwbKk1dkRZJtpr1i6nuo/DRf53sjb05b0SzJw8ibf6Rm4P2woI1l/riBVdcKqx+QD5Y47pOPcst2IFMwEu6Z873MwPbtt1k=]

clean_body: We get it -- sometimes it feels like there's nothing we can do in these situations. But we have to fight these power grabs whenever and wherever we can so that we don't obey in advance and let the vote suppressors get away with these dirty tricks to protect their power and silence the will of the people. We can't do this alone. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us fight partisan gerrymandering and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [=] Voter Action Project [=] Democracy Docket: Top GOP Map-Drawer and Right-Wing Law Firm Team Up to Target Texas Minority Voters [=] The fight against gerrymandering never ends, Team. Reports from Texas indicate that the opponents of voting rights who run one of Texas’s biggest counties have recruited the top conservative map-drawer, as well as a leading Washington, D.C.-based anti-voting group, to ram through a new gerrymander that aims to expand the U.S. House majority. For background: Voters in Tarrant County — Texas’s third-largest county, with a population of around 2.2 million, and home to Fort Worth — elect four commissioners who, along with the County Judge Tim O’Hare, make up the county’s five-member governing body, known as commissioners court. (In Texas, a county judge is not a judicial officer, but a regular elected official.) O'Hare, for context, is an opponent of voting rights who tried to remove polling sites from college campuses ahead of the 2024 election. Now that panel -- finalized in a 3-2 party-line vote -- has moved to redraw Tarrant County's maps and put local minority communities' right to fair representation at risk. The new map packs many of the county’s Black and brown voters into one heavily partisan district , switching the balance of the other district back in their direction. The map was shared publicly only in the past week and had not been discussed at public hearings. Voter suppression anywhere changes the balance of Congress and hurts everyone, everywhere. | | Hi D. P., Have you seen the looting in Los Angeles?

Have you see the sympathizers of illegals across the country and the violence against law enforcement officers?
Have you seen the politicians supporting the criminals and acts of violence by the rioters?

How long will you sit back during these lawless times? Enough is enough.

| |

Your generous tax-deductible gift today will help Generations for America Foundation:
* Educate generations on their Constitutional rights and responsibilities.

* Educate citizens on parliamentarian procedures to protect their rights to be heard, to debate, and to vote.

I need your response now to create national awareness.

Please make your most generous tax-deductible gift to The Generations for America Foundation now using the secure link below.

name: COURIER
subject: Trump threatens millions preparing to protest his parade
body:
This Saturday, Donald Trump is throwing himself a $45 million taxpayer-funded military parade. We're talking tanks in the streets, warplanes overhead, and 7,000 troops marching through the nation’s capital.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109464681/551189967/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGViNzZjNTItYjg0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LHLjZVMEXWMrkC1i2zOnjaOcIe2iASC1OStv0npLsfA=&emci=64c2eda4-ad47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0eb76c52-b847-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
This Saturday, Donald Trump is throwing himself a $45 million taxpayer-funded military parade. We're talking tanks in the streets, warplanes overhead, and 7,000 troops marching through the nation’s capital.
In response, millions of Americans are preparing to mobilize. “No Kings” protests are planned in more than 1,500 cities—what organizers say will be the largest anti-Trump demonstration since his return to power.
**Trump’s response to the protests was chilling. On live TV, he warned protestors would be met with “very big force” and “hit harder than ever before.”**
The threat to protestors is clear: There will be consequences for exercising your First Amendment rights.
Before we connect the dots to Trump’s broader war on dissent, we need your help.
**COURIER is working to find 500 donors before midnight Saturday—the day of the protests—to power urgent reporting across our battleground newsrooms and digital platforms.**
[**If you believe in the right to organize and dissent—and in making sure the truth is heard—please chip in now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109464682/551189969/-1581427288?refcode=20250612_No_Kings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGViNzZjNTItYjg0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LHLjZVMEXWMrkC1i2zOnjaOcIe2iASC1OStv0npLsfA=)
****[Contribute $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109464683/551189970/-1581427288?refcode=20250612_No_Kings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGViNzZjNTItYjg0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=LHLjZVMEXWMrkC1i2zOnjaOcIe2iASC1OStv0npLsfA=)****
All around us, Trump’s war on Democrats and those who don’t support his agenda is escalating.
We're seeing it in:
* Trump’s decision to unilaterally send the National Guard to Los Angeles.
* The DOJ investigation into ActBlue—Democrats’ main fundraising platform—based on lies and far-right conspiracies.
* The Trump administration has also targeted Indivisible, the largest organization helping to coordinate this weekend’s protests. News reports say the threats are serious enough that the group is preparing legal defenses in case the administration follows through.

Peter, This is what authoritarianism looks like:
* The politicization of the military.
* Using the full force of the federal government to intimidate and investigate the opposition party and dissenters.
* Threats of violence and shows of force.

**COURIER is fighting back—with truth, facts, and a reach spanning millions online. But we urgently need resources to counter this growing assault on democracy.**
We’re setting a rapid-response goal of finding 500 donations by Saturday at midnight to help fund our protest coverage, investigative reporting, and digital reach.

clean_body: This Saturday, Donald Trump is throwing himself a $45 million taxpayer-funded military parade. We're talking tanks in the streets, warplanes overhead, and 7,000 troops marching through the nation’s capital. Peter, This Saturday, Donald Trump is throwing himself a $45 million taxpayer-funded military parade. We're talking tanks in the streets, warplanes overhead, and 7,000 troops marching through the nation’s capital. In response, millions of Americans are preparing to mobilize. “No Kings” protests are planned in more than 1,500 cities—what organizers say will be the largest anti-Trump demonstration since his return to power. Trump’s response to the protests was chilling. On live TV, he warned protestors would be met with “very big force” and “hit harder than ever before.” The threat to protestors is clear: There will be consequences for exercising your First Amendment rights. Before we connect the dots to Trump’s broader war on dissent, we need your help. COURIER is working to find 500 donors before midnight Saturday—the day of the protests—to power urgent reporting across our battleground newsrooms and digital platforms. = **= All around us, Trump’s war on Democrats and those who don’t support his agenda is escalating. We're seeing it in: Trump’s decision to unilaterally send the National Guard to Los Angeles. The DOJ investigation into ActBlue—Democrats’ main fundraising platform—based on lies and far-right conspiracies. The Trump administration has also targeted Indivisible, the largest organization helping to coordinate this weekend’s protests. News reports say the threats are serious enough that the group is preparing legal defenses in case the administration follows through. Peter, This is what authoritarianism looks like: The politicization of the military. Using the full force of the federal government to intimidate and investigate the opposition party and dissenters. Threats of violence and shows of force. COURIER is fighting back—with truth, facts, and a reach spanning millions online. But we urgently need resources to counter this growing assault on democracy. We’re setting a rapid-response goal of finding 500 donations by Saturday at midnight to help fund our protest coverage, investigative reporting, and digital reach. = = In solidarity, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

body:
Jocelyn is running to represent you and your voice
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=408%2E181023%2EaYrgNg)
Hey team — we’re hitting the road!
Starting next week, Jocelyn and our campaign are traveling across Michigan to meet with voters and hear directly from them.
Nothing is more important to Jocelyn than hearing directly from Michiganders about how she can deliver for them.
She’s ready to listen and learn. She wants to know what you’re talking about at the dinner table with your family or at your kid’s soccer game with your neighbors.
Because Jocelyn is running to represent you and your voice. Not special interests or corporations, just people like us who work hard and want to see the best for their family, their community, and their state.
[**So before we hit the road, we’re setting a fundraising goal to have enough resources to fill up the gas tank, print campaign materials, and meet Michiganders in every corner of the state. name: MONICA DE LA CRUZ [TX-15]
subject: I must say this one stings
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
I must say - this one stings, Peter... I woke up to the unfortunate news that we came up short of our May end-of-month goal. We were on pace until the very last 48-72 hours, then fundraising dropped off a cliff in the final sprint. I'm disappointed. Not in you (never in you) but in myself. Whether I didn't explain the urgency well enough or my emails were missed, regardless, we failed. And it hurts.
Why? Because the Democrats are already circling my race like sharks. \- They named me as their ONLY House Republican target in all of Texas \- TX-15 is one of just THREE seats they need to take back the House
\- If they win here, they'll impeach Trump and block his entire agenda We CANNOT let this shortfall become a trend. [That’s why I’m coming to you, with my hat in hand, to ask for a small contribution to get us back on track. If this shortcoming snowballs, it’s all clean_body: I must say - this one stings, Peter... I woke up to the unfortunate news that we came up short of our May end-of-month goal. We were on pace until the very last 48-72 hours, then fundraising dropped off a cliff in the final sprint. I'm disappointed. Not in you (never in you) but in myself. Whether I didn't explain the urgency well enough or my emails were missed, regardless, we failed. And it hurts. Why? Because the Democrats are already circling my race like sharks. \- They named me as their ONLY House Republican target in all of Texas \- TX-15 is one of just THREE seats they need to take back the House \- If they win here, they'll impeach Trump and block his entire agenda We CANNOT let this shortfall become a trend. I know Speaker Johnson emailed you. I know Elise Stefanik emailed you. I know Newt Gingrich emailed you. They know we only flipped this purple district (for the first time in 100 years, no less) because good folks like you stepped up when we needed it most. We did it with grit, fire, and support from grassroots conservatives like YOU. Now I need that same energy again - or the Left wins. Let's slam the door shut before they even get a foot in. For freedom, Monica De La Cruz Republican Congresswoman, TX-15 Proud MAGA Latina * Election experts just declared Monica De La Cruz's House race as one of the most competitive in the country. The Democrats and a top Liberal Super PAC are already running dishonest attack ads against her. We just need your signature - that's it! | | | Paid for by Monica for Congress PO Box 4605 McAllen, Texas 78502 |

clean_body: Can I get your input in our House Republican DOGE Survey | | | | Peter, There's a reason the Radical Left is up in arms about DOGE. They can't stand the fact that someone is finally holding the bloated bureaucracy accountable and making the government work for the people of our country once again. They'd rather spend YOUR tax dollars on transgender comic books in Peru, forcing unsuspecting Serbians into feminist sensitivity training, or on a drag rendition of Hamlet in Columbia. | | "TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY" DOGE is finally fighting back, and House Republicans and I are glad to see it. Reform couldn 't come soon enough! But do you have thoughts on DOGE? "House Republicans have reopened our new DOGE Survey for a limited time, and I’m inviting you to complete it today." | | | "TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY" DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY Issued By House GOP HQ PATRIOT: Peter STATUS: "MISSING" | | "TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY" For too long corrupt bureaucrats and corrupt politicians have gotten away with nothing short of highway robbery of the American people. The buck stops here. House Republicans are committed to working with DOGE to fight waste, fraud, and abuse, but we need your help to guide our strategy. | | "TAKE THE DOGE SURVEY" "Will you complete our DOGE Survey right away?" name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Trump’s cuts to AmeriCorps hit New Mexico hard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
These reckless cuts are hurting everyday Americans. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109466041/551194943/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjU1N2Y2MS1iYjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kVG2s6vqyH4IUX-U6gxm7mY415sjOPD8CdNr7t377EE=&emci=de557f61-bb47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e6557f61-bb47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=252045)
---
Team, When I served in AmeriCorps, I saw firsthand what national service could do — for communities, for young people finding their path, and for our country as a whole. Trump’s reckless cuts put 85% of AmeriCorps staff on leave. Nearly $400 million in grants were canceled — including almost $2 million for New Mexico alone. That means programs for veterans, disaster relief, tribal communities, and students would have been left in limbo or eliminated entirely. Thankfully, a judge granted a preliminary injunction just last week that puts those cuts on hold while the multistate lawsuit continues — but the fight to protect AmeriCorps is far from over. **I’m not sitting by while this extremist administration guts one of our most effective service programs.** Trump and his cronies don’t care about fixing problems. All they want to do is create chaos, and they’re doing that by dismantling an agency that’s helped millions of Americans. **[These are the Republican priorities, not making life more affordable or helping you get food on the table. We need to vote Republicans out. Can I count on you to help us do it?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109466042/551194944/-1386246667?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjU1N2Y2MS1iYjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kVG2s6vqyH4IUX-U6gxm7mY415sjOPD8CdNr7t377EE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109466043/551194945/-1386246667?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjU1N2Y2MS1iYjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kVG2s6vqyH4IUX-U6gxm7mY415sjOPD8CdNr7t377EE=)

AmeriCorps has a long history of bipartisan support. Because this program works — especially in rural places like New Mexico. And I won’t stop fighting until it’s fully restored and funded again.
If you’ve seen the power of service in your own community, now’s the time to speak up.
Thanks,
Martin
| Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: A last-ditch request from me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Normally when I write to you via email, I like them to be different from the other messages you get from most elected officials.
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Jon Ossoff is running for Senate in Georgia and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and [**rush a split donation between Jon's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250612-1-90&t=1&akid=6089%2E6688874%2Ea6vP0O)
---
Normally when you see my name in your inbox, I like the messages to be different from the other emails you get from most elected officials.
I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, along with other things I am seeing or working on in Washington, D.C. and at home in Georgia.
This message is different. It's more direct.
I am reaching out today with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our mid-month comes to a close. Here's why:
This race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the nation. I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024 and that makes me MAGA’s #1 target.
In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history — and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. And we will win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Mark Kelly today before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-ossoff.o6kuHF&refcode=em250612-1-90&t=2&akid=6089%2E6688874%2Ea6vP0O)

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Donald Trump is not a king
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter — We all know that Trump’s “big, beautiful bill” would be one big disaster for everyone who isn’t a billionaire. It cuts health care for millions of Americans, slashes $300 million in funding for SNAP, and adds $2.4 trillion to the deficit in just 10 years — all so Republicans can give tax breaks to their billionaire buddies. But there’s a little-known provision hidden in the toxic budget bill that I want to tell you about. Federal courts have issued countless rulings against the administration, and to no one’s surprise, Trump hasn’t liked that very much. So what do House Republicans do? They inserted a provision in their budget bill that aims to restrict the power of federal judges to enforce court orders, making it easier for Trump to ignore the courts. **Regardless of what he may think, Donald Trump is not a king.** I spoke at a press conference last week alongside some of my Senate Democratic colleagues to make sure Trump and his Republican allies know that Senate Democrats won’t let this slide. **[We will use every ounce of our power to defeat this bill, protect the rule of law, and hold Trump accountable. name: Patty Murray
subject: what I asked Linda McMahon the other day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
I won't let billionaires take even more tax cuts while our kids pay the price.
| | |
---
Patty here, Peter – and this time, it's personal.
I got my degree in physical education from a public university, Washington State University (go Cougs!). Then, I taught preschool, worked at a community college, and later served on my local school board.

**All of these are the very same public schools and systems from which Education Secretary Linda McMahon has unlawfully withheld taxpayer dollars since taking over the Department of Education.**
I only entered politics after state officials tried to close my children's preschool program due to budget cuts. After I drove 100 miles to Olympia with my two young kids in tow to speak out against them, a male lawmaker said my voice didn't matter since I was “ _just a mom in tennis shoes."_

I knew then that if I wanted to make a change, I'd have to lace up those tennis shoes and fight back. That's when I organized a grassroots coalition of 13,000 other parents and community members to save that preschool program. We won.
**So if McMahon gets the much deeper cuts she asked of the Senate Appropriations Committee in her hearing last week, the** _entire_**tab for public schools and universities will be left to the already overburdened state and local budgets.**
I tell you this now, because when I asked if any analysis on how the agency would be able to perform its basic obligations under the law had been done before or after she summarily fired HALF its staff, her answer was **"No."**

**Between that, the cuts, and her cluelessness as to what's happening in the Department on her watch, Trump might as well have picked someone wearing a blindfold to take a chainsaw to public education.**
But I'm standing up for public edcuation. [**So now, Peter, I need YOU to lace up your shoes and join the fight with me.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109467695/551200480/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk517-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTI5NTg3Mi1iZjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azvGtd-sUmNtGpUY2aeoqQtombb4P6lakb-kZpyPulg=)
**I've set an emergency goal to build another 13,000-strong coalition of grassroots supporters by 11:59 p.m. tonight – b****ut this time, it's to help show the grassroots is determined to STOP Trump's administration from giving billionaires like McMahon and Musk _even more_ tax breaks while the next generation pays the price. **

[Will you please help me build the critical people-powered momentum we need to show Republicans we MUST save our kids' public schools by being the first person to chip in $5, $13, or any amount at all today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109467701/551200489/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk517-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTI5NTg3Mi1iZjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azvGtd-sUmNtGpUY2aeoqQtombb4P6lakb-kZpyPulg=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109467704/551200494/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk517-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTI5NTg3Mi1iZjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azvGtd-sUmNtGpUY2aeoqQtombb4P6lakb-kZpyPulg=)

clean_body: I won't let billionaires take even more tax cuts while our kids pay the price. | | | Patty here, Peter – and this time, it's personal. I got my degree in physical education from a public university, Washington State University (go Cougs!). Then, I taught preschool, worked at a community college, and later served on my local school board. All of these are the very same public schools and systems from which Education Secretary Linda McMahon has unlawfully withheld taxpayer dollars since taking over the Department of Education. I only entered politics after state officials tried to close my children's preschool program due to budget cuts. After I drove 100 miles to Olympia with my two young kids in tow to speak out against them, a male lawmaker said my voice didn't matter since I was “ just a mom in tennis shoes." I knew then that if I wanted to make a change, I'd have to lace up those tennis shoes and fight back. That's when I organized a grassroots coalition of 13,000 other parents and community members to save that preschool program. We won. So if McMahon gets the much deeper cuts she asked of the Senate Appropriations Committee in her hearing last week, the entiretab for public schools and universities will be left to the already overburdened state and local budgets. I tell you this now, because when I asked if any analysis on how the agency would be able to perform its basic obligations under the law had been done before or after she summarily fired HALF its staff, her answer was "No." Between that, the cuts, and her cluelessness as to what's happening in the Department on her watch, Trump might as well have picked someone wearing a blindfold to take a chainsaw to public education. But I'm standing up for public edcuation. = I've set an emergency goal to build another 13,000-strong coalition of grassroots supporters by 11:59 p.m. tonight – but this time, it's to help show the grassroots is determined to STOP Trump's administration from giving billionaires like McMahon and Musk even more tax breaks while the next generation pays the price. = | | = Thank you for reading and for everything you do. Patty | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

name: New Pennsylvania Project
subject: This is what authoritarianism looks like.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project
body:
| | | [](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR1yDKdqExfIAdjX1DimrA-2FMbO2pw1b7mwG44mEYtwXn5dm5YK5rfTuo9x2HhEWaPVDI1xT2mR5v8tvvMfW69GIo-3DwQ39_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYnVp1-2BsKBLIyueKz4ZQgMyxD7-2BU7jVK6GjSYne4kTNO5lkpdaF6CtIrkodK30CnL16YTUpVRX4roDU8s-2FUM64mz8LXwu0rWM6DEZCcWA1O-2Bd08fw2a5L627ypbd79QIzvHX-2FDsMR6h7GmdnAHqRGdgxUcqs8V4WaEewKRkBlfcCJiZ4hiScbOEkvjXwT5CKi4)
---
Fellow activist,

In Los Angeles, overwhelmingly peaceful protests over the Trump regime’s immigration policies and raids have largely been contained. However, in an unprecedented attempt to manufacture chaos, Trump and his administration have weaponized thousands of troops, including the National Guard and US Marines.

As reported by the Guardian, “this is the first time a U.S. president has mobilized US military forces in a domestic political situation without request of the state’s governor since 1965.” California Governor Gavin Newsom and LA Mayor Karen Bass have made it clear that Trump’s actions have not made any community safe with Governor Newsom stating, _"He (Trump) again chose escalation; he chose more force."_

**This is why we all need to pay attention.** Trump has invoked a rarely-used federal law and issued a presidential memorandum authorizing future domestic use of the U.S. military anywhere at any time he decides it is appropriate. This is a dangerous extension of authority when Trump views protests as a “rebellion” against his authority, when he has sworn to “liberate” the city, and when he has endorsed the idea of arresting Governor Newsom. **This is what authoritarianism looks like.**

And Los Angeles is just the beginning. Trump wants to “have troops everywhere.” He wants to use L.A. as an example for other states that dare stand up to his problematic policies.

We are horrified by what we are witnessing. All across the country, including in Pennsylvania, immigrant communities are under attack and families are being ripped apart. We stand in solidarity and support with our organizational partners who are leading immigrant rights actions and providing resources to community members across the Commonwealth. We are once again asking, **what kind of world are we building for future generations? **

**We believe in the promise of America, where our freedoms remain, our democracy is preserved, and our constitutional rights are protected for future generations – and for everyone living in our nation. But that won’t happen unless we all stand up for our values and show up against attempts to chip away at the very fabric of our nation. **

It is time to stop patching up broken systems and together start imagining and working towards something better.

In solidarity,

New Pennsylvania Project
---
_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.
_

Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

name: Rob Bonta
subject: update on our lawsuit re: Trump deploying military to Los Angeles
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
President Trump has doubled down on his unlawful and unprecedented military escalation in California.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250612&t=1&akid=1825%2E1088799%2ETZzJ_X)
I have an urgent update for you on the situation in Los Angeles.
On Monday, Governor Newsom and I announced a lawsuit against President Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth for unlawfully deploying 2,000 California National Guard Troops without the Governor’s consent or authorization.
After our announcement, the President doubled down, deploying 2,000 more troops and deploying an additional 700 U.S. Marines — _an extremely rare move by a U.S. president._
**On Tuesday, I filed a temporary restraining order in court to stop Trump and Hegseth from using military and federalized National Guard to patrol our communities.**
**[We need to remain steadfast in our fight for state sovereignty and against this administration’s unlawful actions. If I have your support, can you rush a contribution of $5 or more to power our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250612?refcode=em20250612-1825&amount=5&refcode2=1825_1088799_TZzJ_X&akid=1825%2E1088799%2ETZzJ_X)**
More updates soon when I have them. Thanks for standing with me.
— Rob
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rob Bonta [info@e.robbonta.com]
Date: Mon, Jun 9, 2025 at 7:37 PM
Subject: An abuse of authority
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
Last weekend, President Trump and Department of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth federalized 2,000 California National Guard troops without authorization from Governor Newsom and against the wishes of local law enforcement.
**This move was unnecessary, unprecedented, and unlawful — so the Governor and I are suing to stop it.[If you have our back, chip in now →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250612?refcode=em20250612-1825&amount=5&refcode2=1825_1088799_TZzJ_X&akid=1825%2E1088799%2ETZzJ_X)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250612?refcode=em20250612-1825&amount=5&refcode2=1825_1088799_TZzJ_X&akid=1825%2E1088799%2ETZzJ_X)
Let me be clear: _There is no invasion or rebellion in Los Angeles or the state of California._ The President is trying to manufacture chaos and crisis on the ground for his own political ends.
Calling in these troops to respond to protests is not only **counterproductive** but also deeply unfair to the members of the National Guard who are hard at work every day protecting our state, preparing for and responding to natural disasters, and training so that, if called, they can fight our nation’s wars.
**We don’t take the President’s abuse of power and violation of California’s sovereignty lightly.** We’re asking a court to put a stop to this unlawful, unprecedented order.
**[If you’re with us in this fight, please consider chipping in $5 or more to support our people-powered campaign as I focus on holding the President accountable to the law.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250612?refcode=em20250612-1825&amount=5&refcode2=1825_1088799_TZzJ_X&akid=1825%2E1088799%2ETZzJ_X)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250612?refcode=em20250612-1825&amount=5&refcode2=1825_1088799_TZzJ_X&akid=1825%2E1088799%2ETZzJ_X)**
To anyone outraged with this administration who feels moved to stand up and speak out, I urge you to do so peacefully, safely, and lawfully. We will get through this together.
Thank you,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250612&t=2&refcode2=1825_1088799_TZzJ_X&akid=1825%2E1088799%2ETZzJ_X)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1825%2E1088799%2ETZzJ_X)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1825%2E1088799%2ETZzJ_X)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: For love of country, please read this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
Parents are not obstacles - they are partners in education who the education system should trust. | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7fcb173664174d03bc300dce7f847d80&_e=DeEvE88AXGLZIxOChddNHxP5z_9Mc6nTRt-_TmKlkcONxoDb7EhQcl3h0u95PlMe_xtCCrvAjSzDuyPUwiAFrhcRozqpiGTH-AdefE28FMSb2LsTupHrcAoMoXIqUDdzKTbFSqScSV5ncd2-iOZT7lIi3JLGEPBJvsHYP30ce5e6dIVReA1Jeqcr9qw_vkVdZbgO9u35GpvhhmS69t5eftp7pD6P6aIaPN3so9-9a2q85xpgpff3XWSMExsLWZPNfFnLT7axTZBwoRnb9wc66vn5O6cOJoHMj0YxC63ovbZgPg1fWoWadmOHbBdCPNxwzX1y0PTCp6EGwbzhR_wP9IWsyz4uXhfC50tj7df2XuZEut4g4-FFhz5Q2PJCm6GOAuQCw4LKYAUZ1g9e-JzSEJWGEYmSakwJwxy6wiyKv8U%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time right now.

I’m well aware that if you’re reading this right now, you’re likely receiving many emails from countless would-be politicians introducing themselves and asking for your money.

I’m not one of them.

_**I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan **_who has put his body through the ringer serving this great nation of ours, but has so much left to give for a country that has given me so much.

I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations.

A few months ago, I decided that the best way to do that would be by running for U.S. Senate against **Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss.** After living through this man’s governorship, his failed vice presidential campaign last fall, and having seen firsthand what his **looneytoon policies** have done to the state of Minnesota, I decided I couldn’t sit back and let another Democrat waltz into the Senate.

**Navy SEALs fight to win** , and that’s what I will do - for Minnesota and for you. I was recently asked why I would open my life up to the scrutiny of a federal campaign. While there are numerous reasons, **I want to tell you about one of the most important today: childhood education.**

Here in Minnesota and around the nation, our children are being indoctrinated. They’re being forced to learn topics beyond their years that are not in the ordinary curriculum.

Our kids deserve an education, not an agenda. Here in Minnesota, boards of education and radical left politicians, like my opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, regularly override the will of parents.

**Did you know that elementary schools around America are beginning to institute gender studies in K-5 classes? This type of curriculum should be reserved for college campuses, and only on an elective basis. Kids in first through 5th grade have no concept of this adult material and shouldn’t.
**
_**When did the government stop listening to parents and putting the will of crazed left-wing activists ahead of the concerns and beliefs of parents?**_

It’s time to put parents back in the driver's seat.

**[If you agree, please contribute a few dollars to my campaign today. I’m starting with absolutely nothing and would very much appreciate your support.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=7fcb173664174d03bc300dce7f847d80&_e=DeEvE88AXGLZIxOChddNHxP5z_9Mc6nTRt-_TmKlkcONxoDb7EhQcl3h0u95PlMe_xtCCrvAjSzDuyPUwiAFrhcRozqpiGTH-AdefE28FMSb2LsTupHrcAoMoXIqUDdzKTbFSqScSV5ncd2-iOZT7lIi3JLGEPBJvsHYP30ce5e6dIVReA1Jeqcr9qw_vkVdZbgO9u35GpvhhmS69t5eftp7pD6P6aIaPN3so9-9a2q85xpgpff3XWSMExsLWZPNfFnLT7axTZBwoRnb9wc66knaoKFB6HDaL7bLrO-iWScvDIfPMRV4JuFKcOu24buVOrXMpOYfxaFYCUTSCnWXxRXEbAKJP57QQ7F8iNg_G5sA8QiRbMoTX4RPYjU0Cw17i7VSEese2LLi40QvAu-ylZicmKphKy2bqmKzcJjZW4w%3D)**

clean_body: Parents are not obstacles - they are partners in education who the education system should trust. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m asking for just a few moments of your time right now. I’m well aware that if you’re reading this right now, you’re likely receiving many emails from countless would-be politicians introducing themselves and asking for your money. I’m not one of them. I’m a former Navy SEAL, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan who has put his body through the ringer serving this great nation of ours, but has so much left to give for a country that has given me so much. I hold a Master’s from Harvard, a Master’s Certificate from Johns Hopkins in Security and Nuclear Deterrence, and an MBA. But my proudest achievement is serving our country to make my parents, especially my mom, proud. I want to serve you in the U.S. Senate, fighting for the values that have made Minnesota and America great for generations. A few months ago, I decided that the best way to do that would be by running for U.S. Senate against Tim Walz’s handpicked lieutenant governor—a politician even more radical than her boss. After living through this man’s governorship, his failed vice presidential campaign last fall, and having seen firsthand what his looneytoon policies have done to the state of Minnesota, I decided I couldn’t sit back and let another Democrat waltz into the Senate. Navy SEALs fight to win , and that’s what I will do - for Minnesota and for you. I was recently asked why I would open my life up to the scrutiny of a federal campaign. While there are numerous reasons, I want to tell you about one of the most important today: childhood education. Here in Minnesota and around the nation, our children are being indoctrinated. They’re being forced to learn topics beyond their years that are not in the ordinary curriculum. Our kids deserve an education, not an agenda. Here in Minnesota, boards of education and radical left politicians, like my opponent, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, regularly override the will of parents. Did you know that elementary schools around America are beginning to institute gender studies in K-5 classes? This type of curriculum should be reserved for college campuses, and only on an elective basis. Kids in first through 5th grade have no concept of this adult material and shouldn’t. When did the government stop listening to parents and putting the will of crazed left-wing activists ahead of the concerns and beliefs of parents? It’s time to put parents back in the driver's seat. I’m running for the United States Senate because, as a retired Navy SEAL, I’ve seen the dangers of the world, and In liberty, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: What Pride means to me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’ve never felt alone because I have people like you standing with me.

| | |
---
Hi Derek, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.
Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and, yes, on me.
**As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues.**
I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day.
I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like you and John Fetterman standing with me.
[**If I can count on your support this Pride Month, split a donation of $5 or whatever you can between my campaign and John Fetterman's today. Every donation helps me defend the LGBTQ+ community and keep up the fight for working families in Congress.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51334?refcode=jtk130-bu-fl&amount=5&t=1&akid=10139%2E434096%2EfYRC1I)
| | [DONATE](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51334?refcode=jtk130-bu-fl&t=2&akid=10139%2E434096%2EfYRC1I)
---
Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.
Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. **Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it.**
That’s what Pride means to me. It's a call to action and a reminder that even in the face of hate, we have the power to fight back with love, with truth, and with unshakable resolve.
[**So this Pride Month, if you’re ready to do your part to create a better future for all of us, please consider making a split donation of $5 between my campaign and John Fetterman.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51334?refcode=jtk130-bu-fl&amount=5&t=3&akid=10139%2E434096%2EfYRC1I)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Sarah McBride and John Fetterman:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51340?refcode=jtk130-bu-fl&t=4&akid=10139%2E434096%2EfYRC1I)
---
| | [DONATE $25 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51341?refcode=jtk130-bu-fl&t=5&akid=10139%2E434096%2EfYRC1I)
---
| | [DONATE $50 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51342?refcode=jtk130-bu-fl&t=6&akid=10139%2E434096%2EfYRC1I)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51334?refcode=jtk130-bu-fl&t=7&akid=10139%2E434096%2EfYRC1I)
---
Thank you and Happy Pride!
Sarah
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk130-bu-fl-footer&t=8&refcode2=10139_434096_fYRC1I&akid=10139%2E434096%2EfYRC1I)**

Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton joins "Just the News: No Noise" to discsuss Judicial Watch's election integrity case going up to the Supreme Court of the United States. Who Controlled Biden’s Auto-Pen?--Are His Pardons Valid? Judicial Watch Senior Attorney Christina Bobb joins "Carl Higbie Frontline" on ‪Newsmax TV‬ to discuss the Joe Biden auto-pen scandal, who was running the White House during his presidency, and much more. Dear Peter,
---
TONIGHT, we're holding an _urgent gathering to pray for L.A._ These riots show no signs of slowing down in fact, there are rumblings of riots popping up in more cities across then country! God continues to place us in the heart of brokenness and disaster because that’s where the Gospel is needed most. Join us _TONIGHT a_ nd be a part of the _HEALING_ of Los Angeles!
---

subject: Don’t worry – your “GOP membership” is NOT revoked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
| | | Some folks write you emails pretending to be President Trump.

**I won 't do that to you. **

Some folks pretend donations will somehow fund DOGE.

**I prefer to be honest with you.**

This is Steve Scalise. As your House Majority Leader, I work hand and glove with President Trump, and I love what DOGE is doing for our country.

And when I ask you for support, I want to treat you with respect and be transparent about where your money is going.

You are not an ATM. You are a valued member of our MAGA movement. You deserve to be treated that way.

**_[So that's why I 'm dropping into your inbox right now:](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3555dd76c5dc4a5da1bdf8f1c27b9667&_e=Vxb2BBgDzysfzO5_N879Fwn-LmO9lWKZakkLjjmR3ofTC_ZVEeHRXtp2a7jjwo0-tcGaU2CV2eD2Cdjox4DegcqdXjtDp0hWSYtDnMKdHqupNIXTWPwFK8W8AzL380rBZ4e6N4jMuhaKZTKDdDD8qhRh5BSKXml_ldMQX5iRrMqutExVuEUICMiG2jOVG8ZZFH8kU6VaRXxFmXPX-IfYe3qThFo2ybiFfWVK34pN9JkOX17mNduHd5m33WkDcUBzZ75gmTzOAixHv3JZrUNSrM7OQEPf73t13I7enk_c4MxH5amDMkCQD7iqQWurpSvX4pdbMlA_hkZZJVNNouuLRL1VilKzfAUYDIfhreL3cqJEW7XHHalmsrIHBRQCAWIr0LNAmUgnntOvg57-rEiJdsL-7JD3Q87hwd077MfLJ0w%3D)_**

The Democrat Machine is firing on all cylinders to undermine, stonewall, and sabotage everything President Trump and DOGE are doing to make our government more efficient and cut waste.

Of course, the DC Swamp can't have that.

That's why they're mobilizing the courts, Deep State operatives, and Congressional Democrats to unleash a coordinated political hatchet job against the Trump Administration.

_Democrats are suing him. They 're pushing for partisan investigations. They're firing off hit piece after hit piece in the press. They're introducing legislation to block DOGE's access._

Their plan is simple:
**1.** Attack the Trump Administration
**2.** Drag them into court battles
**3.** Slow them down at every turn
**4.** Use the press to attack their work
**5.** Unload millions to win the Midterms
**6.** Block Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda
**That 's where House Republicans - and most importantly, YOU - can make a major difference. **

Democrats have already pledged 50 million dollars to win the Midterm elections, take control of Congress, and exploit that power to sabotage EVERYTHING President Trump is doing to save the country. That includes the critical work of DOGE.

Cook Political Report just highlighted EIGHT toss-up districts that will determine who wins the House. If Democrats win even a few seats, it's over. They win the House.

That's why I'm tapping our entire grassroots movement for help.

_**[If you can afford to do so, I 'm imploring you to pitch in a few bucks to save our House Majority - and President Trump's entire legislative agenda along with it.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3555dd76c5dc4a5da1bdf8f1c27b9667&_e=Vxb2BBgDzysfzO5_N879Fwn-LmO9lWKZakkLjjmR3ofTC_ZVEeHRXtp2a7jjwo0-tcGaU2CV2eD2Cdjox4DegcqdXjtDp0hWSYtDnMKdHqupNIXTWPwFK8W8AzL380rBZ4e6N4jMuhaKZTKDdDD8qhRh5BSKXml_ldMQX5iRrMqutExVuEUICMiG2jOVG8ZZFH8kU6VaRXxFmXPX-IfYe3qThFo2ybiFfWVK34pN9JkOX17mNduHd5m33WkDcUBzUtGiGroMXMm4P5QeAl4Vg7crXJ_N_eQrfZ4LHaft3mdpsa7l_99pTc2JqFCecWaggD68rij4w_spc7cBn2WDaIX1VTfOgkV9PXzJUXl-jWi2upG7uYzSjsQJZ8mT9X1l1Vpc606n9SXnOg4jmnfLiueMmgF35peDRQPzGNkT6O0%3D)**___

This money will go directly to the most important battleground districts in the country so we can win the Midterms and keep delivering on President Trump's MAGA agenda.

If you agree this is a noble cause to support, please consider pitching in right now.

God bless you,

name: CA Democrats
subject: Trump vs. Newsom + you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Team —
We know this has been an exhausting and overwhelming week. Here’s an update on everything that’s happened:
FIRST : Trump declared lawful protest as a rebellion and unleashed the military against protestors in Los Angeles.
THEN : Gov. Gavin Newsom bravely stood up to Donald Trump and SUED him for these unlawful actions.
NOW : Trump then called for Newsom to be ARRESTED and Speaker Johnson said he should be “tarred and feathered.”
This is a full-blown crisis not just for California, but for our democracy. And the California Democratic Party is standing on the front lines.
We are California Strong and we do not bow to any king or dictator. Will you consider making a donation to fund organizing programs we are aiming to launch up and down our state? At this moment, organizing could not be more crucial. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-june25?&refcode=&amount=]

body:
This is getting out of control. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-w4x1Nfumb0IluqDNk32AX0qHbW0Eq3T7DMey1xR7DegedDnG5urvZ2SS18EMYlDMjgzTsEQgPrH1yTqIPnml4t4kXNLagIi_Q7iEy1MbzISBagi0251dI7D05MfWbCN-Hxzb4XtbCvkfdGgMKS9TdvLH1L92dfG5q2e8MIA0Tm7_98fk4Gk1G3MVDxWW1gcBKQzTcUCJg2AaW5gtYkBonhrOYqBEhPJSYE1BvCksUlqBqNCAv0xcQwwVVegg1VlMz_ZfuUm71uCvwm4MwYvTWiBGvqWD8VCGFFxsW7TueLJUx8Ck0JZPXMkt5MzUyj3_w/4ha/l45SQ7LPRM64_-LFJ0PYPA/h0/h001.T1Tr3sv3O9MO6bM2umLdF3L8_UKCcFuCdAEYVHXr-Jc)

Peter, California Democratic U.S. Senator Alex Padilla was just tackled and handcuffed by Department of Homeland Security agents for attempting to ask DHS Secretary Kristi Noem questions at a public press conference in Los Angeles.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-w4x1Nfumb0IluqDNk32AX317HG6W3TPCUnTse2IDc-IDvegRZRSqaia2_f7XvZlPF9oHkedHntTiqLLdGMsFXuiSZwlnL7EDuY82yG7hnNJoSmOVzFpNVzf5DX6ArRMzSDuHx3SWg8fLPsnD0t3DcKxZ32Ohx38quiIRYofXW8OeWiuEXvCYJuoiQUrKp_L23fnGdDU8P4LVvr3R8MAHrX2SGJ4Jf2mjSyEy8t_sHKA_jy-YFUPvFMcpxlR-KM_sjqS7Y2SvwqrDqNnl9rftKeNV4GXFIblbk9RuoQIiKi-2aRXIvJs7ryQUL33l7AEqQ/4ha/l45SQ7LPRM64_-LFJ0PYPA/h1/h001.WNspz06VjDDqISptFJwpJwMmJnWFoIsxs08PtPaYxk4)

**Trump 's thugs are out of control. **This kind of violence used against a U.S. Senator for simply asking the head of a federal agency questions at a public event is more reminiscent of the most brutal dictatorships in the world than it is of America. At Trump's behest, Kristi Noem is sending masked ICE agents escorted by U.S. Marines to arrest people in Home Depot parking lots and first graders at elementary schools. **Trump and Noem have a lot to answer for.** Trump has already had the Mayor of Newark and Dem Congresswoman LaMonica McIver arrested and charged for standing up to ICE, no doubt he will also try to throw Senator Padilla in jail too. **The only reason why Trump isn 't conducting mass arrests of his political opponents is because of our courts.** That's why Defend Our Courts is working non-stop to help Dem supreme court justices in key swing states where Trump is attempting to replace them with MAGA loyalists who will let him act as a dictator and rig elections in his favor - like in Pennsylvania's upcoming 2025 supreme court retention election. clean_body: This is getting out of control. | | Peter, California Democratic U.S. Senator Alex Padilla was just tackled and handcuffed by Department of Homeland Security agents for attempting to ask DHS Secretary Kristi Noem questions at a public press conference in Los Angeles. | Trump 's thugs are out of control. This kind of violence used against a U.S. Senator for simply asking the head of a federal agency questions at a public event is more reminiscent of the most brutal dictatorships in the world than it is of America. At Trump's behest, Kristi Noem is sending masked ICE agents escorted by U.S. Marines to arrest people in Home Depot parking lots and first graders at elementary schools. Trump and Noem have a lot to answer for. Trump has already had the Mayor of Newark and Dem Congresswoman LaMonica McIver arrested and charged for standing up to ICE, no doubt he will also try to throw Senator Padilla in jail too. The only reason why Trump isn 't conducting mass arrests of his political opponents is because of our courts. That's why Defend Our Courts is working non-stop to help Dem supreme court justices in key swing states where Trump is attempting to replace them with MAGA loyalists who will let him act as a dictator and rig elections in his favor - like in Pennsylvania's upcoming 2025 supreme court retention election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: In solidarity, Team Defend our Courts | Mail checks to: Defend Our Courts P.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Defend our Courts PAC, please .

body:
Oregon Democrats are jacking up 11 taxes—and we need Republicans to HOLD THE LINE!

| | | | [ ](https://secure.winred.com/oregon-republican-party/11-new-taxes?utm_source=email&utm_medium=ac&utm_campaign=20250610_ORGOP_SayNOTax&utm_id=campaignengine)
---
---
| | Friend, **Eleven. New. Taxes.** That’s what Democrats are trying to shove down Oregon’s throat with their latest “transportation” scam. _Let’s be clear:_ This bill isn’t about fixing roads. It’s about **bleeding taxpayers dry** to fund more bloated bureaucracy, radical climate nonsense, and pet projects for the Left’s donors. And here’s the kicker – _the state is already projected to bring in 12% more revenue than last biennium._ We don’t have a revenue problem. **We have a spending problem.** But instead of fixing their reckless mismanagement, the Democrats want you to foot the bill for their failures. **And the Democrats are doing their best to convince a few Republicans that this is what YOU want.** Now’s the time to be up front and honest with our legislators: **HOLD THE LINE!**
---

Stand with Republicans. Stand with fiscal sanity. clean_body: Oregon Democrats are jacking up 11 taxes—and we need Republicans to HOLD THE LINE! | | | | | | Friend, Eleven. New. Taxes. That’s what Democrats are trying to shove down Oregon’s throat with their latest “transportation” scam. Let’s be clear: This bill isn’t about fixing roads. It’s about bleeding taxpayers dry to fund more bloated bureaucracy, radical climate nonsense, and pet projects for the Left’s donors. And here’s the kicker – the state is already projected to bring in 12% more revenue than last biennium. We don’t have a revenue problem. We have a spending problem. But instead of fixing their reckless mismanagement, the Democrats want you to foot the bill for their failures. And the Democrats are doing their best to convince a few Republicans that this is what YOU want. Now’s the time to be up front and honest with our legislators: HOLD THE LINE! | | | | | Oregonians are already suffering under sky-high inflation, crushing gas prices, and a weaponized government. And now they want to jack up taxes AGAIN? ✔️ Higher vehicle registration fees ✔️ A new bicycle tax ✔️ Higher fuel costs ✔️ A brand new SALES TAX on new and used vehicle sales ✔️ And ELEVEN new taxes in total.... WE SAY NO. So, call your state representative and tell them to vote NO on this scam. Stand with Republicans. Stand with fiscal sanity. | | | | | This is our moment to fight back. Let’s shut down this tax grab before it bankrupts Oregonians even further. Thank you, Oregon Republican Party | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | We are dedicated to promoting conservative values, protecting individual freedoms, and building a prosperous future for all Oregonians. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Let me be very clear
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Police should police. Not the military. That is what happens in third world countries.

Friends -
Let me be very clear about a few things today.
Police should do policing — not the military. Military on the streets for no reason is what happens in third world countries.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4304?t=1&akid=2352%2E4767699%2EaEGB0e)
Los Angeles did not need the National Guard, and it didn't need the United States Marines.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4305?t=2&akid=2352%2E4767699%2EaEGB0e)
These military deployments in California were meant to provoke protest and violence and to lay the foundation for Trump to deploy members of the military across the country.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4306?t=3&akid=2352%2E4767699%2EaEGB0e)
And here is the kicker. Trump's politicization of our military is pulling them off critical missions in California to further his agenda.
The Ranch Fire in San Bernardino is 4,000 acres and growing.
Meanwhile, five of California’s 14 National Guard fire crews are understaffed ... including crews that "rake the forest" as Trump likes to say ... all because Trump deployed them for a political stunt in LA.
It's not just illegal. It's dangerous.
Thank you for everything,
Gavin Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
As you've seen in recent days, California is under attack from the Trump administration: from deploying the military in LA to escalate tensions and provoke violence, talking about defunding our state, and even threatening to arrest Gavin Newsom.
If standing up to Trump matters to you, please donate to my Campaign for Democracy PAC today. [**We’ll put your contribution to work taking the fight to red state authoritarian leaders.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-em-25?refcode=em250612-1&refcode2=2352_4767699_aEGB0e&akid=2352%2E4767699%2EaEGB0e)

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: AIPAC is at it again
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250612-1381-foote&t=1001&akid=1381%2E342411%2E5AoC4N ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

AIPAC is at it again.

A recent survey, sent out in Minnesota shows that AIPAC is allegedly
laying the groundwork to unseat Rep. Ilhan Omar — one of our fiercest
champions for justice in Congress.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250612-movement.IQ2b2Y&refcode=em20250612-1381&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1381%2E342411%2E5AoC4N ]The Intercept headline reading: "Is AIPAC Coming After Ilhan Omar?"

This is textbook right-wing meddling in democratic primaries. This is
about silencing progressive voices, plain and simple.

Last cycle, AIPAC spent tens of millions to oust progressives like Jamaal
Bowman and Cori Bush from Congress. Now they’re targeting Ilhan, and it’s
clear they’ll spare no expense.

Ilhan said it best: “Our district is not for sale.” But defending leaders
like her takes real resources and grassroots power. That’s where you come
in, Peter.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250612-movement.IQ2b2Y&refcode=em20250612-1381&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1381%2E342411%2E5AoC4N ]Will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund to defend
leaders like Ilhan and show AIPAC that our democracy can’t be bought?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250612-movement.IQ2b2Y&refcode=em20250612-1381&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1381%2E342411%2E5AoC4N ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

clean_body: [ ]Squad Victory Fund Peter, AIPAC is at it again. A recent survey, sent out in Minnesota shows that AIPAC is allegedly laying the groundwork to unseat Rep. Ilhan Omar — one of our fiercest champions for justice in Congress. [ ]The Intercept headline reading: "Is AIPAC Coming After Ilhan Omar?" This is textbook right-wing meddling in democratic primaries. This is about silencing progressive voices, plain and simple. Last cycle, AIPAC spent tens of millions to oust progressives like Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush from Congress. Now they’re targeting Ilhan, and it’s clear they’ll spare no expense. Ilhan said it best: “Our district is not for sale.” But defending leaders like her takes real resources and grassroots power. That’s where you come in, Peter. [ ]Will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund to defend leaders like Ilhan and show AIPAC that our democracy can’t be bought? [ ]Contribute ›› In solidarity, The Squad Victory Fund

body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109472114/551215000/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTg2ZDZiZC1jYjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eOTwo19QyWwGxf2GhGk6K_5bKo2lPk9Xky8v2UfXFLk=&emci=297695c1-0a47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=be86d6bd-cb47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter, in case you've missed it...

_Here’s an inside look at what’s happening on the Hill right now:_

➡️ Republicans are rushing to make Elon Musk’s DOGE cuts permanent—which means massive giveaways to billionaires at the expense of working families.

➡️ Trump and Musk are in a public feud, scrambling to shift blame for the harm they caused while in power.

➡️ Not one Republican seems focused on what’s actually happening in communities like WA-08—or anywhere else across the country.

Let's be honest, Peter—trying to make sense of their priorities is exhausting, and frankly, _pointless_.

But here’s what I can say clearly: Democrats are doing the work. We’re in committee rooms, on the floor, and out in our districts fighting back around the clock against policies that hurt our communities, all while working to uplift legislation that helps working families, and staying focused on the issues that **actually** matter, like Medicaid, childcare, affordable housing, clean energy, and a tax system that gives the middle class a break.

This is what real leadership looks like. It’s what Democrats show up to do every single day...because that's what we were hired to do by YOU, the American people. We work for you. Not special interests. Not extremist billionaires. Not the president.

**We must flip the House in 2026 if we're ever going to put a check on Congressional Republicans and an unhinged president.**

People are watching to see if Democrats have the momentum, drive, and support to win in 2026, and deliver. Our FEC report this month will send an important message. Let’s make sure it is a strong one. Right now, _we’re behind_ —and June is too important of a month to fall short. We've set a $15,000 goal to get us back on track now that we’re halfway through the month.

[**Can you chip in right now to help my team and me close the gap before our FEC fundraising numbers go public for the world to see? If you believe in real leadership—and in the work Democrats are doing to move this country forward—now’s the time to step up.** clean_body: Peter, in case you've missed it... Here’s an inside look at what’s happening on the Hill right now: ➡️ Republicans are rushing to make Elon Musk’s DOGE cuts permanent—which means massive giveaways to billionaires at the expense of working families. ➡️ Trump and Musk are in a public feud, scrambling to shift blame for the harm they caused while in power. ➡️ Not one Republican seems focused on what’s actually happening in communities like WA-08—or anywhere else across the country. Let's be honest, Peter—trying to make sense of their priorities is exhausting, and frankly, pointless. But here’s what I can say clearly: Democrats are doing the work. We’re in committee rooms, on the floor, and out in our districts fighting back around the clock against policies that hurt our communities, all while working to uplift legislation that helps working families, and staying focused on the issues that actually matter, like Medicaid, childcare, affordable housing, clean energy, and a tax system that gives the middle class a break. This is what real leadership looks like. It’s what Democrats show up to do every single day...because that's what we were hired to do by YOU, the American people. We work for you. Not special interests. Not extremist billionaires. Not the president. We must flip the House in 2026 if we're ever going to put a check on Congressional Republicans and an unhinged president. People are watching to see if Democrats have the momentum, drive, and support to win in 2026, and deliver. Our FEC report this month will send an important message. Let’s make sure it is a strong one. Right now, we’re behind —and June is too important of a month to fall short. We've set a $15,000 goal to get us back on track now that we’re halfway through the month. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Allow me to be frank
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj20530whwmeuu6mednhcye6nij0ceees6is82zhpla1d28s0jcrznkq7ebx4z05rqpzuedt7ts7jjpk4ev10&__stmp=sxrfmb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxrfmb&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf5ri4tc3v92z0wpksbaspis7o5iulgoetc2e4eb5uoeeaf0nhem4kbduxu3swtnzofqjp0ead1xjelbaje0dhc9w7s9uocorr0ka0mpnev5vv8iun01w6fik8nvly2jyjc89bxtzjuyt2aj08ps&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxrfmb&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxrfmb&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxrfmb&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxrfmb&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jf5ri4tc3v92z0wpksbaspissl8ocde7wqjutn6ongkzyluk23rsnu69b4xej5ipv9hcjiszdqhj9ibwu2hiqu009498rn1oo5hfuumla8wzgsk3w83a76s6z5xtsrytl7rx268tul8nkde7jifh&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxrfmb&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxrfmb&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=33g5tc4p3i8v3z1lclpzqhotexu5k70hgaovc6wyphlxn8j3g0g60qybeqf0gqgd3prcers5t9ibhrddnjsk824axrku97qyruyd3760tw40ghaimc4ogk8vkqa7sntbsxrqb70ut3c12hkwfj0fb7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxrfmb&__onlt=t

name: Prudent Politics
subject: The history of capitalism and socialism
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjqIteknop5I6ITmbu2mgqw&s=KBLIENANLCKLOKKH)
---
| | Dear Friend,Over the last century, free-market capitalism and socialism have provided the dominant interpretations, and conflicting visions, of political and economic freedom. In the past few years, we’ve seen a growing trend among young Americans in favor of socialism and against capitalism.
---
| [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjqIteknop5I7ITmbu2mgqw&s=KBLIENANLCKLOKKH)
---
| | **But do they truly understand the history and outcomes of socialism and capitalism?** This is _precisely_ why we put together this brand new eBook, **[_The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjqIteknop5I8ITmbu2mgqw&s=KBLIENANLCKLOKKH)**[](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjqIteknop5I9ITmbu2mgqw&s=KBLIENANLCKLOKKH), from Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson. This eBook consists of two papers—one from each scholar—written in conjunction with _The Human Prosperity Project on Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism_. This project provides objective and scholarly analyses of free-market capitalism, socialism, and hybrid systems and provides evidence on the effectiveness of the various systems on outcomes that affect prosperity and well-being. I think you will find this new eBook particularly important and timely, given the recent interest in policies that are radical from a US historical perspective, some of which are advocated by political leaders. **[Simply click here to request your free copy of _The History Of Socialism And Capitalism_.](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjqIteknop5IaITmbu2mgqw&s=KBLIENANLCKLOKKH)** Thanks,Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

PrudentPolitics.com

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176

[You can read our Privacy Policy by clicking here](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xuesjqIteknop5IbITmbu2mgqw&s=KBLIENANLCKLOKKH)

[Click Here to unsubscribe from future emails](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/public/unsubscribe.jsp?gid=6400000706&uid=64007911625&mid=6400027142&sig=ADPLMFBKGDNGIGDL&l=D0I2xuesjqIteknop5I&slt=4)
