name: Team Crow
subject: This parade isn’t about our troops. It’s about Trump.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
This Saturday, Donald Trump is throwing himself a vanity parade in D.C.

We should honor and recognize the Army’s 250th birthday. We should celebrate and thank our troops and their families. There’s a right way, and a wrong way, to honor our servicemembers.

Donald Trump is doing it the wrong way — making this anniversary all about himself. He’s spending tens of millions of dollars on a military parade, on his birthday. For Trump, it’s more about personal glory than patriotism.

Jason Crow has served in the military and in combat. He knows what it takes to protect our country and support the men and women in uniform. For Jason, honoring service means fighting every day for veterans and military families by making sure they get the care, respect, and benefits they deserve.

While Trump stages his $45 million birthday pageant, his administration is gutting the VA, slashing Medicaid, and putting food assistance for veterans’ families on the chopping block.

Jason believes our service members deserve better — and that $45 million price tag could instead be used for veterans’ health care, improving living conditions for troops, keeping food on the tables of military families, and preserving vital jobs at the VA.

Will you chip in today to stand with Jason Crow and his work to support our veterans? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025?amount=10&express_lane=true]

clean_body: Jason Crow For Congress [] This Saturday, Donald Trump is throwing himself a vanity parade in D.C. We should honor and recognize the Army’s 250th birthday. We should celebrate and thank our troops and their families. There’s a right way, and a wrong way, to honor our servicemembers. Donald Trump is doing it the wrong way — making this anniversary all about himself. He’s spending tens of millions of dollars on a military parade, on his birthday. For Trump, it’s more about personal glory than patriotism. Jason Crow has served in the military and in combat. He knows what it takes to protect our country and support the men and women in uniform. For Jason, honoring service means fighting every day for veterans and military families by making sure they get the care, respect, and benefits they deserve. While Trump stages his $45 million birthday pageant, his administration is gutting the VA, slashing Medicaid, and putting food assistance for veterans’ families on the chopping block. Jason believes our service members deserve better — and that $45 million price tag could instead be used for veterans’ health care, improving living conditions for troops, keeping food on the tables of military families, and preserving vital jobs at the VA. Will you chip in today to stand with Jason Crow and his work to support our veterans? [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you, Team Crow Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States www.jasoncrowforcongress.com [] | info@jasoncrowforcongress.com [info@jasoncrowforcongress.com] Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress *Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. clean_body: | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the false narrative that the majority of Americans are backing the radical transgender movement and want to block President Trump’s executive orders. This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children. This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found “High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”... “Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)” Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations: “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”. “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.” 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care. As a senior how do you feel about their findings? Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?Or...**Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults WHO ARE right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls? Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?” Or ...Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,and be injured by, a biological male? Are you worried that 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_Or ...** Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?**I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children. And that’s why I need your immediate response: My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for. With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates make our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill. At AMAC Action we know that patriotic Americans like you and I are horrified by stories of school administrators “socially-transitioning” children at school without so much as a phone call to their parents...We’re horrified by the laws being passed by states like Colorado that deem “misgendering” a form of child abuse... And we’re horrified by court rulings like those in California that have barred parents from joint custody because one parent does not want to allow a child to “transition.”It’s happening all around us—but AMAC Action is committed to fighting AGAINST the madness.But powerful left-wing organizations across the country are fighting FOR it...The terrifying reality is that the radical ACLU alone has over $200 million to spend each year fighting for “transgenderism” and other left-wing radicalism in the courts.And they aren’t just pushing the Leftist transgender movement, they are aggressively forcing it on us and our children. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- transgender ideology is everywhere. They want to make us believe WE are the radicals for wanting to protect kids.Enough is enough. **AMAC Action is countering this radical misinformation from the Trans activists with PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM. While President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he needs all the help he can get to take on the radical judges and left-wing officials in states like California and Maine who are fighting every single one of his executive orders.During President Trump’s last term, the ACLU bragged about filing over 400 legal actions against the Trump administration.And I fear that this term their sabotage will be much worse. We need definitive proof that the American people are on his side on this critical, common-sense issue. Behind this ideology lies a massive, billion-dollar industry that’s pressuring parents into allowing life-altering surgeries for their children—surgeries that leave kids unable to have children of their own and turn them into lifelong medical patients.We will call this what it is—abuse.We will call them what they are–enablers of abuse and enablers of child mutilation.And we need to know that America’s seniors stand with us in this fight.To secure parental rights, and protect children from radical transgender ideology, you in advance for your help. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,Chairwoman**AMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 |

body:
Stephen Miller just went after Pramila, saying Democrats are in “open rebellion” against the country.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250612-5136-footer&t=1&akid=5136%2E420207%2ElKchX8)
Hey Peter, just wanted to make sure you saw this.
Stephen Miller just went after Pramila, saying Democrats are in “open rebellion” against the country. In reality, he’s just trying to cover for the Trump administration’s attempts to undermine our democracy.
**But Pramila refuses to back down.** She’s going to continue standing up for the rights of _everyone_ in this country, and she’s counting on your grassroots support to do it.
[**Read Pramila’s message below, and then pitch in $3 or anything you can to help her keep up the fight against Trump’s authoritarian agenda.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250612-1?refcode=em20250612-5136&refcode2=5136_420207_lKchX8&akid=5136%2E420207%2ElKchX8)

Thank you,
Team Jayapal

From: Pramila Jayapal
Subject: Stephen Miller just said I was in “open rebellion” against this country.
Hi Peter, Pramila Jayapal here.
Over the weekend, I made it clear that we are not backing down when it comes to defending the rights of our undocumented neighbors.
In response, Stephen Miller said I was in “open rebellion” against this country.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250612-1?refcode=em20250612-5136&refcode2=5136_420207_lKchX8&akid=5136%2E420207%2ElKchX8)
**As far as I’m concerned, the only “open rebellion” that’s happening is the Trump administration’s attempts to undermine our democracy and erode our constitutional rights.**
I’m not going to stop fighting back, no matter WHAT the Trump administration tries to throw at me. And Peter, I’m counting on grassroots supporters like you to have my back every step of the way.
[**If you’re standing with me in this critical moment, please chip in today to help me fight back.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250612-1?refcode=em20250612-5136&refcode2=5136_420207_lKchX8&akid=5136%2E420207%2ElKchX8)

---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109473451/551220172/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250612_ff_FFTogether_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDgxN2MzMi1kMDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RaArOIUvzMe26OBro5Iz2Kw3YIseLgIxfSRuvPcdYs=&emci=9ebe697c-c347-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44817c32-d047-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277)

Our speakers will bring you up to speed on all relevant issues and explore how we can advance our democracy and continue fighting for our free and fair elections. [**Will we see you there? See the details in the flyer below:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109473459/551220181/-1841064288?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250612_ff_FFTogether_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDgxN2MzMi1kMDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RaArOIUvzMe26OBro5Iz2Kw3YIseLgIxfSRuvPcdYs=&emci=9ebe697c-c347-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44817c32-d047-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277#/registration) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109473467/551220189/-1841064288?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250612_ff_FFTogether_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDgxN2MzMi1kMDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RaArOIUvzMe26OBro5Iz2Kw3YIseLgIxfSRuvPcdYs=&emci=9ebe697c-c347-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44817c32-d047-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277#/registration)

For this conversation, we’ll be joined by Esosa Osa, founder and CEO of Onyx Impact, and Angelo Carusone, President and CEO of Media Matters for America and Media Matters Action Network .
Media Matters for America is a progressive research and information center dedicated to comprehensively monitoring, analyzing, and correcting conservative misinformation in the U.S. media. Onyx Impact is a nonprofit organization founded to better serve and empower Black communities by fighting the harmful information ecosystems targeting them.
**Both Esosa and Angelo bring a ton of experience and varied perspective, and this dynamic discussion on democracy will truly be one for the books!**
Not only will you leave this event with insight on how we got to the present moment — as well as inspiration for how we’ll build our way out — you’ll have the opportunity to meet alongside friends, supporters, and activists alike among the Fair Fight coalition.
**Friend, we get it — the news has become... _a lot_. But that’s why the conversations in our ‘Fair Fight: Together’ series are so important. **
**When:** June 17th at 7:00 p.m. EDT
**Where:** Virtual Event (Zoom Link Provided Upon RSVP)
[**So what do you say? Secure your virtual spot by RSVPing here, and while you’re at it, you can even submit questions for our speakers!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109473473/551220195/-1841064288?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250612_ff_FFTogether_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDgxN2MzMi1kMDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9RaArOIUvzMe26OBro5Iz2Kw3YIseLgIxfSRuvPcdYs=&emci=9ebe697c-c347-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=44817c32-d047-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1037277#/registration)

name: EMILYs List
subject: They were never going to leave abortion up to the states
body:
Everyone has a right to lifesaving care |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109473667/551220556/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE625_20250612_TrumpRescinds_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056383&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTNjNDYyYy1kMDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlrsuvZQKGDM0R6FHObs-1IaigvH8tnH_NM814S59OE=) The Trump administration has rescinded guidance that reaffirmed hospitals' obligation to provide emergency abortion care to a pregnant patient in a medical crisis.

**Trump is putting his extremist agenda ahead of our health and safety. But EMILYs List women are fighting back.** | [DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT THEM](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109473668/551220557/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE625_20250612_TrumpRescinds_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1056383&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTNjNDYyYy1kMDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZlrsuvZQKGDM0R6FHObs-1IaigvH8tnH_NM814S59OE=)

Peter,

**Last week, the Trump administration _revoked_ federal guidance protecting health care providers who perform emergency abortions.**

Under the Biden administration, the Emergency Medicine Treatment and Labor Act (EMTALA) required hospitals to perform abortions when necessary to save a patient's life, regardless of existing abortion bans in that state.

**The move by the Trump administration to remove guidance to protect pregnant people makes it clear that Republicans are on a crusade to eliminate abortion access, and they're happy to risk lives to do so.**

Make no mistake, Peter: Republicans were never going to leave abortion up to the states. They want to ban abortion and they'll do _anything_ — including endanger our lives — to reach their goal. Until Republicans are stripped of their power, they're going to continue their assault on our lives and freedoms.

And here at EMILYs List, _we're dead-set on taking back that power for the pro-choice majority._

Our task is to get anti-choice extremists out of office everywhere, and we've endorsed 31 women this cycle (and counting!) who can accomplish just that.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Zero tolerance for foreign-flag waving rioters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
What’s happening in Los Angeles is unacceptable.

People throwing rocks, cement, and fireworks at police are not
“protestors” or “demonstrators.”

_THEY’RE CRIMINALS WHO SHOULD BE ARRESTED — AND ANY FOREIGNERS
SHOULD BE DEPORTED IMMEDIATELY.
[https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/la-riot-tc-e-wama/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=wama&utm_campaign=lariot-tc_tcotton_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amtposition=4&amt4=100&recurring=false&ex_tid=20250610_TW-5L.117501_t1652323-575&utm_term=lrm-active]_

The lesson from the BLM riots five years ago is clear: we must have
zero tolerance for violent insurrectionists. And especially zero
tolerance for foreign-flag waving rioters fighting for criminal
illegal aliens.

If you needed a reminder that Democrats put illegals first and
Americans last, and that they don’t really care about the rule of
law in this country, here it is.

Not one single prominent Democrat has forcefully condemned this mob.
Kamala Harris is siding with them. And of course Gavin Newsom is
reminding us all that he’s a national disgrace.

The Democrats stand with the violent illegal aliens rioting, looting,
blocking traffic, and assaulting cops.

I’m glad President Trump is in the White House. He’s cleaning up
the mess they created.

NOW, WE JUST HAVE TO DO EVERYTHING WE CAN TO STOP THESE LUNATICS FROM
REGAINING POWER.

name: DNC Latino Coalitions
subject: DNC Chair Ken Martin Statement on Assault of Senator Alex Padilla
body:
| | | | | |
---
|
---
|
# DNC Chair Ken Martin Statement on Assault of Senator Alex Padilla
---
| _In response to the assault of Senator Alex Padilla, the first Latino elected to the U.S. Senate from California, at a Department of Homeland Security press briefing today, **DNC Chair Ken Martin released the following statement:**_
“This assault on U.S. Senator Alex Padilla has sent a violent message to all of America: If you dissent against Donald Trump and openly disagree with the government, then you are not safe in our country. It doesn’t matter if you are a duly elected official — if you ask questions, if you stand up to Trump and Kristi Noem’s abuse of power, then government thugs will come after you. Make no mistake: This horrifying escalation of violence is straight out of an authoritarian playbook. Trump is a weak man, yet he’s desperate to look strong as more Americans become enraged by the chaos he’s inciting in California. His dangerous approach to immigration enforcement stokes fear, profiles Black and Brown communities, rips families apart, and sows violence.
“Trump is out of control. He’s now using federal law enforcement to silence those who are exercising their rights. This has nothing to do with law and order — it’s a disgusting abuse of power.”
[**WATCH**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=3c6822959b&e=d6c5c7d7ec)**: In an unprecedented move, federal law enforcement forcibly removed Senator Alex Padilla during a press briefing for asking questions about Donald Trump and Kristi Noem’s abuse of power.**
[ Meredith Lee Hill, Politico](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=d838058193&e=d6c5c7d7ec): **“‘I’m Senator Alex Padilla. I have questions for the secretary.’**
**“FBI agent and others proceed to drag him out of the room”**
[ Sam Stein, The Bulwark](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6d37a7f693&e=d6c5c7d7ec): **“[T]his is from Padilla’s staff, it’s of them cuffing the Senator out in the hall”**
[ John Bresnahan, Punchbowl](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=90e95cbdef&e=d6c5c7d7ec): **“Never seen a US senator treated like this.** Wow.
“Yes, he interrupted Noem’s presser but that’s a US senator”
**Trump bypassed the authority of a sitting governor — the first time in about 60 years that a president has done so — and sent National Guard troops to suppress protests in California.**
[ Washington Post](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=8267afeb12&e=d6c5c7d7ec):**“President Donald Trump’s order to deploy 2,000 California National Guard troops to Los Angeles appears unprecedented, relying on an unorthodox use of a law aimed at quelling serious domestic unrest or an attack on the United States by a foreign power, some legal experts said Sunday.**
**“It marks the first time in about 60 years that an American president has taken such action without a governor’s consent**. Furthermore, his executive order authorizes the Pentagon to dispatch military personnel domestically to enable federal functions and protect government property — **a chilling sign, the experts said, that Trump is prepared to send troops into other cities in response to protests.”**
[ Politico](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=eac18eab38&e=d6c5c7d7ec): “California Gov. Gavin Newsom said Donald Trump’s threats against him and other Democrats following **the president’s unilateral deployment of National Guard troops to the Los Angeles area carried all the markings of authoritarianism. ...**
**“Trump and his border czar have targeted Newsom and Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass by name with threats of arrests** — and other ominous unspecified acts to be carried out by the federal government if the two don’t fall in line. ...
“California on Monday sued the Trump administration for authorizing the deployment against their will. The president and aides portrayed the move as just the start of potentially escalated action, including sending hundreds of U.S. Marines from nearby Camp Pendleton.”
**REMINDER: Trump has suggested using the military to suppress political speech before.**
[ NPR](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=a3e503809e&e=d6c5c7d7ec): **“Former Pentagon chief Esper says Trump asked about shooting protesters”**
“Former Defense Secretary Mark T. Esper said President Donald Trump inquired about shooting protesters amid the unrest that took place after George Floyd’s murder in 2020. ...
**“Esper said he stayed in the administration because he worried that if he left, the president would more easily implement some of his ‘dangerous ideas.’ ...**
“Esper said he and other top officials were caught off guard by Trump’s reaction to the unrest in the summer of 2020.”
###

name: Team NDRC
subject: What it means to be in an era of perpetual redistricting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
We’re approaching elections that will have large implications for the fair maps movement. Take a look:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109474197/551222366/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3YmFkZTliLWQxNDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=J1BCCLptx4CWJmnRaS4tlo5j26ltJQ8CUWj-SL4CDpY=&emci=7225d818-aa47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=27bade9b-d147-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, we’re reaching out to you today because you’re the kind of Democrat who knows that the future of our democracy depends on a lot more than just the elections that get the most attention. State-level races and mid-cycle redistricting fights have a serious impact on how maps get drawn and how our system functions. **We’re in an era of perpetual redistricting.** It’s no longer the case that the maps only get refreshed every 10 years after the latest census. These fights are happening in states across the country every single year. **Before the last election,** Republicans successfully gerrymandered three congressional districts in their favor in North Carolina — and happened to capture the House majority by three seats. **And this year in Ohio,** Republicans are intent on drawing new maps that could tilt up to three MORE seats in their direction. **That brings us to now.** In the coming months, the balance of power will be decided in the Michigan State Senate, the Pennsylvania State Supreme Court, and the Virginia House of Delegates, where all 100 seats and the governor are up for election. **These state-level races might not grab many national headlines. The average American certainly isn’t aware of the role they’ll play in the fight to protect democracy. But you’re someone who gets that the important work to fight for fairness is _ongoing_ and happening right now. ** [**That’s why the NDRC is laser-focused on making sure we don’t come up short in our efforts to elect pro-democracy candidates and fight for fair maps and fair elections wherever we need to show up next. clean_body: We’re approaching elections that will have large implications for the fair maps movement. Take a look: | Peter, we’re reaching out to you today because you’re the kind of Democrat who knows that the future of our democracy depends on a lot more than just the elections that get the most attention. State-level races and mid-cycle redistricting fights have a serious impact on how maps get drawn and how our system functions. We’re in an era of perpetual redistricting. It’s no longer the case that the maps only get refreshed every 10 years after the latest census. These fights are happening in states across the country every single year. Before the last election, Republicans successfully gerrymandered three congressional districts in their favor in North Carolina — and happened to capture the House majority by three seats. And this year in Ohio, Republicans are intent on drawing new maps that could tilt up to three MORE seats in their direction. That brings us to now. In the coming months, the balance of power will be decided in the Michigan State Senate, the Pennsylvania State Supreme Court, and the Virginia House of Delegates, where all 100 seats and the governor are up for election. These state-level races might not grab many national headlines. The average American certainly isn’t aware of the role they’ll play in the fight to protect democracy. But you’re someone who gets that the important work to fight for fairness is ongoing and happening right now. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you for your help, Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. body:
The summer of hate brought to you by the Woke Liberal Mob

Peter,

I've seen third-world countries run better than California. The governor and mayor are Communist Marxists, there's no doubt.

If my father, who drove a tank on the beaches of Normandy, saw what was going on today, he wouldn't even recognize that California was a part of America. This is anarchy; they're trying to overthrow our government with their Woke Ideas.

This is not going to be the summer of love, it'll be the summer of hate. The Democrats are going to push it throughout the country, and we've got to stand strong.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

name: AOC
subject: I will tell you what I believe:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I refuse to give up.
#
We live in a constant state of injustice. We are always struggling against systems of mass incarceration, of extreme income inequality, of late stage capitalism. Those conditions do exist.
But one thing that I think is important is that we must mobilize for an affirmative vision for this country — we can’t just mobilize on fear**.
We need to be clear about what the stakes are. We do. **But I don’t believe in a ‘fear only’ approach**.
I’ll tell you what I believe: I believe in a bare minimum.
A $15 minimum wage needed to be passed several years ago. I believe in guaranteed, improved, and expanded Medicare to every single American.
We can’t give up. I’ve been in that place when I was a waitress. I did spend some time giving up and being cynical and saying, “F*ck this.”
And you know what it got us? Nothing. Depression, cynicism, and a sense of purposelessness. Giving up is a privilege that people just can’t afford.
Movements wax and wane. And there are times when it feels like our power is waning, and it’s really easy to take our ball and go home. **But the strength of a movement really depends on the durability of it, and the commitment to it**.
That black pill of cynicism is the death of movements, not the birth of them.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250612.R4SeNv&refcode=em20250612-9081-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9081%2E2526796%2ECzxoKC)

# Trump says he "couldn't care less" about liberal performers boycotting
President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania attended The Kennedy Performing Arts Center in Washington D.C. for the opening night of Les Miserables Wednesday, **[prompting some performers to boycott the show.](https://substack.com/redirect/ccbc3aa2-aeb9-419d-bcc3-f2e8aac5d6c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ccbc3aa2-aeb9-419d-bcc3-f2e8aac5d6c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Liberal Cast Member Uproar** : Several cast members of the production chose to boycott the performance in protest of Trump's leadership changes at the Kennedy Center. Additionally, drag performers attended the event as a form of protest against Trump's criticism of the center's previous programming that were "specifically targeting our youth."
* **Trump Unfazed:** Despite the protests, Trump appeared unbothered, telling The New York Post he "couldn't care less, all I do is run the country well." He expressed excitement about restoring the Kennedy Center and emphasized his commitment to reshaping its programming from its current "woke" state.
* **Despite protests, event success soared** : The event raised $10 million, highlighting the continued support from the public for the Kennedy Center's new direction.

* * *
# Major Left-Wing Groups allegedly FUNDING violent LA anti-ICE protests
Left wing activist organizations **[are reportedly financing the destructive riots](https://substack.com/redirect/18c05725-5d6c-49a2-b28d-81b05a547d9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Los Angeles and other cities.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/18c05725-5d6c-49a2-b28d-81b05a547d9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Left-Wing Organizations Backing Violence** : Recent anti-ICE riots in Los Angeles have wreaked violent havoc on the city, and are now coming out as allegedly orchestrated by major left-wing groups, according to reports.
* **Key Organizations Involved** : Groups such as the Party for Socialism and Liberation (PSL), ANSWER Coalition, Service Employees International Union, and Coalition for Humane Immigrant Rights LA have been identified as major organizers and funders of the unrest, sources say.
* **Government Contracts** : CHIRLA received over $34 million in government contracts in 2023, mostly from California, raising questions about the use of public funds for violent political activism.
* **Nonprofit Involvement** : Organizations like Operation Healthy Hearts and LA Poverty Department are accused of distributing riot gear and anarchist materials to protesters, further fueling the violence.
* **Financial Backing from Major Activists** : Activist Neville Roy Singham, with ties to the Chinese Communist Party, has also reportedly provided significant funding to these organizations - specifically PSL, which has ties to promoting Chinese propaganda.
* **Investigations Underway** : Senator Josh Hawley has launched an investigation into these alleged nefarious backers, saying in a letter to executive direct Angelica Salicas of the Coalition for Human Immigrant Rights, **["Let me be clear: bankrolling civil unrest is not protected speech. It is aiding and abetting criminal conduct."](https://substack.com/redirect/2c440c91-151b-4d77-90c0-bcc9d0f083b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

| Team—it’s LaMonica McIver. Last month, the Trump administration brought charges against me because I was doing my job as a member of Congress. **Now, I’ve been officially indicted.**

**Let me be clear:** under the law, members of Congress are explicitly authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. A new alarming report reveals over 70 attacks on America's power grid
in just one year, and these are calculated strikes designed to weaken
our nation's most essential lifeline.

Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most
vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you
and your family in critical danger:

OUR CRUMBLING ELECTRIC GRID.

_Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000
electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to
18 months._

Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails.
Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total
chaos and darkness.

Our enemies would just sit back and watch as we self-destruct through
looting, rioting and the targeting of police officers.

OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED.

Are you and your family prepared to survive as much as 18 months
without electricity, food or clean water?

It seems like the government has been fixated on taking more and more
away from people who worked hard to earn it, while doing virtually
nothing to secure our nation's critical infrastructure.

[https://app.gunowner-news.com/campaigns/bq925hxxqobe2/track-url/yc932vafx3f7c/019f5d0a055cb6b96642915cd0d30085baf547c5]

Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would
be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled.

Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless
supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and
without gas, fumes or noise.

POWER GENERATOR 1200

THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And
never needs gas, ever.

You'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a
safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a
blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse.

And we have some great news!

name: Mark Warner
subject: re: I’ll explain

body:
I’m sorry to bother you, Peter, but if you’ll give me just a few minutes of your time, I’ll explain why.

| I’m sorry to bother you, Peter, but if you’ll give me just a few minutes of your time, I’ll explain why.

As you know, Abigail Spanberger’s historic race for Governor is not just critically important to the future of our state, it’s important for the future of our country too. Every Democratic Governor in office is a vital line of defense against the reckless Trump administration – that’s exactly why Republicans are working so hard to defeat Abigail.

And I’m a top GOP target next year. The Republican Senate campaign arm is targeting Virginia – they think they can defeat me to expand their Senate majority in Washington.

To make matters worse, we need to be prepared for Republicans' billionaire-funded super PACs to target both of us, too

That means we have a lot of work to do if we want to keep up with the millions of dollars they’re going to spend in Virginia – this year and next. **And that work starts now. Not next month. Not next week. If we want to flip the Governor’s office and hold my seat in the Senate, we need to act now.**

clean_body: I’m sorry to bother you, Peter, but if you’ll give me just a few minutes of your time, I’ll explain why. | I’m sorry to bother you, Peter, but if you’ll give me just a few minutes of your time, I’ll explain why. As you know, Abigail Spanberger’s historic race for Governor is not just critically important to the future of our state, it’s important for the future of our country too. Every Democratic Governor in office is a vital line of defense against the reckless Trump administration – that’s exactly why Republicans are working so hard to defeat Abigail. And I’m a top GOP target next year. The Republican Senate campaign arm is targeting Virginia – they think they can defeat me to expand their Senate majority in Washington. To make matters worse, we need to be prepared for Republicans' billionaire-funded super PACs to target both of us, too That means we have a lot of work to do if we want to keep up with the millions of dollars they’re going to spend in Virginia – this year and next. And that work starts now. Not next month. Not next week. If we want to flip the Governor’s office and hold my seat in the Senate, we need to act now. = | = | = | = | = | = The fight continues, Mark Warner * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. name: Becca Balint
subject: This is about seizing more power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109475233/551225701/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQzOTgzYy1kNTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aALLNRdHNYRlOLJgmUOgSC14pvacDWQRNU-QIEDasg=)
---
Let’s be clear about this, Peter: Everything that’s happening in Los Angeles right now is about seizing more power. And that’s always been the goal. Donald Trump is signaling to the American people that he will not let rules or laws stop him from what he really wants — **a military police state where he can suppress speech, violate our right to protest, and silence our ability to speak out against injustice. ** Little by little, he is eroding what we see as norms as he seeks unchecked and unchallenged power for himself. The last time the National Guard was deployed in a state without the governor’s permission was 1965, Peter — 60 years ago. And now Trump is threatening to arrest the governor of California for, rightfully, calling him out over not having the authority to deploy National Guard troops in California. As a former history teacher, I can tell you that this is straight out of the authoritarian playbook — **and that should be a wake-up call for all of us. ** Trump wants us to give in and give up, but that is the _last_ thing we can do at a moment like this. We need to keep using our voices and fighting for what’s right to make sure he knows that we will _never_ let him turn America into an autocratic state. **[If you’re ready to stand with me and thousands of other folks to say no to Trump’s lawlessness, pitch in any amount today. Every dollar helps us keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109475234/551225702/-662775586?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQzOTgzYy1kNTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aALLNRdHNYRlOLJgmUOgSC14pvacDWQRNU-QIEDasg=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109475235/551225703/-662775586?express_lane=true&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDQzOTgzYy1kNTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aALLNRdHNYRlOLJgmUOgSC14pvacDWQRNU-QIEDasg=)

body:
Senator Catherine Cortez Masto here. I’m reaching out because there’s a lot on the line here in Nevada — and we need your help. | | | Hi friend, Senator Catherine Cortez Masto here. I’m reaching out because there’s a lot on the line here in Nevada — and we need your help. Our grassroots fundraising has slowed down. Sadly, we’ve seen what happens when we fall behind early: Republicans flood our state with dark money, spread disinformation, and try to drown out the voices of working families. We can’t let that happen. That’s why I’m asking: **[_Can you chip in $10 or more to NV Dems today? In this week's episode, Cliff Schecter and co-host David Shuster are joined by former U.S. Attorney Joyce Vance for a deep dive into the legal, political, and constitutional implications of recent events in Los Angeles and beyond. The discussion focuses on Donald Trump's usurpation of California's authority with a typically dunderheaded and ego-based decision to federalize the National Guard to deploy troops in L.A. This has sparked legal challenges from CA Governor Gavin Newsom.
`Independent Media For Just $1.32/Week!`
We launched our **Substack show, "Amped Up w/ Cliff Schecter."** _To celebrate,**you get full access to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week!**_

Vance, now a law professor at the University of Alabama and MSNBC contributor, brings her expertise to unpack complicated legal questions around federal vs state authority, the limits of the Insurrection Act, and the dangerous erosion of democratic norms under the Trump administration. And to make a few jokes along the way.
Vance outlines how the use of ICE agents and masked federal personnel creates confusion and undermines civil liberties--especially when federal agents cover their faces like they're Batman villains and refuse to identify themselves or follow proper procedures.

* * *
The episode also covers the broader implications of recent prosecutions of Democratic lawmakers, including the arrest of Senator Alex Padilla and indictment of Congresswoman MacGyver, raising alarms about the weaponization of the justice system. Especially by, as Cliff continues to remind us he should be called, "34-count-felon Donald Trump"."
Throughout, the hosts and guest emphasize the importance of knowing your rights, staying engaged, and resisting efforts to intimidate peaceful protestors. From legal advice on what to do if detained, to calls for state governors to stand firm against federal overreach, this episode is a timely primer for anyone concerned about the health of American democracy.
Despite the heavy subject matter, the episode ends on a hopeful note, highlighting grassroots resistance, pushback from career officials, and the importance of civic courage in the face of authoritarian tactics.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: What I saw at Motor City Pride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
Marching in Motor City Pride reminded me why this fight matters so much |
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109475675/551227216/1550460626?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwZTgyZDQtZDY0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AhxKBRqWh2C308TgV6IbfQkmVIpKht2NWeI7A9TqztE=) Happy Pride, folks! This weekend at Motor City Pride, I walked alongside families, activists, organizers, drag artists, and proud LGBTQ+ Michiganders of every age. I saw joy, resilience, and fierce love. I also saw what’s at stake. **Too many people in this country still live in fear of losing their rights — to love who they love, to access health care, including gender-affirming care, or to simply exist as their authentic selves. ** That’s why I’m fighting like hell to build a future where everyone is free to live with safety, dignity, and pride. To me, Pride reinforces the importance of electing more LGBTQ+ leaders and allies at every level of government. **We need leaders who will defend civil rights, protect trans kids from hateful legislation, and ensure that reproductive freedom includes everybody.** So today, I’m asking you to help us turn Pride into political power by supporting the LGBTQ+ Victory Fund — an organization dedicated to recruiting and electing the next generation of LGBTQ+ leaders. This year alone, they've endorsed over 140 LGBTQ+ candidates, and they’re not slowing down anytime soon. **[Help build the bench of bold, values-driven candidates who won’t back down from a fight. Split a contribution between the LGBTQ+ Victory Fund and Fight Like Hell PAC today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109475676/551227217/1550460626?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwZTgyZDQtZDY0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AhxKBRqWh2C308TgV6IbfQkmVIpKht2NWeI7A9TqztE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to the LGBTQ Victory Fund and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109475677/551227218/1405260338?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWEwZTgyZDQtZDY0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AhxKBRqWh2C308TgV6IbfQkmVIpKht2NWeI7A9TqztE=)

clean_body: Marching in Motor City Pride reminded me why this fight matters so much | = Happy Pride, folks! This weekend at Motor City Pride, I walked alongside families, activists, organizers, drag artists, and proud LGBTQ+ Michiganders of every age. I saw joy, resilience, and fierce love. I also saw what’s at stake. Too many people in this country still live in fear of losing their rights — to love who they love, to access health care, including gender-affirming care, or to simply exist as their authentic selves. That’s why I’m fighting like hell to build a future where everyone is free to live with safety, dignity, and pride. To me, Pride reinforces the importance of electing more LGBTQ+ leaders and allies at every level of government. We need leaders who will defend civil rights, protect trans kids from hateful legislation, and ensure that reproductive freedom includes everybody. So today, I’m asking you to help us turn Pride into political power by supporting the LGBTQ+ Victory Fund — an organization dedicated to recruiting and electing the next generation of LGBTQ+ leaders. This year alone, they've endorsed over 140 LGBTQ+ candidates, and they’re not slowing down anytime soon. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to the LGBTQ Victory Fund and Fight Like Hell PAC will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for showing up, for speaking out, and for believing in the future we’re building together. With pride, Gretchen 🌈 Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

**That’s a tax giveaway to corporations and billionaires paid for by cuts to healthcare and food for hungry people.**
It’s brutal. It’s shameless. And we have to stop it from passing.

name: Team Brown
subject: Trump’s chaotic agenda is not working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We have had enough.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109476356/551229374/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250612chaotic_N_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjMzODI5Ni1kODQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T86cv12BJSnrS6K2fPSMBUdMl6uCpcT2CXdC_NJDLfU=) You need to see this, Peter.

In an interview on the notoriously pro-Trump news station Fox News, they highlighted **the 8,000 manufacturing jobs that were lost in May**. What is the Secretary of Labor’s response? _**“Well, we're certainly holding steady.”**_

This comes at a time when The New York Times has reported that **the global economy** is projected to endure a steep decline thanks to Trump’s tariff wars.

Trump’s chaotic agenda is not working: not for the hardworking people of our nation, not for businesses, and not for our economy. Day after day, Trump continues to put the agenda and priorities of billionaires and extremists over the well-being of our nation, and we have had enough.

**Prices are rising, from housing to groceries and everything in between, while Trump’s cronies are attacking the very safety nets that people in our communities depend on. Meanwhile, Trump and the Republican party are more concerned with manufacturing “emergencies” and engaging in infighting over social media than coming up with real solutions. We cannot let this continue.**

[**Shontel needs our help as she continues to use her voice and her position to defend our future in Washington. Will you rush a donation of $5 to support her fight against the GOP chaos that’s threatening the very fabric of our nation?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109476357/551229375/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250612chaotic_N_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjMzODI5Ni1kODQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T86cv12BJSnrS6K2fPSMBUdMl6uCpcT2CXdC_NJDLfU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ******[$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109476358/551229376/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250612chaotic_N_TB_90DO_6_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjMzODI5Ni1kODQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T86cv12BJSnrS6K2fPSMBUdMl6uCpcT2CXdC_NJDLfU=)******

clean_body: We have had enough. = You need to see this, Peter. In an interview on the notoriously pro-Trump news station Fox News, they highlighted the 8,000 manufacturing jobs that were lost in May. What is the Secretary of Labor’s response? “Well, we're certainly holding steady.” This comes at a time when The New York Times has reported that the global economy is projected to endure a steep decline thanks to Trump’s tariff wars. Trump’s chaotic agenda is not working: not for the hardworking people of our nation, not for businesses, and not for our economy. Day after day, Trump continues to put the agenda and priorities of billionaires and extremists over the well-being of our nation, and we have had enough. Prices are rising, from housing to groceries and everything in between, while Trump’s cronies are attacking the very safety nets that people in our communities depend on. Meanwhile, Trump and the Republican party are more concerned with manufacturing “emergencies” and engaging in infighting over social media than coming up with real solutions. Peter, Texans for Vaccine Choice fought hard this session, and we secured some _huge_ victories for our movement. What do you want first, the good news or the bad news? **Let’s go with the good news!** ✅ Parents can now print vaccine exemptions at home.
✅ Big Pharma is liable if they advertise in Texas.
✅ Organ transplants can’t be denied based on vaccination status.
✅ Doctors must give honest info about the COVID shot and report adverse effects.
✅ If the Parental Rights Constitutional Amendment passes in November, Texas will lead the nation in protecting parental rights. _The bad news?_ **Critical medical freedom bills were killed by legislators who chose politics over people.** The fight is far from over. [But here’s where YOU come in.](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3MDQwNjQ3ODI0NDc1OTY1LFwiclwiOjE1NzA0MDcwODMxNjgyNTI2MX0iLCJzIjoiOTQ2ZDJhNmE5OTk2NGYzMiJ9) Your support for TFVC gives us the resources needed to:

* Protect healthcare workers and college students from mandates
* Rein in the Texas Medical Board’s abuse of power

* Legalize ivermectin over the counter

* Guarantee the right to choose your own blood donor

|
---
| | [ **Let's Do It!** ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tj/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTU3MDQwNjQ3ODI4NjcwMjcwLFwiclwiOjE1NzA0MDcwODMxNjgyNTI2MX0iLCJzIjoiNjU0MTUxMTY2MzMyYjM2MSJ9)

Now, **MTG is preparing to bring that same chaos straight to the Governor’s Mansion in Georgia**.

❌ Exploiting fear to strip away our rights and silence dissent.

body:
Here's why we need your help.

| |

Team, the truth of the matter is, House Republicans’ priorities are out of wack.

Taking away school lunch programs.

Kicking 15 million Americans off their health insurance.

Handing out unneeded tax breaks to billionaires.

That’s the Republican agenda. And they’re rushing this agenda through Congress without even taking the time to read the bill they are voting on.

But Nellie is fighting back every step of the way, even when they tried to do this in the middle of the night.

Nellie is a fighter for working families— and now she's one of the Republicans’ top targets in 2026.

name: George Whitesides
subject: re: Alex Padilla
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2025?refcode=em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2025?refcode=em-header]
This is truly disturbing, Peter.

Just a few hours ago, Senator Alex Padilla was physically restrained and handcuffed at a press conference held by Trump Secretary Kristi Noem in Los Angeles.

Our Senator was representing millions of Californians with concerns about the chaos of this Administration. Instead of getting his questions answered, he was thrown to the ground and escorted out.

This was an extreme, aggressive, and unprecedented display. I’m standing with Senator Padilla, and I want you to know that I’ll be seeking answers about this brazen arrest from my position in Congress.

But for now, I need you to stand with me against what this incident represents: an out-of-control White House. If this could happen to our Senator in his own state, what will happen to everyday Americans perceived as blocking the MAGA agenda?

Please join me in condemning this act against our Senator by adding your signature to my petition today. We cannot let this stand.

Sign on >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/rGu7dWJp5EKlO7csdZ1Ldg2?refcode=em-6.12.25-all

Thank you,

George
https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.facebook.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/? [https://www.instagram.com/whitesidesforcongress/?] https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides? [https://twitter.com/gtwhitesides?]George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. Chip in to George's campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2025?refcode=em-footer]
To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: GeorgeWhitesides.com [https://www.georgewhitesides.com/?]

name: GOTV PAC
subject: "sworn to secrecy"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email3182025&amount=25]
Peter,
After a week of secret meetings in Washington, Texas Republicans are falling over themselves to dodge questions about Donald Trump's plan to redraw their state's congressional maps ahead of 2026.
One GOP Congressman said he was "sworn to secrecy," while another claimed he "forgot everything that was said."
Give us a break!
Trump's political team is pressuring Texas Republicans to further gerrymander the state to protect his grip on the House.
But their plan could backfire.
Why? Because to gain seats, they'd have to sacrifice safe GOP districts — making them more competitive and opening the door for Democrats to flip them.
That's where we come in!
We're fighting to hold every Democratic seat and go on offense in the toughest battlegrounds—because taking back the House in 2026 starts now. Can you pitch in $25 today to help us prepare for a surge of competitive House races across the country? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06122025&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

OTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06122025]
Republicans are scared — and they should be.
Let's get to work.
GOTV PAC

Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

name: Nick Tran
subject: Dan Crenshaw is killing the MAGA Agenda.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nick Tran for Texas
body:
| | | Dan Crenshaw keeps siding with Democrats, and I am SICK OF IT.

He fires off **_blank checks to Ukraine_** , funded by YOUR TAX DOLLARS.

He DID NOT VOTE to rename the Gulf of Mexico as the **_Gulf of America_**.

**_And in his latest stunt, he called the BLM riots of 2020 “justified”._**

**HE IS NOT A TRUE CONSERVATIVE!**

[**We know what we are up against. The general election race has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $15 between my campaign and Ohio House Dems today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109477418/551232926/963696235?refcode=250612_Sherrill_Update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRlNWNhOS1kYjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a0ySbow_xqPUelXSwzbo0_1puTXBC-DzTo2AuxFVKI0=) | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109477419/551232927/1509077774?refcode=250612_Sherrill_Update&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmRlNWNhOS1kYjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a0ySbow_xqPUelXSwzbo0_1puTXBC-DzTo2AuxFVKI0= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**

Team, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.
And it’s why, Team, I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.
**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**

Patriot,

Today is President Trump’s birthday, and the best way to celebrate isn’t by giving him a cake or sending a card...

**It’s by giving him an America First majority in 2026!**

President Trump has given so much to this country. Let’s give back by electing a Congress that fights _with_ him, not _against_ him.

President Trump doesn’t need more Democrats or RINOs in Congress. He needs America First warriors who will stand with him and our agenda.

**And with your help, Patriot, that’s exactly what we’ll send him.**

Every dollar will go toward:
* Opening new field offices in key battleground states
* Mobilizing an army of ballot-chasers
* Training grassroots volunteers
* Electing bold, unapologetic America First fighters

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Why This Fight Matters for America’s Future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Dear Friend, When I introduced the **Save SBA from Sanctuary Cities Act** , I wasn’t just thinking about federal office locations. I was thinking about what kind of country we want to be. Do we want a nation where the rule of law matters—where our families are safe, our small businesses thrive, and our communities work together to build a better future? Or do we want a nation where some cities decide the laws don’t apply to them—while they pocket your tax dollars? I’m fighting for the former. My bill says if a city refuses to enforce immigration law, they shouldn’t get to host federal agencies like the Small Business Administration. It’s that simple. This fight is bigger than me. It’s about standing up for America’s future.
If you believe in that fight—if you believe in the rule of law, fairness, and putting American citizens first—then I need you to join me. 👉[Donate Today](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?) And stay connected with me online:
👉[Facebook](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?)
👉 [X/Twitter](https://Finsta11160a6bc.link.bmesend.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?) Thank you for being part of this mission. Let’s keep up the fight. For America,
**Brad Finstad**

This June 14th, we celebrate a powerful trifecta of American pride: _**Flag Day, President Donald J. Trump's birthday, and the U.S. Army's 250th Birthday Parade.**_ It's a day to honor our nation's heritage, our military's legacy, and the leadership that has championed America's greatness.

_These are three powerful reminders of what it means to be American._

We're asking every patriot:

[🇺🇸 **Will you fly the American flag?

🎂 Will you wish President Trump a happy birthday?

🫡 Will you help celebrate the 250th Birthday of the United States Army?** ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f52e8e1c51434c8ebaec2055295ae66e&_e=oEA-uuwecX4hLZxUiYgHU_AvcKY2AAusOGQtXzdkK88IBT3T0_fxlJ3KO7uy13WeUARiU-2lZ09cC9pQN7_s_YSgDNaHhs1c7giL8VFEBZzn1ExH8XBOts_CL8T37_b0xsY7tA_SH1ARRYDHQJhaF4FjWwKWUD1sgpEY6KutetusLtUT9XFVZniPP7nS5Vc_2Wvmu0bhR0m1Wex6k27pdAJRODeaBBORUJB7RcovNI-b5sNV1ZLa6Q69XkkeZRWiuHMh3HkOXcMjOQhJoX_ws7mGWoj5u4PGkTWBmiOUG6ZYaKABTuV9H_w8TGXMItIBj8fYOX2iYEckCUL5vED-l4zC91gJA7dxzmVcGYxCWji-osMid5PkcNwJ3T7_2iTjH4z5EH4h5ZGgWm-t-s4q-lLorvmPUGeZhWhu7WLXzoCNTvfABCpdpbK2RBby-7Mo0FLbJWuEsyobDcwczd7pGQGKGNRfGB4FgqpsCu63_b4%3D)

We need to know who is on our side when it comes to defending America First values. This isn't just a celebration--it's a declaration.

**👉 If you said YES, prove it.**

[_**Complete your patriotic profile to stand for faith, freedom, and the flag.**_](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f52e8e1c51434c8ebaec2055295ae66e&_e=oEA-uuwecX4hLZxUiYgHU_AvcKY2AAusOGQtXzdkK88IBT3T0_fxlJ3KO7uy13WeUARiU-2lZ09cC9pQN7_s_YSgDNaHhs1c7giL8VFEBZzn1ExH8XBOts_CL8T37_b0xsY7tA_SH1ARRYDHQJhaF4FjWwKWUD1sgpEY6KutetusLtUT9XFVZniPP7nS5Vc_2Wvmu0bhR0m1Wex6k27pdAJRODeaBBORUJB7RcovNI-b5sNV1ZLa6Q69XkkeZRWiuHMh3HkOXcMjOQhJoX_ws7mGWoj5u4PGkTWBmiOUG6ZYaKABTuV9H_w8TGXMItIBj8fYOX2iYEckCUL5vED-lzgjEhD0y-9ht0ZUXdlNIHW1UYtQWQk6CMgCJzVO_F-W8xQHjpequ23CcNfDrdS4MwiU9gqM05bXD0oDApZXzNOLAmBYur6z6CMgkANZt9-6clgFLakaUC9NqtNbI1DNzyKuoQ0-BlFV98w4qEFyVK8%3D)

Your support helps us defend everything Flag Day stands for--from the Constitution to the values President Trump has championed.

**🗓 June 14th -- Show Your Colors. Stand with Trump and Senate Republicans. Defend America.**

name: Team Bennet
subject: Colorado’s public lands aren’t for sale.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/handsoffcoloradopubliclands [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/handsoffcoloradopubliclands]
Hi folks,
Right now, Utah Senator Mike Lee and Senate Republicans are working to include a fire sale of Colorado’s public lands into President Trump’s ‘big, beautiful bill.’ They want to sell up to 3.3 million acres of protected public lands across our country, including here in Colorado, to allow fossil fuel companies and real estate developers to exploit our precious landscapes.
Absolutely not.
Michael knows that our public lands aren’t for sale. Join him today to tell President Trump and Senate Republicans, HANDS OFF our precious lands >> [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/handsoffcoloradopubliclands]
https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/handsoffcoloradopubliclands [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/handsoffcoloradopubliclands]
Colorado’s public lands hold immense historical, cultural, economic, and recreational value to our state. Michael has spent years in the Senate working to further protect them, including helping protect over 53,000 acres within the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument.
Now, the Trump administration is working to undo all of that, and more.
Conveniently, Montana will be excluded from this sale—thanks to Republican Senators Steve Daines and Tim Sheehy doing Trump’s bidding in the U.S. Senate.
Our public lands should be preserved and protected, not used as political bargaining chips.
Michael is working to make sure this provision never sees the light of day, and he could use your backup in this fight. Team, add your name to our petition today to tell President Trump, Mike Lee, and Senate Republican HANDS OFF Colorado’s public lands! [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/handsoffcoloradopubliclands]
HANDS OFF CO PUBLIC LANDS [https://secure.michaelbennet.com/a/handsoffcoloradopubliclands]
Thanks,
Team Bennet

clean_body: [] Hi folks, Right now, Utah Senator Mike Lee and Senate Republicans are working to include a fire sale of Colorado’s public lands into President Trump’s ‘big, beautiful bill.’ They want to sell up to 3.3 million acres of protected public lands across our country, including here in Colorado, to allow fossil fuel companies and real estate developers to exploit our precious landscapes. Absolutely not. Michael knows that our public lands aren’t for sale. Join him today to tell President Trump and Senate Republicans, HANDS OFF our precious lands >> [] [] Colorado’s public lands hold immense historical, cultural, economic, and recreational value to our state. Michael has spent years in the Senate working to further protect them, including helping protect over 53,000 acres within the Camp Hale-Continental Divide National Monument. Now, the Trump administration is working to undo all of that, and more. Conveniently, Montana will be excluded from this sale—thanks to Republican Senators Steve Daines and Tim Sheehy doing Trump’s bidding in the U.S. Senate. Our public lands should be preserved and protected, not used as political bargaining chips. Michael is working to make sure this provision never sees the light of day, and he could use your backup in this fight. Team, add your name to our petition today to tell President Trump, Mike Lee, and Senate Republican HANDS OFF Colorado’s public lands! [] HANDS OFF CO PUBLIC LANDS [] Thanks, Team Bennet [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: Tank parade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Trump administration has used the levers of government to arrest his political enemies―from labor union presidents to sitting members of Congress doing their constitutional duties. | |
---
Peter, Did you see Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem have DHS agents tackle and handcuff California Sen. Alex Padilla for asking her questions at a press briefing about Trump’s military occupation of Los Angeles? **This is how a dictatorship operates―not a democracy.** The Trump administration has used the levers of government to arrest his political enemies―from labor union presidents to sitting members of Congress doing their constitutional duties. [**It’s time for Americans to rise up and make it crystal clear: This country has no king. There are nationwide rallies on Saturday in every state in the union―find one near you!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3iP-Rc9bD9vmV4WRIiX8t1g7bBTlfoqxZUeTpGffDngDDGIDWlzA-lG1obTrHln9aIfAWjnhs4gMOKQqoxfqVt8hYJrj1yG-DpcDzqtR84RnupIkxSFCdr-fKbYno3TVhctyIXSxZlwM5CP_9585WNOZtmyi27sA7FaiUTeA31XSDq1IwdSJdjkY0XkWa3WuCY/4ha/pZnek44lQN6GMj64pGoZzQ/h0/h001.w1SMSh9e5lmf_nb4yfy5Rr-t-eKPkvflQtWv6yy4n70) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3jQHuDMskqL92Vf6rwsvr1VqLPYv52jyCf1unJLnF56cL46ABKZP_4mrfgjTRl1nYZHbqTi4NOmg0J9bhTE0H-ow_ONbv52mcQwAAQj4E3UhfWgxiPcnC4kAvE7Q9OpRMU3-D5kaDKI2MKzH4SO_s031EAbSZe-D2YqDD39DQg9XCuX10Mky6T1ygntB-OwXMo/4ha/pZnek44lQN6GMj64pGoZzQ/h1/h001.6SnUZF6thPXLwyGnQ4VQd0Arjnn9DEcNLgbeUNIjMrw) Donald Trump wants America’s eyes to be on the military parade he’s throwing for his 79th birthday in Washington DC. name: Katie Porter
subject: My why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39799%2E3422442%2E4Yw8te)
Dear Derek,
When I was asked who’s inspired me the most, I had an easy answer: my kids.
I wake up every morning and think about the kind of future my kids will have.
**Unless we make housing affordable, my kids won’t be able to live in California when they grow up. Without climate action, many of our communities will not be livable for my kids and their peers. And without a Governor who will stand up to Trump—or any wannabe dictator—my kids will have fewer rights than I did at their age.**
Running for office isn’t always easy. But when I think about the work I can do to secure a better future for my kids and millions of California children, I’m so inspired to do this work.
But I can’t do it without you.
**[Will you join me in building a stronger, more resilient California for generations to come by chipping in $5 to my campaign for governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250612_2_ak?refcode=em20250612-39799&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39799_3422442_4Yw8te&akid=39799%2E3422442%2E4Yw8te)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250612_2_ak?refcode=em20250612-39799&refcode2=39799_3422442_4Yw8te&akid=39799%2E3422442%2E4Yw8te)
Thanks,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250612-39799&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39799_3422442_4Yw8te&akid=39799%2E3422442%2E4Yw8te)**

name: John James
subject: I’m not here to play games.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Friend, Let’s get something straight: I didn’t serve in combat so I could wear a suit and tie and deceive the American People. **_I’m not a D.C. puppet._** And I’m not here to make the swamp feel comfortable – whether they live in D.C. or back home in Michigan. This campaign is about tearing up the playbook and taking the fight straight to the corrupt political class that sold our country out. **_I’m running to tear this machine apart, and_** _**_build something worthy of your trust_**_** __****_in its place._** But I can’t do it alone. I need grassroots warriors who are sick and tired of being lied to. **[If that’s you, I need you to stand with me now.](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=58a85dc7f42c49e9be01ea31631accbc&_e=kVXEKVV6VivmP5-HYb2lvERwL3Gyqs7XRfvEoyy1tUAxvnSYodZruTqf3o29PIK4X8rwHt4L7kqC3Y6MC_9PyJGS1qA2hYKb5uH67vNl4FSlt8Xw_L_zyc8xmepwqwoor80i6IfO6lcwiCiClurLLcG7gbOl2_y0aLKNrFauVkLSzD0RFezq2H0dqdQ-ikTbp2HStcomtttbQU-g4m-nmRBDcWWKwM463jhylIfWRvEiDT7Cjsb1xG1GpIixyXHbokyG5r0Q6iDUZt8hL2fuhg%3D%3D)**
