name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Sign to condemn Trump’s illegal deployment of troops to squash dissent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Push back against Trump’s fascist attacks on our rights | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWbNATyyK8qyZqUdsDd4ynlExkuqo03xo2eqOCbk2UL87-OEHR0gUfB-eXtWA3Guxqy0vsWhkwOB1KKmB1swHYBkgIkZXLGENN3qwmOkA4ksQbaMIF7vNEFp88drBnOM7ebrpncN1GmENtUKL95cgwRsGGu7uiuCxlupSrHj3gGAMKj4ULaWW6rdSG1Ykza-jAnK72UEuuM4En76GRmt-4Yu72uQeSBnN_k0fjX2LEsZMOzZsEvNSas-wPgc2PXNK2/4ha/m3OsU6_OT2ma6IuCEUaKbQ/h0/h001.l5rp9vAnCJw3xfVHw4cbnzeubIBjSWWL6cEsokzUk_E)
---
Friend, In the first time since 1965 that a president has sent in the National Guard against a governor’s will, Trump is deploying _4,000_ National Guard soldiers and _700_ Marines to Los Angeles. **This is a massive, dangerous escalation and illegal abuse of power meant to suppress our right to protest. We must speak out to condemn Trump’s illegal actions before he deploys troops in other cities.** I’ll be joining my district’s residents at anti-Trump protests this weekend, which coincide with his outrageous birthday military parade featuring tanks and helicopters. Find which of the 2,000 nationwide No Kings rallies is closest to you [here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRk69K3J2CF3YV_JCDdJw3jQHuDMskqL92Vf6rwsvr1VqLPYv52jyCf1unJLnF56cL46ABKZP_4mrfgjTRl1nYZHbqTi4NOmg0J9bhTE0H-oOO3AZ4JB-rY_CfZjRcDfFg4bQvIoIYY044vMwpVxqZ_CtVMLxvJm1Nc0vPFkPF6Nf31bNXSxXF6SQf8bQG1kt_MzluyoqXm63vPLT1X6LL5kD30TkHrbnr6Ou8ub5SAdWImaiJ9iRYy1ccCsgkH0J58dPfhpes6qxLrr959DEfSaZVBxUq317-OeRw8_Q4OAb1qF2WtAlYGCWbqFbwJ3DwR67hNeCOOeHUiS02TqUsXw40dzwgL-QbgKysTSRnZN/4ha/m3OsU6_OT2ma6IuCEUaKbQ/h1/h001.ijbKHjixrSOiVhIQ4PW-TnM3XyGJIvCco0_IE9JkGyQ). Too many of my colleagues in Congress have been silent as Trump uses the military against civilian U.S. protesters. They must forcefully push back against Trump’s fascist attacks on our rights. [**Please add your name to call on Congress: Denounce Trump’s illegal deployment of the military against U.S. protesters. Defend our First Amendment right to protest!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9xb8nVLdmyxWfLpZuAEmzp_JtABXkOTEqwkPcg-T9P3JdaTPWxHiG15WUmUogeZZBTFfC39Hvo_4rGcqrFwoiJklrNd5V72rJUdMU_6x3ypNWmLkBqxBoHe_gNlkcq9OiKl_g4Dp61rLHhdOgHlOND8fQ4kmr_nZq_BRIk6XAd9Xsx2Lg06An4dl673dkzOXaF6tITRShxsaNZV-E_BnGGjS43SWTUNF5ytv6dtK5G5o1d5lhvyEbqXTarZrh-3MaJuz5BynIaDEzKWO-pc7oESPJ8JxDkzLrEwQ0jMRYGjcuBy5syYnih-s3aczcu-J2wzCVGlci5YO2w3yVMN_lmS9Jk2Lno4eFcaxc_i9d49SxiAkjjWX3TR7nbqfD7XtTqUpqo3rh_K951-wRy5EIUXTHoCF4LvvaZItnMqzKrb-9pp00gkT4mN0EqQpUs4SRhP5pNq7-pDTzEBksyCVFnw/4ha/m3OsU6_OT2ma6IuCEUaKbQ/h2/h001.iooVsnY-CQRoGuY6USXGk-U9tETPxjzv5xLpzpeuA2A) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9xb8nVLdmyxWfLpZuAEmzp_JtABXkOTEqwkPcg-T9P3JdaTPWxHiG15WUmUogeZZBTFfC39Hvo_4rGcqrFwoiJklrNd5V72rJUdMU_6x3ypNWmLkBqxBoHe_gNlkcq9OiKl_g4Dp61rLHhdOgHlOND0VJzzML97WCNzdjU67cjnwHHLw5V2RY8gscq5xUPHmn7ghZ6Ckqg2qeFDZWUa5MpS_JLf5sLCkL5fkceWUlA6NVa8yH6NTbQtpwsGo-DL91ircM25p5mAF2zmm7-VDq691xQu596Uus-e9q-G1kytmg4Er2aaO0kx343Q4_yqox2dZcw5uUJHmHqJi-7OcAe5M96qbwN6T3IfQECT0eK_AQ80Dshx85n8J21NLRGWqk9qHIMbT24H1Yv5F0HbDC2ZCAkofpDo3WdXsJTP2zVjDR01qd0a31KxyXy0uhtDvGFLu2bEwj4LXEFzTOVE_eZA/4ha/m3OsU6_OT2ma6IuCEUaKbQ/h3/h001.URcmqX2N4_vkA__3AT4Oa5ICtdpqLGP6RqKH_ri_ZAI)
---
Members of Congress should also vote to block Trump’s actions—including by withholding financial support.
But my Republican colleagues in Congress are trying to pass a budget reconciliation bill that would steal $1 trillion from our communities in order to expand Trump’s deportation machine, increase militarization, and grow profits for corporations and billionaires.
And right now, Trump is wasting $134 million of our tax dollars to send troops to Los Angeles. Our government must invest in our communities, not in attacking our constitutional rights.
As LA resident Daniel Fabiano told CNN, “ _Having troops in a civilian American neighborhood does not make anyone safer at all.”_
**Trump’s order to mobilize troops against civilian protesters in LA also included a first-ever pre-emptive authorization from a president to deploy the military in future U.S. protests.**
Which means that what he’s doing in LA could soon spread to other cities—unless we make enough noise to stop it.
[**Sign to demand Congressmembers denounce Trump’s illegal, unprecedented deployment of troops against U.S. protesters. Tell Congress: Speak out against this unprecedented attempt to squash our right to dissent!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9xb8nVLdmyxWfLpZuAEmzp_JtABXkOTEqwkPcg-T9P3JdaTPWxHiG15WUmUogeZZBTFfC39Hvo_4rGcqrFwoiJklrNd5V72rJUdMU_6x3ypNWmLkBqxBoHe_gNlkcq9OiKl_g4Dp61rLHhdOgHlOND-p0Oqz-7wUhagPF1v9TVlFFoPYgo052C0NvNqAeshQ60eMBOo91Y-z4xroCson2KvEyALc9x--hvmCvW6V1ARtt9-mpvQZokUBEr6fiADAeAzCmIxu0farALITh8xEQVjdzY-e1bkzR3ln4z2s7MZb6RbLQsvVdYf3s2qJRRSA_Rot8AFK8KuxjOLK1N4AZIwJ2wPiBldlICmRTqTNo_kT-mfZFZFMKiztUv7lbRH5Az3xnoZOjWvQecD-Z5-Mh6v4bmZbUhsRdxSy3A6ehWWXCZ8nAHrJd5ComW0iNcMGlAY1l6E_no-CFWLxWjz6lYg/4ha/m3OsU6_OT2ma6IuCEUaKbQ/h4/h001.BdjRBM4OFChit3YoRNX5Zf-4-TtkvzwSC4IKYCaCH2I)

clean_body: Push back against Trump’s fascist attacks on our rights | | | Friend, In the first time since 1965 that a president has sent in the National Guard against a governor’s will, Trump is deploying 4,000 National Guard soldiers and 700 Marines to Los Angeles. This is a massive, dangerous escalation and illegal abuse of power meant to suppress our right to protest. We must speak out to condemn Trump’s illegal actions before he deploys troops in other cities. I’ll be joining my district’s residents at anti-Trump protests this weekend, which coincide with his outrageous birthday military parade featuring tanks and helicopters. Find which of the 2,000 nationwide No Kings rallies is closest to you . Too many of my colleagues in Congress have been silent as Trump uses the military against civilian U.S. protesters. They must forcefully push back against Trump’s fascist attacks on our rights. | Members of Congress should also vote to block Trump’s actions—including by withholding financial support. But my Republican colleagues in Congress are trying to pass a budget reconciliation bill that would steal $1 trillion from our communities in order to expand Trump’s deportation machine, increase militarization, and grow profits for corporations and billionaires. And right now, Trump is wasting $134 million of our tax dollars to send troops to Los Angeles. Our government must invest in our communities, not in attacking our constitutional rights. As LA resident Daniel Fabiano told CNN, “ Having troops in a civilian American neighborhood does not make anyone safer at all.” Trump’s order to mobilize troops against civilian protesters in LA also included a first-ever pre-emptive authorization from a president to deploy the military in future U.S. protests. Which means that what he’s doing in LA could soon spread to other cities—unless we make enough noise to stop it. Thank you for continuing to advocate for our communities and our fundamental rights, including our right to due process and free speech. L.A. is headed for another night of curfew after the National Guard and the presence of Marines were able to quell the rioting and looting. Gavin Newsom posted the California flag on his X account and got absolutely roasted. Hard to get respect and support on the internet when you let your state and cities crumble and burn to the ground. Our all-star panel is here to weigh in on a very important question: should your uber driver give unprompted political opinions? Terry Moran is joining substack after trying to pretend he wasn't just fired from ABC. He needs "a couple of days" to get the ball rolling but now has the freedom to go "Full Acosta" in his anti-Trump rhetoric. It was a wild and chaotic week and our panel is here to unpack the winners and losers.

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Full-blown authoritarianism
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Peter, While the National Guard’s guns are trained on American citizens in Los Angeles, **California Senator Alex Padilla was just forcibly and violently removed from an LA press conference for simply trying to ask Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem a question.** He was forcefully shoved to the ground and handcuffed. Republicans push back when we call Donald Trump a dictator, but **let’s look at the record.** In the first few months of his second term, Donald Trump has:
* Pardoned violent January 6 insurrections
* Defied Supreme Court orders
* Attacked the free press
* Attacked the judiciary
* Unilaterally abolished agencies
* Kidnapped people off the streets and deported them to a foreign prison without due process

**And now, he has deployed the active duty military in American cities.** This is dystopian. It’s horrific. And it is full-blown authoritarianism. Donald Trump is trying to thwart free speech, undermine due process, and dismantle our democracy. **[We cannot let this stand, Peter. body:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109478441/551236360/-659687086?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2JmZjA3Ny1lMDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_PwrU2U3futmaBRzk-4cePqMv64ouaRZIwqTrF5qwA=)

Peter,
Just moments ago, Governor Walz finished testifying before the House Oversight Committee.
The Republican-controlled committee called Governor Walz in for a hearing about so-called “sanctuary policies” that Minnesota doesn’t even have. They weren’t looking for facts or serious discussion—they wanted a spectacle.
This hearing was about scapegoating immigrants, spreading fear, and trying to intimidate anyone who dares to stand up to Donald Trump and his fellow Republicans.
Trump has already threatened to arrest his political opponents—and during today’s hearing, one Republican committee member openly said Governor Walz himself should be arrested.
**But Governor Walz made it clear that he will not be bullied. **
He’s been calling out Trump and his MAGA allies for their BS since day one, and he’s not about to stop now—no matter how many politically motivated attacks they launch.
**That’s why today, we’re asking you to stand with Governor Walz and send an unmistakable message to Trump and the GOP: We won’t back down. **

body:

_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/glJhjpUjXyD5rJj3jzENON82AuQ55eccpAf-6VNnM31QgP5fzQoVvgVAjAnf011HPZ6nq38CfsqzloIoe0XJtpD1jucFdxd-6jYgrmfhrvl3rx_3sPXdbGaPXnD8LCJfsRWDQ--AezhbFWjJ32sVFTcT-pZqGpVYu2EGnlPGL4IEnGk7ph5C417O/BxcRrPrltFnDQw9o5HVCsqFzufcIrB0u/9)_

subject: Republicans just launched their newest attack ad against me

Dark money super PAC American Action Network just launched a $150,000 TV attack ad campaign against me

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=CSy%2BGo50N6QLpbNfnCMcUpga8Llx52vDtoFIzrZwyaVU2B9V2bPCSvNqzAsdLYzT4aN0%2BbN2XG2%2FwIYObzOrENL97m5pybSmULPzMj0CkO3eHE%2BTi7PdpWgmX9iPzsggxNtw%2FiItZzfKp6M6mx1HIc6mmh7pTEdfYLICmVFnLmVIUBDfXARra8qL4QVB7wuUazwioDzjrVbyhs49qrFOlvDvZ98x5jfzMzKfPTl79ikIyznziejnmEhIyIOVUnp4evEvm1uDioCcP47kRisVOaP1WtR0V9rq42OTq%2FCcumt4owBoToi%2FTqE69z%2F0fq2IfBnAH9HZUcwut2D1bn4rSxki2QRDcDIJnWmarSjAWrz0ZZBG5mSP2HK3miSSTovYWyPdr1AUUNPciPrIGYqokY6Vz%2BcPRugYfLgxdjbDeIg%3D)

We knew Mike Johnson and House Republicans were gearing up for a major fight here in NM-02 — and now that fight has officially begun.
In 2022, I beat my anti-choice MAGA extremist opponent by just 1,350 votes.
In 2024, I defeated that very same opponent in the face of millions of dollars in dark money spending against me and attack ads just like this one — filled with lies and misinformation about my character and record.
Right now, Mike Johnson is searching high and low for a new challenger to prop up against me who would rather push Donald Trump’s agenda than solve the kitchen-table issues that affect New Mexicans every day.
But you and I both know that no amount of super PAC dark money or sucking up to Johnson and Trump will defeat the movement we’ve built.
Why? Because I didn’t run for Congress to prop up an establishment party agenda. **I ran for Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.**
I’m proud to represent this district, and I’m proud to continue fighting tooth and nail to protect Medicaid, SNAP, Social Security, our public lands and our democracy. But if we’re going to make history again, I need you standing with me.
What happens on Election Day in 2026 could result in a real check on the power Republicans have forcibly seized or the demise of our democracy as we know it.
Our second public-facing FEC deadline of the cycle is just over two weeks away, and the number we report must send a message to Donald Trump that we’re not backing down — not now, not ever.
[When our numbers go public come July, we need to prove that we have what it takes to go toe-to-toe with their dark money super PACs and win a historic third term here in NM-02. Please rush $10 or any amount possible to help us fight back now:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109478851/551237974/1448278484?amount=10&source=SBD_GV_EM_FR_061225_AANADBUY_60DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTRhMTc0Ni1lMTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rLQPndjiIn6D7nH_XFzSZsnrVzimD4MfO2gw4tuUNLY=)

clean_body: Dark money super PAC American Action Network just launched a $150,000 TV attack ad campaign against me Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Gabe Vasquez here with a critical update: Dark money super PAC American Action Network just launched a $150,000 TV attack ad campaign against me. = | | = We knew Mike Johnson and House Republicans were gearing up for a major fight here in NM-02 — and now that fight has officially begun. In 2022, I beat my anti-choice MAGA extremist opponent by just 1,350 votes. In 2024, I defeated that very same opponent in the face of millions of dollars in dark money spending against me and attack ads just like this one — filled with lies and misinformation about my character and record. Right now, Mike Johnson is searching high and low for a new challenger to prop up against me who would rather push Donald Trump’s agenda than solve the kitchen-table issues that affect New Mexicans every day. But you and I both know that no amount of super PAC dark money or sucking up to Johnson and Trump will defeat the movement we’ve built. Why? Because I didn’t run for Congress to prop up an establishment party agenda. I ran for Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. I’m proud to represent this district, and I’m proud to continue fighting tooth and nail to protect Medicaid, SNAP, Social Security, our public lands and our democracy. But if we’re going to make history again, I need you standing with me. What happens on Election Day in 2026 could result in a real check on the power Republicans have forcibly seized or the demise of our democracy as we know it. Our second public-facing FEC deadline of the cycle is just over two weeks away, and the number we report must send a message to Donald Trump that we’re not backing down — not now, not ever. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Gracias, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. 3. **She was one of the ONLY Democrats to flip a Republican held seat in 2024,** and she won by an incredibly narrow margin.

4. **Now, Republicans are _already_ running attack ads against her for standing up to Trump and the GOP’s radical agenda.** So our re-election campaign is shaping up to be another tough fight.

5. **The best way this grassroots team can fight back against these attacks and defend OR-05 is by** [**hitting fundraising goals like the one we have on Saturday.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479055/551238644/-629675555?refcode=email_061225_fivethings&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTBkZDhlYTYtZTE0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SWxhOyWKfAgDCw2nau8MpQteL9MsHAxaPH1Dx7sFKEk=)

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1011&refcode=email-20250612d_v&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]Our Revolution logo

The gloves have completely come off,
Peter Willis.

California Senator Alex Padilla was just pushed to the ground, put in
handcuffs, and forcibly removed from a press conference being held by
Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?source=email-20250612d&t=1061&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]Photo of Senator Padilla being pinnned to the floor and handcuffed

This as Trump deploys the Marines and National Guard to LA to silence
peaceful protestors and send a clear message: dissent will NOT be
tolerated. And meanwhile, he’s rolling tanks, rocket launchers, and armed
vehicles into our nation's capital for his taxpayer-funded military
extravaganza.

We CANNOT allow Trump to continue his blatant militarization of our
streets and cities. That’s why Our Revolution is working around the clock
to mobilize the grassroots to show that his intimidation tactics will not
work – waging a massive peaceful resistance to Trump's authoritarianism
with No Kings Day protests around the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250612dnd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]We have just days before June 14 to massively scale up, but this urgent
work depends on grassroots donors like you stepping up immediately. Can we
count on you to chip in to help Our Revolution organize a national day of
defiance and tell Trump in no uncertain terms: we reject your
authoritarian agenda?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250612dnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250612dnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250612dnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250612dnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250612dnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250612dnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Trump's latest authoritarian actions mirror oppressive regimes throughout
history. Tanks are arriving by the dozens to DC, alongside rocket
launchers and thousands of soldiers – all designed to intimidate us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?source=email-20250612d&t=1060&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]Photo of tanks being transported to D.C.

Even worse, while Trump parades military equipment through the capital,
he's simultaneously deploying the military against our communities – an
incredibly dangerous and unprecedented abuse of power that puts ALL of us
in danger.

This isn't democracy – this is authoritarianism in action. And that's why
Our Revolution is taking immediate steps to confront Trump's militarism
with peaceful, overwhelming resistance. Already, activists from across the
country are organizing buses, banners, permits, and solidarity actions to
make our message crystal clear: our communities WILL NOT accept
dictatorship-like intimidation on American soil.

But organizing at this scale requires significant resources – and we must
scale up fast. No Kings Day is just 36 hours away, and in order to pull
off a day of massive peaceful protest and send an unmistakable message to
Trump, we urgently need to raise another $10,000 from grassroots
contributors by midnight tonight.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31294?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250612dnd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8806%2E5885482%2EkKpFZP ]Chip in $5, $15, or $50 right now and help Our Revolution shut down
Trump's militarism. Together we'll send him a clear message: we will not
be silenced.

THIS is how we reclaim the narrative, uphold our democratic ideals, and
reject these grotesque displays of military muscle aimed at silencing our
movement. We're boldly standing up against authoritarian power grabs – and
united, we will win.

When we organize, we win.

body:
|
#
Folks, Did you catch this latest headline from _The Detroit News_? | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479292/551239372/846650059?refcode=em-6.12.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc4NWUzMi1lMjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zmu3kTrGwPFLz5uIeia-GEldIsNr8UZE9fkicjQxkCQ=)
**Conservative group spends big early against Democratic congresswoman**
_The conservative American Action Network has spent nearly half a million dollars running attack ads against Michigan's most vulnerable congresswoman, freshman U.S. Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet, and is preparing to spend more on another ad campaign this month._
---
We wish we could say we were surprised, folks.
Spending nearly half a million dollars this early in the cycle is all part of the GOP’s strategy: get in early with misleading attack ads, before voters are fully tuned in, and try to define Kristen before the truth gets out.
**The ad claims that by voting against the extreme GOP budget — the one that would take health insurance from 13 million people — she voted to cut healthcare... really!?**
_The Detroit News_ writes that this kind of early spending “will have its strongest impact because it is not buried in a blizzard of campaign-year advertising.”
The GOP isn't hiding their strategy. They’re just hoping we don’t fight back.
[**We can’t let these attacks stick, folks. Will you chip in $3 to help us fight back, set the record straight, and make sure voters hear the truth?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479293/551239373/846650059?refcode=em-6.12.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc4NWUzMi1lMjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zmu3kTrGwPFLz5uIeia-GEldIsNr8UZE9fkicjQxkCQ=)

clean_body: | Folks, Did you catch this latest headline from The Detroit News? | = Conservative group spends big early against Democratic congresswoman The conservative American Action Network has spent nearly half a million dollars running attack ads against Michigan's most vulnerable congresswoman, freshman U.S. Rep. Kristen McDonald Rivet, and is preparing to spend more on another ad campaign this month. We wish we could say we were surprised, folks. Spending nearly half a million dollars this early in the cycle is all part of the GOP’s strategy: get in early with misleading attack ads, before voters are fully tuned in, and try to define Kristen before the truth gets out. The ad claims that by voting against the extreme GOP budget — the one that would take health insurance from 13 million people — she voted to cut healthcare... really!? The Detroit News writes that this kind of early spending “will have its strongest impact because it is not buried in a blizzard of campaign-year advertising.” The GOP isn't hiding their strategy. They’re just hoping we don’t fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thank you, McDonald Rivet HQ | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

Hi Peter, **Thom Tillis is back at it. He’s not just aiming to cut Medicaid — now he’s targeting Medicare** , setting out to fund tax breaks for billionaires at the expense of North Carolinian families. In his recent push for Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill, _Tillis has made it clear he’s willing to erode our health care access, putting millions at risk._ **In a _HuffPost_ quote, Tillis suggested gutting Medicare, undermining health care access for over 2.2 million Medicare-eligible North Carolinians. **As if it’s not enough that Tillis wants to strip health care from over half a million North Carolinians on Medicaid, now he’s coming after seniors by gutting Medicare. **That’s why I took the fight straight to Tillis’ Raleigh office to speak out against a plan that guts health care and raises costs — all to benefit billionaires.** We cannot let North Carolina families bear the brunt of these backwards policies. Our health shouldn't be sacrificed so the ultra-wealthy can enjoy another handout. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479386/551239638/474294398?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGQ3MDA3Yi1lMjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHTVh8833UvaVQGwcrjPe9ui3Frd5Cxt0FQInIdTvIg=) We’ve said it before, and we’ll continue to sound the alarm: This isn’t about fiscal responsibility — it’s about prioritizing billionaire tax breaks over the well-being of working families. The cuts he’s proposing could lead to skyrocketing costs and slashed coverage — the very things we’ve been fighting against. I’m asking you to join me in this fight. Together, we can build a movement that stands up to these harmful cuts and champions affordable health care for everyone. **[Will you help us show that our voices are more powerful than his billionaire backers?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479387/551239640/-648237359?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGQ3MDA3Yi1lMjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHTVh8833UvaVQGwcrjPe9ui3Frd5Cxt0FQInIdTvIg=)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue, your donation to Wiley Nickel will process immediately:_ **** | | **[DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479388/551239641/474294398?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250612_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGQ3MDA3Yi1lMjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZHTVh8833UvaVQGwcrjPe9ui3Frd5Cxt0FQInIdTvIg=)**

name: Justice Democrats
subject: BREAKING: Dem. Senator assaulted by Trump admin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

BREAKING NEWS, Peter:

Democratic U.S. Senator Alex Padilla of California was just physically
assaulted, forced to the ground, handcuffed, and removed from a Department
of Homeland Security press conference by the Trump administration in Los
Angeles.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250612?refcode=em20250612-36755&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36755_1203867_rq9DFz&akid=36755%2E1203867%2Erq9DFz ]Photo of Sen. Alex Padilla being physically removed from a press
conference by security.

It happened after Padilla identified himself and tried to ask Secretary of
Homeland Security Kristi Noem a question during the event, which was in
response to the ongoing ICE raids and militarization against protesters in
LA this past week.

This is not supposed to happen in the United States,
Peter. This is fascism on full display.

If this is how the administration treats a sitting U.S. Senator, what are
they willing to do to civilians? Senator Padilla said it himself: If this
is how the administration responds to a Senator with a question, you can
only imagine what they're doing to farmworkers, cooks, and day laborers
throughout the country.

Trump and his far-right goons have already sicced ICE and their Gestapo
tactics on immigrant communities across the country to carry out their
mass deportation agenda.

Then, they called in the National Guard and Marines to repress protesters
against a Democratic Governor’s wishes.

Now, they manhandled and handcuffed a sitting Democratic Senator for
demanding answers from the Homeland Security Secretary—his literal job.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250612?refcode=em20250612-36755&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36755_1203867_rq9DFz&akid=36755%2E1203867%2Erq9DFz ]These are rapidly escalating authoritarian actions by the President and
his administration, and we cannot let them get away with it. Rush
$5 or whatever you can to help us and our members of
Congress fight Trump’s fascism now!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250612?refcode=em20250612-36755&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36755_1203867_rq9DFz&akid=36755%2E1203867%2Erq9DFz ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250612-36755-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36755_1203867_rq9DFz&akid=36755%2E1203867%2Erq9DFz

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36755%2E1203867%2Erq9DFz

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: It’s official: we just won the Democratic primary in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
The general election begins now.
#
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sherrill.81iN1T&refcode=em250612-1-300&refcode2=5568.196590.UQ_-Td&t=1&akid=5568%2E196590%2EUQ_-Td)
---
Team, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted.
And we can’t stop now.
We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. [**Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $5 between my campaign and The Long Run today? [DONATE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sherrill.81iN1T&refcode=em250612-1-300&t=3&akid=5568%2E196590%2EUQ_-Td) Friend, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor. It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time. And it’s why, I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t. **But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.** [**Friend, if you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and The Long Run today →**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-sherrill.81iN1T&refcode=em250612-1-300&t=4&akid=5568%2E196590%2EUQ_-Td) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | **[Donate $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-sherrill.6HsIDn&refcode=em250612-1-300&t=23&akid=5568%2E196590%2EUQ_-Td)**
---
**** | **[Donate $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-sherrill.vAoh9V&refcode=em250612-1-300&t=24&akid=5568%2E196590%2EUQ_-Td)**
---
****

But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you so much for your support, Mikie

name: Team DLCC
subject: This is personal
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
MAGA extremism is directly impacting not only our most vulnerable communities but even those who previously believed they would be insulated from a second Trump presidency. | | |
---
| |
---|---
MAGA extremism is hitting home for Americans everywhere, directly impacting not only our most vulnerable communities but even those who previously believed they would be insulated from a second Trump presidency.
* **Millions of Americans' First Amendment rights are under assault.** Trump and his far-right administration are silencing dissent every chance they get.
* **Across at least 25 states, women are being denied care due to MAGA abortion bans** – forcing some to wait until sepsis sets in or being detained against their will while miscarrying.
* **_“I don’t feel welcome here... there’s a bounty on us just for existing.”_** That’s the comment from one trans resident in New Jersey. Since Trump’s re-election, there’s been a 700% spike in crisis calls and a wave of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation. Many in the community now fear for their safety, futures, and even their lives.

**This isn’t just politics, it’s our lives – and we’re taking it personally.**[You can help power our party’s work fighting back in our statehouses by chipping in to elect state Dems. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDqV2bKIMRGsvIJOaErTgzexXvB4-Z6f6Dn5GnOLxmCcc94YjB38GEjE6B5KM09BH_da1JqPDv7V57MfWffDUxO8rLKWW6PlOJOMqsuWZC1lQZXtRD4J_7QX0c4b43cTBqT5vx4Bo7I3M2I9JWN4EuvKQAx-5nHLAd0MAVF6njbpHcw9UdBThbruBBj4T0MFVtUWt5702lvb9CzsUjcKs_a51ZJ1m7dPB8JTfklQRyhVTlKXk5hKYekXEb-C7aH4pg-bhp8ywYwrx45ssNd_GlFz_v5o-9rPSLBU2373uzbuJHT4bOPpGlafwjr64EXbBrQnhQCgJydIOkZH2FHaKaXMrpGj6D8TdZAE7A72Xda97JXVWV5luzoIlL-TA7y2S8acTsiMnGC88gLfi09kPC6lVITcjh9bV_JZy4RzLv3JIZ2dv0wlkxezFAhYIf5q1cX3qEE0kzw3EHfB4n90At-hDOLTotLtcRxI0OJwTOhtt-vcm1Invax_LUk-fGjIre/4ha/QLPM2s1kRmKGAD0MDWqcPw/h0/h001.UG77z3TBNeXBGZSnIoUd3r5p2FE-7tk1_WLsypSPGUc) No one is escaping the impact of MAGA. Our children’s education _suffers_. Our votes get _suppressed_. Our loved ones face _discrimination_. [This is why this fight is personal. clean_body: MAGA extremism is directly impacting not only our most vulnerable communities but even those who previously believed they would be insulated from a second Trump presidency. | | | | | ---|--- MAGA extremism is hitting home for Americans everywhere, directly impacting not only our most vulnerable communities but even those who previously believed they would be insulated from a second Trump presidency. Millions of Americans' First Amendment rights are under assault. Trump and his far-right administration are silencing dissent every chance they get. Across at least 25 states, women are being denied care due to MAGA abortion bans – forcing some to wait until sepsis sets in or being detained against their will while miscarrying. “I don’t feel welcome here... there’s a bounty on us just for existing.” That’s the comment from one trans resident in New Jersey. Since Trump’s re-election, there’s been a 700% spike in crisis calls and a wave of anti-LGBTQ+ legislation. Many in the community now fear for their safety, futures, and even their lives. This isn’t just politics, it’s our lives – and we’re taking it personally. No one is escaping the impact of MAGA. We’re all affected – that includes you, your neighbors, and families across the country. When MAGA extremists take over state legislatures, our health care choices disappear. body:
| | | MAGA goons are OUT OF CONTROL. Just this week:
* Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem’s team **violently assaulted, handcuffed, and ejected Sen. Alex Padilla** from a press conference, and justified cracking down on anyone that “disrespects” them
* US Attorney Alina Habba has **INDICTED opposition lawmaker Rep. LaMonica McIver** for attempting to conduct legal oversight of an ICE facility
* Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth **refused to commit to complying with potential court orders** on his deployment of the military against Americans

These thugs are attacking dissident lawmakers as they celebrate fascist Donald Trump’s birthday with a lavish military parade.
**Friend, we can’t give up. They’re LASHING OUT against dissidents like us because they’re SCARED of losing power.**
* Donald Trump’s approval ratings are **falling to record lows** this term - just 38% in a Quinnipiac survey.
* Republicans are SO NERVOUS of losing their narrow majority in the US House that they want to **CHEAT with a mid-decade gerrymander** in Texas.
* Trump allies are **TERRIFIED** that if they lose 2025 and 2026 midterms, that Democrats will launch investigations into their lawless conduct, and even impeach Trump again

**At Cedar Key Progress, we’re working around the clock to TAKE BACK our democracy from MAGA thugs.**
We’re running ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboards, and building up our war chest to run ads and billboards in critical 2026 swing districts.

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479676/551240518/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTFlM2E5Yi1lNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g13M_J9ZgpAAKXuUmiRIbjC6v0_9ftu-J7_3-_mqW7I=&emci=7959b6dd-0247-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=311e3a9b-e447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7878003)
Team—it’s LaMonica McIver. Last month, the Trump administration brought charges against me because I was doing my job as a member of Congress. **Now, I’ve been officially indicted.** **Let me be clear:** Under the law, members of Congress are explicitly authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. I was there to do my job and make sure that this administration isn’t abusing people’s rights. And I was charged and now indicted. **The administration’s attacks are baseless and the facts are on my side, but that’s not stopping them from going after me.** [**So I need you on my side, today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479677/551240519/1761115897?&refcode=E13684-20250611-McIverSplit2-SL-SplitSend&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTFlM2E5Yi1lNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g13M_J9ZgpAAKXuUmiRIbjC6v0_9ftu-J7_3-_mqW7I=) These charges hold no factual merit, but there’s a reason they brought them. The Trump administration thinks they can intimidate me and scare me out of doing the job I was elected to do. They’re wrong. | | Hi there Friend, I’ve been watching the unfolding events in LA, and I can’t stop thinking about the pain and fear that so many families must be feeling right now. National Guard troops and U.S. Marines have been deployed to LA, without consent, to silence people who are standing up for their rights and the rights of their immigrant neighbors. **This is not just a political move; it’s a deeply personal blow to every single person who believes in justice, safety, and dignity for all.** I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for immigrant families, for young people, for workers—because I know what it means to feel unseen, unheard, and pushed aside. **[I encourage you to take a moment to review the ACLU of Northern California’s Know‐Your‐Rights guide below:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479702/551240602/-1186485717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ2M2JlZTItZTQ0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b1N6OVLXwR_B_Pl_4WP6DCX7NPAmWvE81oRsFs34ub4=&emci=2eca3047-be47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0463bee2-e447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22554739)** | [KNOW YOUR RIGHTS → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109479703/551240603/-1186485717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDQ2M2JlZTItZTQ0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b1N6OVLXwR_B_Pl_4WP6DCX7NPAmWvE81oRsFs34ub4=&emci=2eca3047-be47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=0463bee2-e447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=22554739)

Stay safe. Stay determined.
With all my heart,
Lateefah

name: Rep. LaMonica McIver
subject: BREAKING: I was just indicted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250612_2_split?refcode=em20250612-2566&refcode2=2566_400544_QxeU3n&akid=2566%2E400544%2EQxeU3n)
Team—it’s LaMonica McIver. Last month, the Trump administration brought charges against me because I was doing my job as a member of Congress. **Now, I’ve been officially indicted.**
**Let me be clear:** under the law, members of Congress are explicitly authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. I was there to do my job and make sure that this administration isn’t abusing people’s rights. And I was charged and now indicted. **The administration’s attacks are baseless and the facts are on my side, but that’s not stopping them from going after me.[So I need you on my side, today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250612_2_split?refcode=em20250612-2566&refcode2=2566_400544_QxeU3n&akid=2566%2E400544%2EQxeU3n)**
These charges hold no factual merit. But there’s a reason they brought them: the Trump administration thinks they can intimidate me and scare me out of doing the job I was elected to do. They’re wrong.
I need your help to send an unmistakable message: Americans won’t stand for this.
**[Will you contribute a split donation between me and Deb Haaland to stand against the Trump administration's unjust political intimidation?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250612_2_split?refcode=em20250612-2566&refcode2=2566_400544_QxeU3n&akid=2566%2E400544%2EQxeU3n)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250612_2_split?refcode=em20250612-2566&refcode2=2566_400544_QxeU3n&akid=2566%2E400544%2EQxeU3n)**
We set a goal of 5,000 new grassroots donors to stand with us before our 11:59pm deadline TONIGHT.
If we stand together we can amass the resources to mount a legal defense against this baseless indictment and show the Trump administration that the people who oppose his cruel agenda won’t be intimidated into silence.
This is far bigger than one person. The rule of law is under attack, and what we do next matters.
**[Can we count on you to donate now and stand up against the Trump administration’s attacks on oversight, decency, and all who dare to speak up for what’s right?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250612_2_split?refcode=em20250612-2566&refcode2=2566_400544_QxeU3n&akid=2566%2E400544%2EQxeU3n)**
We’re in this together,
Rep. LaMonica McIver

clean_body: Team—it’s LaMonica McIver. Last month, the Trump administration brought charges against me because I was doing my job as a member of Congress. Now, I’ve been officially indicted. Let me be clear: under the law, members of Congress are explicitly authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. I was there to do my job and make sure that this administration isn’t abusing people’s rights. And I was charged and now indicted. The administration’s attacks are baseless and the facts are on my side, but that’s not stopping them from going after me. These charges hold no factual merit. But there’s a reason they brought them: the Trump administration thinks they can intimidate me and scare me out of doing the job I was elected to do. They’re wrong. I need your help to send an unmistakable message: Americans won’t stand for this. We set a goal of 5,000 new grassroots donors to stand with us before our 11:59pm deadline TONIGHT. If we stand together we can amass the resources to mount a legal defense against this baseless indictment and show the Trump administration that the people who oppose his cruel agenda won’t be intimidated into silence. This is far bigger than one person. The rule of law is under attack, and what we do next matters. We’re in this together, Rep. LaMonica McIver

name: EMILYs List Press
subject: This should scare everyone
body:
This is NOT what a democracy looks like |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109479958/551241353/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE634_20250612_Padilla_PL&sourceid=1056396&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGRmZDkwZC1lNjQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCjsRUN36IxdfuRZIueUVEffjx0YLPWGOINhFWA89U8=) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
June 12, 2025 **SOUND THE ALARM: DHS Assault Against U.S. Senator Alex Padilla** **Sen. Alex Padilla was just assaulted for simply doing his job.**

While standing up for his constituents who were demanding answers to the Trump administration's egregious actions, Sen. Alex Padilla was _assaulted_ at the Department of Homeland Security press conference and _forcibly removed and put in handcuffs_.

_Let's call this what it is: a disgraceful abuse of power._

**The Trump administration will retaliate against any American who speaks out against him — and if this is how they treat a sitting U.S. Senator, then just imagine how far they'll go.**

**EMILYs List women won't sit by and let them get away with it:** "The date is June 12, 2025. The location is Los Angeles, California, United States of America. A U.S. Senator who questioned this President's actions was forcibly thrown to the ground by armed officers. This is the America Trump always wanted.**It's up to us to save our country**."
\- Sen. Angela Alsobrooks, Maryland "...This administration is sending the National Guard and armed Marines into neighborhoods and now, shoving to the ground and handcuffing a U.S. Senator at a public briefing. **We need some answers and accountability from this administration, immediately**."
\- Sen. Tammy Baldwin, Wisconsin "This is a sad and frightening state of affairs. This administration will stop at nothing to keep elected officials from doing our jobs and demanding accountability for our constituents. **We're seeing it in real time: they don't want oversight they want total control**."
\- Rep. LaMonica McIver, NJ-10 "As Trump continues his unlawful militarization in our cities, remember that there is power in community. We take care of us. Let's remain informed of our rights, create safety plans and meet each other's needs, and only shared verified information. **We resist when we remain united and informed**."
\- Rep. Delia Ramirez, IL-03 "An administration that tackles a *sitting US Senator* to the ground and handcuffs him for asking a simple question at an open press conference should scare everyone. Anyone who believes in our democracy needs to say this with me: **This👏is 👏 not 👏 acceptable 👏**.”
- State Sen. The Trump administration will retaliate against any American who speaks out against him — and if this is how they treat a sitting U.S. Senator, then just imagine how far they'll go. A U.S. Senator who questioned this President's actions was forcibly thrown to the ground by armed officers. This is the America Trump always wanted.It's up to us to save our country." \- Sen. This administration will stop at nothing to keep elected officials from doing our jobs and demanding accountability for our constituents. body:
| | | **** Sen. Alex Padilla was just manhandled, handcuffed, and thrown out of a press conference by Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem.
Rep. LaMonica McIver was just indicted for conducting legal oversight of an ICE facility.
_This is how they treat lawmakers of color and sitting members of Congress._
MAGA Republicans want to intimidate us. DHS’s official Twitter account even called Padilla speaking out “disrespectful political theater” that justified violence against him.
**In the United States of America, free speech is not a crime.**
_And this November, Virginia’s 2025 elections will be our next chance to STAND UP for democracy and defeat Trump Republicans._

“White House Pushes Texas to Redistrict, Hoping to Blunt Democratic Gains”
— June 9, 2025
**Peter, the New York Times just reported that Donald Trump is actively pressuring Texas lawmakers to redraw its congressional map mid-decade in order to get an upper hand in the midterm elections. They want a “ruthless” gerrymander that they hope might pick up four or five more seats for Republicans in the House.**
Trump and his allies clearly don’t think they can win fairly, so they’re breaking out every tool in the autocracy playbook to try to cheat instead.
[**This is exactly the kind of abuse of power the NDRC is built to fight — we’re leading the fight against gerrymandering in Texas and beyond. Rush in a donation today to push back against anti-democracy extremists who are determined to manipulate maps in the pursuit of power.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109480253/551242166/-1156862612?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_TXRR_email_20250612-NDRC-Tier1-TXRR-NOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250612-NDRC-Tier1-TXRR-NOR_&utm_campaign=TXRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NWUzZmYwLWU4NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kmYPQsIupS63erEatZ-nBN94SQJKQDFUuuyxQAx_uYU=)
